````
# Documentation Technique Backend & Intégration Firebase
## Tennis Club du François (Martinique)

Ce document détaille l'implémentation backend pour connecter les interfaces UI aux services Firebase, optimisée pour le développement avec **Firebase Emulator Suite**.

---

### 1. Configuration Initiale (`src/firebase.config.js`)
Ce fichier gère la connexion aux services et l'activation des émulateurs selon la variable d'environnement `VITE_USE_EMULATOR`.

```javascript
import { initializeApp } from "firebase/app";
import { getFirestore, connectFirestoreEmulator } from "firebase/firestore";
import { getAuth, connectAuthEmulator } from "firebase/auth";

const firebaseConfig = {
  apiKey: "VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY",
  authDomain: "tennis-francois.firebaseapp.com",
  projectId: "tennis-francois",
  storageBucket: "tennis-francois.appspot.com",
  messagingSenderId: "VITE_SENDER_ID",
  appId: "VITE_APP_ID"
};

const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
const db = getFirestore(app);
const auth = getAuth(app);

// Connexion aux émulateurs si VITE_USE_EMULATOR=true
if (import.meta.env.VITE_USE_EMULATOR === 'true') {
  connectFirestoreEmulator(db, 'localhost', 8080);
  connectAuthEmulator(auth, "http://localhost:9099");
  console.log("--- Firebase Emulators Connected ---");
}

export { db, auth };
```

---

### 2. Logique de Réservation & Temps Réel (`src/services/reservationService.js`)
Utilisation de `onSnapshot` pour la mise à jour instantanée de l'UI et transactions pour éviter les doublons.

```javascript
import { db } from '../firebase.config';
import {
  collection,
  query,
  where,
  onSnapshot,
  runTransaction,
  doc,
  timestamp
} from "firebase/firestore";

/**
 * Écoute en temps réel les réservations pour un jour donné
 */
export const subscribeToReservations = (date, callback) => {
  const q = query(
    collection(db, "reservations"),
    where("start_time", ">=", date.startOf('day').toISOString()),
    where("start_time", "<=", date.endOf('day').toISOString())
  );

  return onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
    const reservations = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));
    callback(reservations);
  });
};

/**
 * Création d'une réservation avec vérification de conflit atomique
 */
export const createReservation = async (reservationData) => {
  const { court_id, start_time } = reservationData;

  try {
    await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
      // Vérifier si le créneau est déjà pris
      const q = query(
        collection(db, "reservations"),
        where("court_id", "==", court_id),
        where("start_time", "==", start_time),
        where("status", "==", "confirmed")
      );

      const conflictSnap = await transaction.get(q);
      if (!conflictSnap.empty) {
        throw new Error("Ce court est déjà réservé pour ce créneau.");
      }

      const newResRef = doc(collection(db, "reservations"));
      transaction.set(newResRef, {
        ...reservationData,
        status: 'confirmed',
        created_at: timestamp.now()
      });
    });
    return { success: true };
  } catch (e) {
    console.error("Erreur transaction:", e);
    return { success: false, error: e.message };
  }
};
```

---

### 3. Règles de Sécurité Firestore (`firestore.rules`)
Protection stricte basée sur les rôles utilisateur (`admin`, `moniteur`, `client`).

```javascript
service cloud.firestore {
  match /databases/{database}/documents {

    // Fonction helper pour vérifier le rôle
    function hasRole(role) {
      return request.auth != null && get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == role;
    }

    // Utilisateurs : Seul l'admin gère tout, le user lit son profil
    match /users/{userId} {
      allow read: if request.auth != null && (request.auth.uid == userId || hasRole('admin'));
      allow write: if hasRole('admin');
    }

    // Réservations
    match /reservations/{resId} {
      allow read: if request.auth != null; // Tout membre voit le planning
      allow create: if request.auth != null;
      allow update, delete: if hasRole('admin') || (resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid);
    }

    // Courts & Tarifs
    match /courts/{courtId} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow write: if hasRole('admin');
    }
  }
}
```

---

### 4. Script de Data Seeding (`src/scripts/seed.js`)
Pour peupler l'émulateur avec les 6 courts initiaux.

```javascript
import { db } from '../firebase.config';
import { doc, setDoc } from "firebase/firestore";

const seedData = async () => {
  const courts = [
    { id: "1", name: "Court 1", type: "Quick", is_active: true },
    { id: "2", name: "Court 2", type: "Quick", is_active: true },
    { id: "3", name: "Court 3", type: "Quick", is_active: true },
    { id: "4", name: "Court 4", type: "Quick", is_active: true },
    { id: "5", name: "Court 5", type: "Terre", is_active: true },
    { id: "6", name: "Court 6", type: "Terre", is_active: true },
  ];

  for (const court of courts) {
    await setDoc(doc(db, "courts", court.id), court);
  }
  console.log("6 courts initialisés avec succès !");
};
```

# Spécifications Techniques Backend & Intégration Firebase
## Tennis Club du François

Ce document centralise toute la logique de données et de sécurité pour l'application.

---

### 1. Configuration SDK (`src/firebase.config.js`)
Initialisation forcée vers la **Firebase Emulator Suite** pour le développement local.

```javascript
import { initializeApp } from "firebase/app";
import { getFirestore, connectFirestoreEmulator } from "firebase/firestore";
import { getAuth, connectAuthEmulator } from "firebase/auth";

const firebaseConfig = {
  apiKey: "VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY",
  authDomain: "tennis-francois.firebaseapp.com",
  projectId: "tennis-francois",
  storageBucket: "tennis-francois.appspot.com",
  messagingSenderId: "VITE_SENDER_ID",
  appId: "VITE_APP_ID"
};

const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
const db = getFirestore(app);
const auth = getAuth(app);

// Connexion forcée aux émulateurs
if (import.meta.env.VITE_USE_EMULATOR === 'true') {
  connectFirestoreEmulator(db, 'localhost', 8080);
  connectAuthEmulator(auth, "http://localhost:9099");
  console.log("🛠️ Connecté aux Émulateurs Firebase");
}

export { db, auth };
```

---

### 2. Services de Données (`src/services/`)

#### A. `reservationService.js`
Gère la création avec vérification de disponibilité atomique via Transaction Firestore.

```javascript
import { db } from '../firebase.config';
import { collection, query, where, getDocs, runTransaction, doc, onSnapshot } from "firebase/firestore";

// Vérification de disponibilité (Anti-conflit)
export const checkCourtAvailability = async (courtId, startTime) => {
  const q = query(
    collection(db, "reservations"),
    where("court_id", "==", courtId),
    where("start_time", "==", startTime),
    where("status", "==", "confirmed")
  );
  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);
  return snapshot.empty;
};

// Création d'une réservation sécurisée
export const createReservation = async (data) => {
  try {
    await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
      const isAvailable = await checkCourtAvailability(data.court_id, data.start_time);
      if (!isAvailable) throw new Error("Court déjà réservé !");

      const newRef = doc(collection(db, "reservations"));
      transaction.set(newRef, { ...data, created_at: new Date().toISOString() });
    });
    return { success: true };
  } catch (e) {
    return { success: false, error: e.message };
  }
};
```

#### B. `userService.js`
Gestion des profils et synchronisation des rôles.

```javascript
import { db, auth } from '../firebase.config';
import { doc, getDoc, setDoc } from "firebase/firestore";

export const getUserProfile = async (uid) => {
  const docRef = doc(db, "users", uid);
  const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef);
  return docSnap.exists() ? docSnap.data() : null;
};
```

---

### 3. Sécurité Firestore (`firestore.rules`)
Protection stricte des données selon le rôle utilisateur.

```javascript
service cloud.firestore {
  match /databases/{database}/documents {

    function isAdmin() {
      return get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == 'admin';
    }

    match /users/{userId} {
      allow read: if request.auth != null && (request.auth.uid == userId || isAdmin());
      allow write: if isAdmin();
    }

    match /courts/{courtId} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow write: if isAdmin();
    }

    match /reservations/{resId} {
      allow read: if request.auth != null;
      allow create: if request.auth != null;
      allow update, delete: if isAdmin() || resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid;
    }
  }
}
```

Content from /Users/mathieu/StudioProjects/web_tennis/prd_tennis_club_du_fran_ois.html:

# PRD: Application Tennis Club du François (Martinique)

## Objectif
Créer une Progressive Web App (PWA) de gestion et réservation pour le tennis club municipal du François, Martinique.

## Stack Technique
- **Frontend:** React 19+ (Server Components), Tailwind CSS 4.0+
- **Backend/Auth:** Firebase Suite (Auth, Firestore, Storage)
- **State Management:** TanStack Query
- **Date/Time:** Day.js (Fuseau: America/Martinique)

## Schéma de Données (Firestore)
- `users`: { uid, name, email, role: admin|moniteur|client, phone }
- `courts`: { id, name, type: Quick/Terre, is_active }
- `reservations`: { id, court_id, user_id, start_time, end_time, type, status }
- `slots_moniteurs`: { id, moniteur_id, start_time, end_time, available }

## Design & UI
- **Thème:** Professionnel, sportif, épuré.
- **Palette:**
  - Primaire: Vert Court (extrait de l'image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_1}})
  - Secondaire: Ocre (Terre battue)
  - **INTERDICTION:** Pas de rose.
- **Composants clés:** Cards pour les cours, Time-grid interactive pour les réservations.

## Flux Utilisateurs
1. **Client:** Réservation de court (1h), vue calendrier filtrable.
2. **Moniteur:** Gestion d'agenda, définition de créneaux, liste de participants.
3. **Admin:** Supervision, blocage de courts (maintenance/événements), gestion utilisateurs.

# Script de Data Seeding - Tennis Club du François

Ce script est conçu pour être exécuté dans votre environnement de développement pour peupler la **Firebase Emulator Suite** avec des données de test réalistes.

---

### 1. Script de Seeding (`src/scripts/seedData.js`)

```javascript
import { db } from '../firebase.config';
import { collection, doc, writeBatch, timestamp } from "firebase/firestore";
import dayjs from 'dayjs';

export const seedDatabase = async () => {
  const batch = writeBatch(db);

  // --- 1. COURTS (6 Terrains) ---
  const courts = [
    { id: "1", name: "Court 01", type: "Quick", is_active: true, surface: "Hard" },
    { id: "2", name: "Court 02", type: "Quick", is_active: true, surface: "Hard" },
    { id: "3", name: "Court 03", type: "Quick", is_active: true, surface: "Hard" },
    { id: "4", name: "Court 04", type: "Quick", is_active: true, surface: "Hard" },
    { id: "5", name: "Court 05", type: "Terre", is_active: true, surface: "Clay" },
    { id: "6", name: "Court 06", type: "Terre", is_active: true, surface: "Clay" },
  ];

  courts.forEach(court => {
    const ref = doc(db, "courts", court.id);
    batch.set(ref, court);
  });

  // --- 2. UTILISATEURS DE TEST ---
  const users = [
    { uid: "admin_1", name: "Admin Martinique", role: "admin", email: "admin@tennis.mq" },
    { uid: "moniteur_1", name: "Jean Dupont", role: "moniteur", email: "j.dupont@tennis.mq" },
    { uid: "client_1", name: "Julian Marc", role: "client", email: "julian@client.mq" }
  ];

  users.forEach(user => {
    const ref = doc(db, "users", user.uid);
    batch.set(ref, user);
  });

  // --- 3. RÉSERVATIONS DE TEST (Aujourd'hui) ---
  const today = dayjs().startOf('day');
  const reservations = [
    {
      court_id: "1",
      user_id: "client_1",
      start_time: today.add(10, 'hour').toISOString(), // 10:00
      end_time: today.add(11, 'hour').toISOString(),
      type: "location_libre",
      status: "confirmed"
    },
    {
      court_id: "5",
      user_id: "moniteur_1",
      start_time: today.add(14, 'hour').toISOString(), // 14:00
      end_time: today.add(15, 'hour').toISOString(),
      type: "cours_collectif",
      status: "confirmed"
    }
  ];

  reservations.forEach((res, index) => {
    const ref = doc(collection(db, "reservations"));
    batch.set(ref, { ...res, id: `res_test_${index}` });
  });

  try {
    await batch.commit();
    console.log("✅ Émulateurs peuplés avec succès !");
    return true;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("❌ Erreur lors du seeding :", error);
    return false;
  }
};
```

---

### 2. Comment l'utiliser ?
Vous pouvez appeler cette fonction `seedDatabase()` dans un bouton caché de votre interface de développement ou via un script Node si vous utilisez l'admin SDK.

---

### 3. Schéma récapitulatif des collections
- **`courts`** : Référence des 6 terrains.
- **`users`** : Profils avec rôles pour la sécurité (Rules).
- **`reservations`** : Le flux utilisé par `onSnapshot` dans vos composants UI.


````

````
# Comprehensive PRD Analysis: Tennis Club du François - Martinique

## Executive Summary

This is a complete tennis club management system with **3 distinct user roles** (Admin, Moniteur/Instructor, Client), featuring **8 major views/pages** with real-time Firebase integration, built with a sophisticated design system inspired by "The Modern Clay Court" aesthetic.

---

## 1. USER ROLES & ACCESS

### **Admin (Administrator)**
- Full system oversight
- Court management & maintenance scheduling
- User directory management
- Real-time utilization analytics
- Block court functionality

### **Moniteur (Instructor/Coach)**
- Personal schedule management
- Define teaching slots (private/group)
- View student rosters
- Weekly availability calendar
- Session management

### **Client (Member/Guest)**
- Court booking
- View availability
- Manage reservations
- View pricing & facilities

---

## 2. VIEWS & PAGES BREAKDOWN

### **2.1 Landing Page (bienvenue_au_tennis_club_du_fran_ois)**
**Purpose:** Public-facing marketing & conversion page

**Components:**
- **Top Navigation Bar:** Logo, Home/Court Booking/Pricing links, Notifications, Account
- **Hero Section:** Full-width imagery, tagline "PRECISION ON THE CLAY", CTAs (Register now, View Brackets)
- **Live Availability Grid:** 6 courts with real-time status (Open/Occupied/Reserved), next slot times, surface types
- **Facilities Bento Grid:** 
  - Panoramic Clubhouse (large feature card)
  - The Baseline Bistro (restaurant)
  - Night Play (LED lighting)
  - Pro Coaching (certified instructors)
- **Pricing Section:** 3 tiers
  - Morning Sessions (06:00-10:00): €25/hour
  - Prime Time (16:00-22:00): €45/hour - marked "Popular"
  - Weekend Pass (Sat-Sun): €35/hour
- **Footer:** Links, timezone info (America/Martinique)
- **Mobile Bottom Nav:** Home, Courts, History, Profile

**Court Inventory:**
| Court | Name | Surface |
|-------|------|---------|
| 01 | Premium Clay | Red Clay |
| 02 | Center Stage | Red Clay |
| 03 | Shadow View | Green Hard |
| 04 | Training Zone | Red Clay |
| 05 | Junior Court | Red Clay |
| 06 | West End | Red Clay |

---

### **2.2 Admin Dashboard - Real-time Supervision (dashboard_admin_dynamique_supervision_temps_r_el)**
**Purpose:** Command center with live Firebase data

**Key Features:**
- **Live Clock:** America/Martinique timezone with second-by-second updates
- **Court Utilization Trends Chart:** Real-time bar chart (06:00-21:00), auto-calculates peak hours
- **Block Court Form:** Emergency maintenance scheduling with court selection and end time
- **Court Deployment Grid:** 6 courts with toggle switches for active/maintenance status
- **User Directory Table:** Searchable, filterable member list with:
  - Name, Email, Role badges (Admin/Moniteur/Client)
  - Online/Away/Inactive status indicators
  - Action menus per user

**Firebase Collections Used:**
- `reservations` - for utilization graph
- `courts` - for court status toggles
- `users` - for directory

**Actions:**
- Add User button
- New Maintenance button
- Toggle court status (active ↔ maintenance)
- Confirm lockout for blocked courts

---

### **2.3 Admin Dashboard - Supervision & Gestion (dashboard_admin_supervision_gestion)**
**Purpose:** Static management view (similar to above but with mock data)

**Additional Elements:**
- **Summary Cards:** Active Bookings (14), Maintenance (01), Available Slots (32)
- **Interactive Court Grid Calendar:** Time-based reservation view
  - 6 courts × 8 time slots (08:00-15:00)
  - Color-coded: Primary (Quick courts 1-4), Secondary (Terre courts 5-6)
  - Maintenance slots shown with construction icon
- **Upcoming Reservations List:** Card-based view with:
  - Court number & surface type
  - Customer name
  - Session type (Individual/Doubles/Training/Tournament)
  - Status (Confirmed/Pending Payment)
- **Club Maintenance Note:** Announcement banner for court closures
- **Location Map:** Embedded map with animated marker (Anse Mitan, Les Trois-Îlets)

---

### **2.4 Client Dashboard - Real-time Reservations (dashboard_client_dynamique_r_servations_temps_r_el)**
**Purpose:** Member booking interface with live availability

**Key Features:**
- **Hero Section:** "Elite Court Reservations" with New Booking and Tournaments CTAs
- **Stats Cards:** Active Bookings, Maintenance count, Available Slots (dynamically updated)
- **Interactive Court Grid:**
  - Time slots: 08:00-15:00
  - Courts labeled with surface type (QUICK/TERRE)
  - Clickable cells for booking
  - Skeleton loader with pulse animation during data fetch
- **Upcoming Today List:** Personal reservation cards
- **Club Insights Section:** Maintenance announcements, location map
- **Floating Action Button (FAB):** Quick "Add" button for new booking

**Firebase Logic:**
- Mock `onSnapshot` listener for real-time updates
- Date-based filtering
- Court availability checking function

---

### **2.5 Client Dashboard - Reservation (dashboard_client_r_servation)**
**Purpose:** Static reservation view (similar to above with populated data)

**Sample Reservation Data:**
| Time | Court | Customer | Type | Status |
|------|-------|----------|------|--------|
| 08:00 | Court 1 | D. Miller | Individual | Confirmed |
| 08:00 | Court 3 | S. Chen | Doubles | Confirmed |
| 08:00 | Court 6 | L. Dubois | Training | Confirmed |
| 09:00 | Court 4 | M. Rossi | Individual | Confirmed |
| 09:00 | Court 5 | G. Leclaire | Individual | Confirmed |
| 10:00 | Court 4 | B. Smith | Training | Confirmed |
| 11:00 | Court 5 | Jean-Pierre Belmondo | Training | Confirmed |
| 12:30 | Court 1 | Elena Rodriguez | Doubles | Confirmed |
| 14:00 | Court 3 | Marcus Aurelius | Tournament | Pending Payment |

---

### **2.6 Moniteur Dashboard - Agenda & Cours (dashboard_moniteur_agenda_cours)**
**Purpose:** Instructor's daily schedule view

**Key Features:**
- **Weekly Calendar View:** 7-day grid (Mon-Sun) with session blocks
  - Color-coded: Primary (PRO sessions), Secondary (GROUP sessions)
  - Time ranges displayed on blocks
  - "Add" slots for empty periods
- **Upcoming Lessons List:**
  - Lesson cards with time, duration, type badges
  - Session title and description
  - Participant avatars with count (+N more)
  - Court assignment (Court 04 • Clay)
- **Define New Slot Panel:**
  - Time range picker (Start/End)
  - Session type toggle (PRIVATE/GROUP)
  - Court preference dropdown
  - Publish Availability button
- **Participants Preview:** Next session roster with:
  - Profile photos
  - Skill level (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced)
  - Confirmation status
- **Club Efficiency Stats:** Occupancy percentage, student count, growth metrics

---

### **2.7 Moniteur Dashboard - Dynamic Agenda Management (dashboard_moniteur_dynamique_gestion_d_agenda)**
**Purpose:** Enhanced instructor dashboard with Firebase integration

**Additional Features:**
- **Real-time Slot Loading:** Dynamic weekly grid population from `slots_moniteurs` collection
- **Form Submission Logic:**
  - Saves to `slots_moniteurs` with moniteurId
  - Fields: date, startTime, endTime, type, courtId, status, createdAt
  - UI feedback (Publishing... → Success alert)
- **Session Type Toggle:** Visual button state management
- **Real-time Reservation Listener:** Filters by moniteurId AND type IN ['cours_collectif', 'cours_private']
- **Mobile Navigation:** 5-tab bottom bar (Dashboard, Calendar, Add FAB, Students, Account)

**Data Structure for Slots:**
```javascript
{
  moniteurId: "moniteur_001",
  date: "2023-10-27",
  startTime: "14:00",
  endTime: "15:30",
  type: "PRIVATE" | "GROUP",
  courtId: "court_01" | "any",
  status: "available",
  createdAt: "ISO timestamp"
}
```

---

## 3. DESIGN SYSTEM (grand_slam_martinique/DESIGN.md)

### **Creative North Star:** "The Modern Clay Court"
- Editorial, sophisticated experience
- Asymmetrical layouts with tectonic layering
- "No-line" philosophy - boundaries via color shifts, not borders

### **Color Palette:**
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| primary | #006b3f | Court Green |
| secondary | #9d431b | Clay Ocre |
| primary_container | #008751 | Lighter green |
| primary_fixed | #8df8b7 | Accent green |
| primary_fixed_dim | #70db9d | Background accents |
| secondary_fixed | #ffdbce | Light ocre |
| secondary_container | #fe8c5e | Vibrant ocre |
| tertiary | #9d3d43 | Accent red |
| surface | #f5fbf3 | Base layer |
| surface_container_low | #f0f5ee | Secondary sections |
| surface_container_lowest | #ffffff | Cards |
| surface_container_highest | #dee4dd | Interactive elements |
| on-surface | #171d19 | Text |
| outline_variant | #bdcabe | Subtle borders (15% opacity) |

### **Typography:**
- **Headlines:** Lexend (geometric, athletic precision)
- **Body:** Work Sans (legible grotesque)
- Scale: display-lg (3.5rem) to label-sm

### **Key Design Rules:**
1. **No-Line Rule:** No 1px solid borders; use background color shifts
2. **Glassmorphism:** Semi-transparent surfaces with 12-20px backdrop-blur
3. **Gradient CTAs:** primary → primary_container at 135°
4. **Tonal Layering:** Depth via color tiers, not shadows
5. **Timezone Display:** All times show "America/Martinique" context

### **Component Specifications:**
- **Buttons:** Primary (gradient), Secondary (ocre ghost), Tertiary (underline)
- **Cards:** Asymmetrical grid sizes, no dividers
- **Selection Chips:** rounded-full, primary when selected
- **Input Fields:** surface-container-lowest fill, 2px primary bottom-bar on focus

### **Prohibitions:**
- No pink/magenta shades
- No standard Material Design cards with heavy shadows
- No 1px dividers between list items

---

## 4. FIREBASE DATA MODEL

### **Collections:**

**`courts`**
```javascript
{
  id: "court_01",
  number: 1,
  name: "Grand Court East",
  status: "active" | "maintenance",
  surface: "Quick" | "Terre",
  image: "url"
}
```

**`reservations`**
```javascript
{
  courtId: "court_01",
  type: "Individual" | "Doubles" | "Training" | "Tournament" | "maintenance",
  startTime: Timestamp,
  endTime: Timestamp,
  title: "Customer Name",
  status: "confirmed" | "pending",
  moniteurId: "moniteur_001" (for lessons)
}
```

**`slots_moniteurs`**
```javascript
{
  moniteurId: "moniteur_001",
  date: "YYYY-MM-DD",
  startTime: "HH:MM",
  endTime: "HH:MM",
  type: "PRIVATE" | "GROUP",
  courtId: "court_01" | "any",
  status: "available" | "booked",
  createdAt: "ISO timestamp"
}
```

**`users`**
```javascript
{
  id: "user_001",
  name: "Jean Dupont",
  email: "j.dupont@tennis.mq",
  role: "Admin" | "Moniteur" | "Client",
  status: "online" | "away" | "inactive",
  avatar: "url"
}
```

---

## 5. USER FLOWS

### **Admin Flow:**
1. View real-time utilization dashboard
2. Monitor court deployment status
3. Block court for maintenance → Select court → Set end time → Confirm lockout
4. Manage users → Search/filter → View details → Edit via action menu

### **Moniteur Flow:**
1. View weekly availability calendar
2. Define new slot → Select date/time → Choose type (Private/Group) → Select court preference → Publish
3. View upcoming lessons → See participant list → Check student levels
4. Real-time sync updates schedule automatically

### **Client Flow:**
1. View landing page → Check live availability
2. Navigate to dashboard → View interactive court grid
3. Click available slot → Book court → Receive confirmation
4. View upcoming reservations → Check status (Confirmed/Pending)

---

## 6. TECHNICAL STACK

- **Frontend:** HTML5, Tailwind CSS (with custom config), Vanilla JavaScript
- **Backend:** Firebase (Firestore)
- **Fonts:** Lexend (headlines), Work Sans (body), Material Symbols Outlined (icons)
- **Responsive:** Mobile-first with bottom nav for mobile, sidebar for desktop
- **Real-time:** Firebase onSnapshot listeners
- **Timezone:** America/Martinique (AST) throughout

---

| Client Static | `/Users/mathieu/StudioProjects/web_tennis/stitch_prd_tennis_club_du_fran_ois/dashboard_client_r_servation/code.html` |
````

```diff
# Tennis Club du François - Technical Documentation

## Project Overview
Progressive Web App (PWA) for managing and booking tennis courts at the municipal tennis club of Le François, Martinique.

**Three User Roles:**
- **Admin**: Full system oversight, court management, user directory, analytics
- **Moniteur (Instructor)**: Schedule management, lesson slots, student rosters
- **Client (Member)**: Court booking, availability viewing, reservation management

---

## Documentation Index

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [01_PROJECT_SETUP.md](./01_PROJECT_SETUP.md) | Environment setup, dependencies, Firebase configuration |
| [02_DATA_MODEL.md](./02_DATA_MODEL.md) | Firestore schema, collections, indexes, relationships |
| [03_FIREBASE_RULES.md](./03_FIREBASE_RULES.md) | Security rules by user role |
| [04_SERVICES.md](./04_SERVICES.md) | Backend services (reservation, user, court, slot) |
| [05_COMPONENTS.md](./05_COMPONENTS.md) | React component architecture and hierarchy |
| [06_ROUTING.md](./06_ROUTING.md) | React Router v6.4+ structure, protected routes |
| [07_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md](./07_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md) | Tailwind config, colors, typography, components |
| [08_USER_FLOWS.md](./08_USER_FLOWS.md) | Feature specifications by role |
| [09_TESTING.md](./09_TESTING.md) | Testing strategy, emulator workflow |
| [10_TODO_LIST.md](./10_TODO_LIST.md) | Complete 0-100% implementation roadmap |

---

## Quick Reference

### Firebase Emulator Suite
- **Firestore Emulator**: `localhost:8080`
- **Auth Emulator**: `http://localhost:9099`
- **Environment Variable**: `VITE_USE_EMULATOR=true`

### Timezone
All times use **America/Martinique** (AST, UTC-4)

### Core Collections
- `users` - User profiles with roles
- `courts` - Court inventory (6 courts)
- `reservations` - Court bookings
- `slots_moniteurs` - Instructor availability slots

### Key Technologies
- React 19+ with Server Components
- TypeScript (strict mode)
- Tailwind CSS 4.0+
- Firebase Emulator Suite
- React Router v6.4+
- Day.js for date/time handling

```

````json
{
  "content": "# 01. Project Setup\n\n## 1. Prerequisites\n\n### Required Software\n- **Node.js**: v20.x or higher\n- **npm**: v10.x or higher\n- **Java**: v11 or higher (for Firebase Emulator Suite)\n- **Git**: Latest version\n\n### Firebase Project\n1. Create a Firebase project at [console.firebase.google.com](https://console.firebase.google.com)\n2. Project ID: `tennis-francois`\n3. Enable **Firestore Database**\n4. Enable **Authentication** (Email/Password provider)\n5. Install Firebase CLI: `npm install -g firebase-tools`\n\n---\n\n## 2. Project Initialization\n\n### Step 1: Create React + TypeScript Project\n```bash\nnpm create vite@latest tennis-club-app -- --template react-ts\ncd tennis-club-app\nnpm install\n```\n\n### Step 2: Install Dependencies\n```bash\n# Core dependencies\nnpm install firebase dayjs react-router-dom @tanstack/react-query\n\n# Development dependencies\nnpm install -D @types/node typescript tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer firebase-tools\n```\n\n### Step 3: Initialize Firebase\n```bash\nfirebase login\nfirebase init firestore\nfirebase init auth\nfirebase init emulators\n```\n\n### Step 4: Initialize Tailwind CSS\n```bash\nnpx tailwindcss init -p\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. Project Structure\n\n```\ntennis-club-app/\n├── public/\n│   ├── favicon.ico\n│   └── manifest.json          # PWA manifest\n├── src/\n│   ├── components/            # Reusable UI components\n│   │   ├── common/            # Generic components (Button, Card, Input)\n│   │   ├── layout/            # Layout components (Navbar, Sidebar, Footer)\n│   │   ├── courts/            # Court-related components\n│   │   ├── reservations/      # Reservation components\n│   │   ├── users/             # User management components\n│   │   └── slots/             # Instructor slot components\n│   ├── pages/                 # Page components (route-level)\n│   │   ├── LandingPage.tsx\n│   │   ├── admin/             # Admin dashboard pages\n│   │   ├── client/            # Client dashboard pages\n│   │   └── moniteur/          # Instructor dashboard pages\n│   ├── services/              # Firebase service layer\n│   │   ├── reservationService.ts\n│   │   ├── userService.ts\n│   │   ├── courtService.ts\n│   │   └── slotService.ts\n│   ├── hooks/                 # Custom React hooks\n│   │   ├── useAuth.ts\n│   │   ├── useReservations.ts\n│   │   ├── useCourts.ts\n│   │   └── useUserProfile.ts\n│   ├── contexts/              # React contexts\n│   │   └── AuthContext.tsx\n│   ├── config/                # Configuration files\n│   │   └── firebase.config.ts\n│   ├── types/                 # TypeScript type definitions\n│   │   ├── user.types.ts\n│   │   ├── court.types.ts\n│   │   ├── reservation.types.ts\n│   │   └── slot.types.ts\n│   ├── utils/                 # Utility functions\n│   │   ├── timezone.ts\n│   │   └── formatters.ts\n│   ├── App.tsx\n│   ├── main.tsx\n│   └── index.css\n├── firebase.json              # Firebase configuration\n├── firestore.rules            # Firestore security rules\n├── .firebaserc                # Firebase project aliases\n├── .env                       # Environment variables\n├── .env.example               # Environment variables template\n├── tailwind.config.js         # Tailwind configuration\n├── tsconfig.json              # TypeScript configuration\n└── package.json\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. Environment Configuration\n\n### `.env` File\nCreate a `.env` file at the project root:\n\n```env\n# Firebase Configuration\nVITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=your_api_key_here\nVITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=tennis-francois.firebaseapp.com\nVITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=tennis-francois\nVITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=tennis-francois.appspot.com\nVITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=your_sender_id\nVITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=your_app_id\n\n# Emulator Configuration\nVITE_USE_EMULATOR=true\nVITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080\nVITE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=http://localhost:9099\n\n# Application Configuration\nVITE_TIMEZONE=America/Martinique\nVITE_APP_NAME=Tennis Club du François\n```\n\n### `.env.example` Template\n```env\n# Firebase Configuration (Get these from Firebase Console)\nVITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=\nVITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=\nVITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=\nVITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=\nVITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=\nVITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=\n\n# Emulator Configuration\nVITE_USE_EMULATOR=true\nVITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080\nVITE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=http://localhost:9099\n\n# Application Configuration\nVITE_TIMEZONE=America/Martinique\nVITE_APP_NAME=Tennis Club du François\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. Firebase Configuration\n\n### `src/config/firebase.config.ts`\n```typescript\nimport { initializeApp } from \"firebase/app\";\nimport { getFirestore, connectFirestoreEmulator } from \"firebase/firestore\";\nimport { getAuth, connectAuthEmulator } from \"firebase/auth\";\n\nconst firebaseConfig = {\n  apiKey: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY,\n  authDomain: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN,\n  projectId: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID,\n  storageBucket: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET,\n  messagingSenderId: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID,\n  appId: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID\n};\n\n// Initialize Firebase\nconst app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig);\n\n// Initialize services\nconst db = getFirestore(app);\nconst auth = getAuth(app);\n\n// Connect to emulators in development mode\nif (import.meta.env.VITE_USE_EMULATOR === 'true') {\n  connectFirestoreEmulator(db, 'localhost', 8080);\n  connectAuthEmulator(auth, \"http://localhost:9099\");\n  console.log(\"🛠️ Connected to Firebase Emulators\");\n}\n\nexport { db, auth };\n```\n\n---\n\n## 6. Firebase Emulator Suite Configuration\n\n### `firebase.json`\n```json\n{\n  \"firestore\": {\n    \"rules\": \"firestore.rules\",\n    \"indexes\": \"firestore.indexes.json\"\n  },\n  \"emulators\": {\n    \"auth\": {\n      \"port\": 9099\n    },\n    \"firestore\": {\n      \"port\": 8080\n    },\n    \"ui\": {\n      \"enabled\": true,\n      \"port\": 4000\n    }\n  },\n  \"hosting\": {\n    \"public\": \"dist\",\n    \"ignore\": [\"firebase.json\", \"**/.*\", \"**/node_modules/**\"],\n    \"rewrites\": [\n      {\n        \"source\": \"**\",\n        \"destination\": \"/index.html\"\n      }\n    ]\n  }\n}\n```\n\n### `firestore.indexes.json`\n```json\n{\n  \"indexes\": [\n    {\n      \"collectionGroup\": \"reservations\",\n      \"queryScope\": \"COLLECTION\",\n      \"fields\": [\n        { \"fieldPath\": \"court_id\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n        { \"fieldPath\": \"start_time\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      \"collectionGroup\": \"reservations\",\n      \"queryScope\": \"COLLECTION\",\n      \"fields\": [\n        { \"fieldPath\": \"user_id\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n        { \"fieldPath\": \"start_time\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      \"collectionGroup\": \"slots_moniteurs\",\n      \"queryScope\": \"COLLECTION\",\n      \"fields\": [\n        { \"fieldPath\": \"moniteur_id\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n        { \"fieldPath\": \"date\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 7. Tailwind CSS Configuration\n\n### `tailwind.config.js`\n```javascript\n/** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config} */\nexport default {\n  content: [\n    \"./index.html\",\n ````diff
````
````diff
# 01. Project Setup

## 1. Prerequisites

### Required Software
- **Node.js**: v20.x or higher
- **npm**: v10.x or higher
- **Java**: v11 or higher (for Firebase Emulator Suite)
- **Git**: Latest version

### Firebase Project
1. Create a Firebase project at [console.firebase.google.com](https://console.firebase.google.com)
2. Project ID: `tennis-francois`
3. Enable **Firestore Database**
4. Enable **Authentication** (Email/Password provider)
5. Install Firebase CLI: `npm install -g firebase-tools`

---

## 2. Project Initialization

### Step 1: Create React + TypeScript Project
```bash
npm create vite@latest tennis-club-app -- --template react-ts
cd tennis-club-app
npm install
```

### Step 2: Install Dependencies
```bash
# Core dependencies
npm install firebase dayjs react-router-dom @tanstack/react-query

# Development dependencies
npm install -D @types/node typescript tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer firebase-tools
```

### Step 3: Initialize Firebase
```bash
firebase login
firebase init firestore
firebase init auth
firebase init emulators
```

### Step 4: Initialize Tailwind CSS
```bash
npx tailwindcss init -p
```

---

## 3. Project Structure

```
tennis-club-app/
├── public/
│   ├── favicon.ico
│   └── manifest.json          # PWA manifest
├── src/
│   ├── components/            # Reusable UI components
│   │   ├── common/            # Generic components (Button, Card, Input)
│   │   ├── layout/            # Layout components (Navbar, Sidebar, Footer)
│   │   ├── courts/            # Court-related components
│   │   ├── reservations/      # Reservation components
│   │   ├── users/             # User management components
│   │   └── slots/             # Instructor slot components
│   ├── pages/                 # Page components (route-level)
│   │   ├── LandingPage.tsx
│   │   ├── admin/             # Admin dashboard pages
│   │   ├── client/            # Client dashboard pages
│   │   └── moniteur/          # Instructor dashboard pages
│   ├── services/              # Firebase service layer
│   │   ├── reservationService.ts
│   │   ├── userService.ts
│   │   ├── courtService.ts
│   │   └── slotService.ts
│   ├── hooks/                 # Custom React hooks
│   │   ├── useAuth.ts
│   │   ├── useReservations.ts
│   │   ├── useCourts.ts
│   │   └── useUserProfile.ts
│   ├── contexts/              # React contexts
│   │   └── AuthContext.tsx
│   ├── config/                # Configuration files
│   │   └── firebase.config.ts
│   ├── types/                 # TypeScript type definitions
│   │   ├── user.types.ts
│   │   ├── court.types.ts
│   │   ├── reservation.types.ts
│   │   └── slot.types.ts
│   ├── utils/                 # Utility functions
│   │   ├── timezone.ts
│   │   └── formatters.ts
│   ├── App.tsx
│   ├── main.tsx
│   └── index.css
├── firebase.json              # Firebase configuration
├── firestore.rules            # Firestore security rules
├── .firebaserc                # Firebase project aliases
├── .env                       # Environment variables
├── .env.example               # Environment variables template
├── tailwind.config.js         # Tailwind configuration
├── tsconfig.json              # TypeScript configuration
└── package.json
```

---

## 4. Environment Configuration

### `.env` File
Create a `.env` file at the project root:

```env
# Firebase Configuration
VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=your_api_key_here
VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=tennis-francois.firebaseapp.com
VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=tennis-francois
VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=tennis-francois.appspot.com
VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=your_sender_id
VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=your_app_id

# Emulator Configuration
VITE_USE_EMULATOR=true
VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080
VITE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=http://localhost:9099

# Application Configuration
VITE_TIMEZONE=America/Martinique
VITE_APP_NAME=Tennis Club du François
```

### `.env.example` Template
```env
# Firebase Configuration (Get these from Firebase Console)
VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=
VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=
VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=
VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=
VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=
VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=

# Emulator Configuration
VITE_USE_EMULATOR=true
VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080
VITE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=http://localhost:9099

# Application Configuration
VITE_TIMEZONE=America/Martinique
VITE_APP_NAME=Tennis Club du François
```

---

## 5. Firebase Configuration

### `src/config/firebase.config.ts`
```typescript
import { initializeApp } from "firebase/app";
import { getFirestore, connectFirestoreEmulator } from "firebase/firestore";
import { getAuth, connectAuthEmulator } from "firebase/auth";

const firebaseConfig = {
  apiKey: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY,
  authDomain: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN,
  projectId: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID,
  storageBucket: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET,
  messagingSenderId: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID,
  appId: import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID
};

// Initialize Firebase
const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig);

// Initialize services
const db = getFirestore(app);
const auth = getAuth(app);

// Connect to emulators in development mode
if (import.meta.env.VITE_USE_EMULATOR === 'true') {
  connectFirestoreEmulator(db, 'localhost', 8080);
  connectAuthEmulator(auth, "http://localhost:9099");
  console.log("🛠️ Connected to Firebase Emulators");
}

export { db, auth };
```

---

## 6. Firebase Emulator Suite Configuration

### `firebase.json`
```json
{
  "firestore": {
    "rules": "firestore.rules",
    "indexes": "firestore.indexes.json"
  },
  "emulators": {
    "auth": {
      "port": 9099
    },
    "firestore": {
      "port": 8080
    },
    "ui": {
      "enabled": true,
      "port": 4000
    }
  },
  "hosting": {
    "public": "dist",
    "ignore": ["firebase.json", "**/.*", "**/node_modules/**"],
    "rewrites": [
      {
        "source": "**",
        "destination": "/index.html"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

### `firestore.indexes.json`
```json
{
  "indexes": [
    {
      "collectionGroup": "reservations",
      "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
      "fields": [
        { "fieldPath": "court_id", "order": "ASCENDING" },
        { "fieldPath": "start_time", "order": "ASCENDING" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "collectionGroup": "reservations",
      "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
      "fields": [
        { "fieldPath": "user_id", "order": "ASCENDING" },
        { "fieldPath": "start_time", "order": "ASCENDING" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "collectionGroup": "slots_moniteurs",
      "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
      "fields": [
        { "fieldPath": "moniteur_id", "order": "ASCENDING" },
        { "fieldPath": "date", "order": "ASCENDING" }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### `src/index.css`
```css
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lexend:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Work+Sans:wght@400;500;600&display=swap');

@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

@layer base {
  html {
    font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif;
    background-color: #f5fbf3;
    color: #171d19;
  }

  h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
    font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
  }
}

@layer components {
  .btn-primary {
    @apply bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-primary-container 
           text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg 
           hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity duration-200;
  }

  .btn-secondary {
    @apply bg-secondary-container/10 text-secondary 
           font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg 
           hover:bg-secondary-container/20 transition-colors duration-200;
  }

  .card-surface {
    @apply bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-6;
  }
}
```

## 8. TypeScript Configuration

### `tsconfig.json`
```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["ES2020", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "strict": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"],
      "@components/*": ["./src/components/*"],
      "@services/*": ["./src/services/*"],
      "@hooks/*": ["./src/hooks/*"],
      "@types/*": ["./src/types/*"],
      "@utils/*": ["./src/utils/*"],
      "@config/*": ["./src/config/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["src"],
  "references": [{ "path": "./tsconfig.node.json" }]
}
```

---

## 9. Development Commands

### Start Firebase Emulators
```bash
firebase emulators:start
```

### Start Development Server
```bash
npm run dev
```

### Run Both (Recommended)
```bash
# Terminal 1: Firebase Emulators
firebase emulators:start

# Terminal 2: Vite Dev Server
npm run dev
```

### Build for Production
```bash
npm run build
```

### Deploy to Firebase Hosting
```bash
npm run build
firebase deploy --only hosting
```

### Seed Emulator Data
```bash
# Create a seed script and run it via browser console or:
node src/scripts/seedData.js
```

---

## 10. Firebase Emulator UI

Access the Firebase Emulator UI at: **http://localhost:4000**

Features:
- **Firestore**: View collections, documents, and real-time updates
- **Authentication**: Manage test users
- **Logs**: Monitor all emulator activity

---

## 11. Troubleshooting

### Java Not Found
```bash
# macOS
brew install openjdk@11

# Windows
# Download from https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/javase/jdk11-archive-downloads.html
```

### Port Already in Use
```bash
# Kill process on port 8080 (macOS)
lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9

# Kill process on port 9099
lsof -ti:9099 | xargs kill -9
```

### Emulator Not Starting
```bash
# Clear emulator data
firebase emulators:export ./emulator-data
firebase emulators:start --import=./emulator-data
```

---

After completing setup:
1. ✅ Verify Firebase Emulator Suite is running
2. ✅ Confirm environment variables are loaded
3. ✅ Test Firebase connection in browser console
4. 📖 Proceed to [02_DATA_MODEL.md](./02_DATA_MODEL.md)
````

### Tool: WriteFile: Writing to documentation/02_DATA_MODEL.md
**Status**: completed

**Input:**
````json
{
  "content": "# 02. Data Model\n\n## Firestore Database Schema\n\nThis document defines the complete data model for the Tennis Club du François application.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Collections Overview\n\n| Collection | Description | Read Access | Write Access |\n|------------|-------------|-------------|--------------|\n| `users` | User profiles and roles | Authenticated users | Admin only |\n| `courts` | Court inventory and status | Public | Admin only |\n| `reservations` | Court bookings and events | Authenticated users | Authenticated users (create), Admin/Owner (update/delete) |\n| `slots_moniteurs` | Instructor availability slots | Authenticated users | Moniteur (own), Admin (all) |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Collection Details\n\n### 2.1 `users` Collection\n\nUser profiles with role-based access control.\n\n#### Document Structure\n```typescript\ninterface User {\n  uid: string;                    // Firebase Auth UID (also document ID)\n  name: string;                   // Full name\n  email: string;                  // Email address (unique)\n  role: UserRole;                 // User role\n  phone?: string;                 // Phone number\n  status: UserStatus;             // Online/Away/Inactive\n  avatar?: string;                // Profile picture URL\n  createdAt: Timestamp;           // Account creation date\n  updatedAt: Timestamp;           // Last profile update\n  lastLoginAt?: Timestamp;        // Last login timestamp\n}\n\ntype UserRole = 'admin' | 'moniteur' | 'client';\ntype UserStatus = 'online' | 'away' | 'inactive';\n```\n\n#### Example Document\n```javascript\n// Path: users/admin_001\n{\n  uid: \"admin_001\",\n  name: \"Admin Martinique\",\n  email: \"admin@tennis.mq\",\n  role: \"admin\",\n  phone: \"+596 696 12 34 56\",\n  status: \"online\",\n  avatar: \"https://storage.googleapis.com/...\",\n  createdAt: Timestamp(2024-01-01T00:00:00Z),\n  updatedAt: Timestamp(2024-01-15T10:30:00Z),\n  lastLoginAt: Timestamp(2024-01-15T08:00:00Z)\n}\n```\n\n#### Indexes\n```json\n{\n  \"collectionGroup\": \"users\",\n  \"fields\": [\n    { \"fieldPath\": \"role\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n    { \"fieldPath\": \"status\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n#### Queries\n```typescript\n// Get all users with role\nquery(collection(db, \"users\"), where(\"role\", \"==\", \"moniteur\"));\n\n// Get active users\nquery(collection(db, \"users\"), where(\"status\", \"==\", \"online\"));\n\n// Search by email (requires composite index)\nquery(collection(db, \"users\"), where(\"email\", \"==\", email));\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2.2 `courts` Collection\n\nCourt inventory with surface type and availability status.\n\n#### Document Structure\n```typescript\ninterface Court {\n  id: string;                     // Document ID (court_01, court_02, etc.)\n  number: number;                 // Court number (1-6)\n  name: string;                   // Display name\n  type: CourtType;                // Surface category\n  surface: SurfaceType;           // Detailed surface description\n  status: CourtStatus;            // Current status\n  is_active: boolean;             // Availability toggle\n  image?: string;                 // Court photo URL\n  description?: string;           // Optional description\n  createdAt: Timestamp;           // Creation date\n  updatedAt: Timestamp;           // Last update\n}\n\ntype CourtType = 'Quick' | 'Terre';\ntype SurfaceType = 'Hard' | 'Clay' | 'Grass' | 'Synthetic';\ntype CourtStatus = 'active' | 'maintenance' | 'closed';\n```\n\n#### Example Documents\n```javascript\n// Path: courts/court_01\n{\n  id: \"court_01\",\n  number: 1,\n  name: \"Grand Court East\",\n  type: \"Quick\",\n  surface: \"Hard\",\n  status: \"active\",\n  is_active: true,\n  image: \"https://storage.googleapis.com/tennis-francois/courts/court_01.jpg\",\n  description: \"Premium hard court with professional lighting\",\n  createdAt: Timestamp(2024-01-01T00:00:00Z),\n  updatedAt: Timestamp(2024-01-15T10:00:00Z)\n}\n\n// Path: courts/court_05\n{\n  id: \"court_05\",\n  number: 5,\n  name: \"Clay Court North\",\n  type: \"Terre\",\n  surface: \"Clay\",\n  status: \"active\",\n  is_active: true,\n  image: \"https://storage.googleapis.com/tennis-francois/courts/court_05.jpg\",\n  description: \"Traditional red clay court\",\n  createdAt: Timestamp(2024-01-01T00:00:00Z),\n  updatedAt: Timestamp(2024-01-15T10:00:00Z)\n}\n```\n\n#### Default Courts (6 Courts)\n| ID | Number | Name | Type | Surface |\n|----|--------|------|------|---------|\n| court_01 | 1 | Grand Court East | Quick | Hard |\n| court_02 | 2 | Center Stage | Quick | Hard |\n| court_03 | 3 | Shadow View | Quick | Hard |\n| court_04 | 4 | Training Zone | Quick | Hard |\n| court_05 | 5 | Clay Court North | Terre | Clay |\n| court_06 | 6 | West End | Terre | Clay |\n\n#### Indexes\n```json\n{\n  \"collectionGroup\": \"courts\",\n  \"fields\": [\n    { \"fieldPath\": \"status\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n    { \"fieldPath\": \"is_active\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n#### Queries\n```typescript\n// Get all active courts\nquery(collection(db, \"courts\"), where(\"is_active\", \"==\", true));\n\n// Get courts by type\nquery(collection(db, \"courts\"), where(\"type\", \"==\", \"Terre\"));\n\n// Get courts available for booking\nquery(\n  collection(db, \"courts\"),\n  where(\"status\", \"==\", \"active\"),\n  where(\"is_active\", \"==\", true)\n);\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2.3 `reservations` Collection\n\nCourt bookings, lessons, and events.\n\n#### Document Structure\n```typescript\ninterface Reservation {\n  id?: string;                    // Auto-generated document ID\n  court_id: string;               // Reference to courts/{courtId}\n  user_id: string;                // Reference to users/{userId}\n  moniteur_id?: string;           // Reference to users/{moniteurId} (for lessons)\n  start_time: Timestamp;          // Booking start time\n  end_time: Timestamp;            // Booking end time\n  type: ReservationType;          // Type of reservation\n  status: ReservationStatus;      // Booking status\n  title?: string;                 // Display title (customer name or lesson title)\n  description?: string;           // Optional notes\n  participants?: number;          // Number of players\n  is_paid?: boolean;              // Payment status\n  created_at: Timestamp;          // Creation timestamp\n  updated_at?: Timestamp;         // Last update timestamp\n}\n\ntype ReservationType = \n  | 'location_libre'              // Free play\n  | 'cours_collectif'             // Group lesson\n  | 'cours_private'               // Private lesson\n  | 'individual'                  // Individual practice\n  | 'doubles'                     // Doubles match\n  | 'training'                    // Training session\n  | 'tournament'                  // Tournament match\n  | 'maintenance';                // Court maintenance\n\ntype ReservationStatus = \n  | 'confirmed'                   // Confirmed booking\n  | 'pending'                     // Awaiting confirmation\n  | 'pending_payment'             // Awaiting payment\n  | 'cancelled'                   // Cancelled booking\n  | 'completed';                  // Completed session\n```\n\n#### Example Documents\n```javascript\n// Path: reservations/res_001 (Client booking)\n{\n  court_id: \"court_01\",\n  user_id: \"client_001\",\n  start_time: Timestamp(2024-01-20T10:00:00-04:00),\n  end_time: Timestamp(2024-01-20T11:00:00-04:00),\n  type: \"location_libre\",\n  status: \"confirmed\",\n  title: \"Jean Dupont\",\n  participants: 2,\n  is_paid: true,\n  created_at: Timestamp(2024-01-18T14:30:00Z)\n}\n\n// Path: reservations/res_002 (Group lesson)\n{\n  court_id: \"court_05\",\n  user_id: \"client_002\",\n  moniteur_id: \"moniteur_001\",\n  start_time: Timestamp(2024-01-20T14:00:00-04:00),\n  end_time: Timestamp(2024-01-20T15:30:00-04:00),\n  type: \"cours_collectif\",\n  status: \"confirmed\",\n  title: \"Group Lesson - Intermediate\",\n  description: \"Forehand and backhand drills\",\n  participants: 6,\n  is_paid: false,\n  created_at: Timestamp(2024-01-17T09:00:00Z)\n}\n\n// Path: reservations/res_003 (Maintenance)\n{\n  court_id: \"court_03\",\n  user_id: \"admin_001\",\n  start_time: Timestamp(2024-01-21T06:00:00-04:00),\n  end_time: Timestamp(2024-01-21T12:00:00-04:00),\n  type: \"maintenance\",\n  status: \"confirmed\",\n  title: \"Court Resurfacing\",\n  description: \"Scheduled maintenance - Court closed\",\n  created_at: Timestamp(2024-01-15T16:00:00Z)\n}\n```\n\n#### Indexes (Critical for Performance)\n```json\n[\n  {\n    \"collectionGroup\": \"reservations\",\n    \"queryScope\": \"COLLECTION\",\n    \"fields\": [\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"court_id\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"start_time\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"status\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n    ]\n  },\n  {\n    \"collectionGroup\": \"reservations\",\n    \"queryScope\": \"COLLECTION\",\n    \"fields\": [\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"user_id\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"start_time\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n    ]\n  },\n  {\n    \"collectionGroup\": \"reservations\",\n    \"queryScope\": \"COLLECTION\",\n    \"fields\": [\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"moniteur_id\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"start_time\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n    ]\n  },\n  {\n    \"collectionGroup\": \"reservations\",\n    \"queryScope\": \"COLLECTION\",\n    \"fields\": [\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"start_time\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"status\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n    ]\n  }\n]\n```\n\n#### Queries\n```typescript\n// Get reservations for a specific court on a date\nconst startOfDay = dayjs(date).startOf('day').toISOString();\nconst endOfDay = dayjs(date).endOf('day').toISOString();\n\nquery(\n  collection(db, \"reservations\"),\n  where(\"court_id\", \"==\", courtId),\n  where(\"start_time\", \">=\", startOfDay),\n  where(\"start_time\", \"<=\", endOfDay),\n  where(\"status\", \"==\", \"confirmed\")\n);\n\n// Get user's reservations\nquery(\n  collection(db, \"reservations\"),\n  where(\"user_id\", \"==\", userId),\n  where(\"start_time\", \">=\", dayjs().toISOString()),\n  orderBy(\"start_time\", \"asc\")\n);\n\n// Get instructor's lessons\nquery(\n  collection(db, \"reservations\"),\n  where(\"moniteur_id\", \"==\", moniteurId),\n  where(\"type\", \"in\", [\"cours_collectif\", \"cours_private\"]),\n  orderBy(\"start_time\", \"asc\")\n);\n\n// Real-time listener for today's reservations\nonSnapshot(\n  query(\n    collection(db, \"reservations\"),\n    where(\"start_time\", \">=\", dayjs().startOf('day').toISOString()),\n    where(\"start_time\", \"<=\", dayjs().endOf('day').toISOString())\n  ),\n  (snapshot) => { /* handle updates */ }\n);\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2.4 `slots_moniteurs` Collection\n\nInstructor availability slots for lessons.\n\n#### Document Structure\n```typescript\ninterface MoniteurSlot {\n  id?: string;                    // Auto-generated document ID\n  moniteur_id: string;            // Reference to users/{moniteurId}\n  date: string;                   // Date in YYYY-MM-DD format\n  start_time: string;             // Start time (HH:MM format)\n  end_time: string;               // End time (HH:MM format)\n  type: SlotType;                 // Private or Group\n  court_id?: string;              // Preferred court (optional)\n  status: SlotStatus;             // Availability status\n  max_participants?: number;      // Max students for group slots\n  current_participants?: number;  // Current student count\n  description?: string;           // Slot description\n  created_at: Timestamp;          // Creation timestamp\n  updated_at?: Timestamp;         // Last update timestamp\n}\n\ntype SlotType = 'PRIVATE' | 'GROUP';\ntype SlotStatus = 'available' | 'booked' | 'cancelled';\n```\n\n#### Example Document\n```javascript\n// Path: slots_moniteurs/slot_001\n{\n  moniteur_id: \"moniteur_001\",\n  date: \"2024-01-20\",\n  start_time: \"14:00\",\n  end_time: \"15:30\",\n  type: \"GROUP\",\n  court_id: \"court_05\",\n  status: \"available\",\n  max_participants: 6,\n  current_participants: 2,\n  description: \"Intermediate forehand techniques\",\n  created_at: Timestamp(2024-01-15T10:00:00Z),\n  updated_at: Timestamp(2024-01-18T14:30:00Z)\n}\n```\n\n#### Indexes\n```json\n[\n  {\n    \"collectionGroup\": \"slots_moniteurs\",\n    \"queryScope\": \"COLLECTION\",\n    \"fields\": [\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"moniteur_id\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"date\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n    ]\n  },\n  {\n    \"collectionGroup\": \"slots_moniteurs\",\n    \"queryScope\": \"COLLECTION\",\n    \"fields\": [\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"date\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"status\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" },\n      { \"fieldPath\": \"type\", \"order\": \"ASCENDING\" }\n    ]\n  }\n]\n```\n\n#### Queries\n```typescript\n// Get instructor's slots for a week\nquery(\n  collection(db, \"slots_moniteurs\"),\n  where(\"moniteur_id\", \"==\", moniteurId),\n  where(\"date\", \">=\", startDate),\n  where(\"date\", \"<=\", endDate),\n  orderBy(\"date\", \"asc\")\n);\n\n// Get available group slots for a date\nquery(\n  collection(db, \"slots_moniteurs\"),\n  where(\"date\", \"==\", date),\n  where(\"status\", \"==\", \"available\"),\n  where(\"type\", \"==\", \"GROUP\")\n);\n\n// Real-time listener for instructor's weekly schedule\nonSnapshot(\n  query(\n    collection(db, \"slots_moniteurs\"),\n    where(\"moniteur_id\", \"==\", moniteurId),\n    where(\"date\", \">=\", weekStart),\n    where(\"date\", \"<=\", weekEnd)\n  ),\n  (snapshot) => { /* handle updates */ }\n);\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. Entity Relationship Diagram\n\n```\n┌─────────────┐\n│   users     │\n│ (profiles)  │\n└──────┬──────┘\n       │\n       │ uid (FK)\n       ├────────────────────────────┐\n       │                            │\n       ▼                            ▼\n┌──────────────┐          ┌─────────────────┐\n│ reservations │          │ slots_moniteurs │\n│  (bookings)  │          │  (availability) │\n└──────┬───────┘          └────────┬────────┘\n       │                           │\n       │ court_id (FK)             │ court_id (FK)\n       ▼                           ▼\n┌─────────────┐            ┌─────────────┐\n│   courts    │◄───────────┤   courts    │\n│ (inventory) │            │ (inventory) │\n└─────────────┘            └─────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. Data Relationships\n\n### One-to-Many Relationships\n\n1. **User → Reservations**\n   - A user can have multiple reservations\n   - Each reservation belongs to one user (via `user_id`)\n\n2. **User → Moniteur Slots**\n   - A moniteur can have multiple availability slots\n   - Each slot belongs to one moniteur (via `moniteur_id`)\n\n3. **Court → Reservations**\n   - A court can have multiple reservations\n   - Each reservation is for one court (via `court_id`)\n\n### Reference Patterns\n\n```typescript\n// Direct reference (recommended for simple queries)\nconst userRef = doc(db, \"users\", userId);\n\n// Collection group queries (for cross-collection searches)\nconst allReservations = collectionGroup(db, \"reservations\");\n\n// Subcollections (if needed for complex hierarchies)\nconst userReservations = collection(db, \"users\", userId, \"reservations\");\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. Data Validation Rules\n\n### Client-Side Validation (TypeScript)\n\n```typescript\n// src/types/validation.types.ts\n\ninterface ReservationInput {\n  court_id: string;\n  user_id: string;\n  start_time: string;\n  end_time: string;\n  type: ReservationType;\n  participants?: number;\n}\n\nfunction validateReservation(data: ReservationInput): ValidationResult {\n  // Check court exists\n  // Check times are valid\n  // Check end_time > start_time\n  // Check duration <= 2 hours\n  // Check participants <= court capacity\n  // Check no conflicts with existing reservations\n}\n```\n\n### Server-Side Validation (Firestore Rules)\n\nSee [03_FIREBASE_RULES.md](./03_FIREBASE_RULES.md) for complete security rules.\n\n---\n\n## 6. Timezone Handling\n\nAll datetime operations use **America/Martinique** timezone (AST, UTC-4).\n\n### Day.js Configuration\n\n```typescript\n// src/utils/timezone.ts\nimport dayjs from 'dayjs';\nimport utc from 'dayjs/plugin/utc';\nimport timezone from 'dayjs/plugin/timezone';\n\ndayjs.extend(utc);\ndayjs.extend(timezone);\n\nconst TIMEZONE = 'America/Martinique';\n\nexport const toLocalTime = (date: Date | string) => {\n  return dayjs(date).tz(TIMEZONE);\n};\n\nexport const toISO = (date: dayjs.Dayjs) => {\n  return date.toISOString();\n};\n\nexport const startOfDay = (date: Date) => {\n  return dayjs(date).tz(TIMEZONE).startOf('day').toISOString();\n};\n\nexport const endOfDay = (date: Date) => {\n  return dayjs(date).tz(TIMEZONE).endOf('day').toISOString();\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## 7. Sample Data Seeding\n\nSee the seed script in the reference documents for populating the emulator with test data.\n\n### Quick Seed Command\n\n```typescript\n// Run this in browser console or via a seed button\nimport { seedDatabase } from './scripts/seedData';\nawait seedDatabase();\n```\n\n---\n\n## 8. Next Steps\n\nAfter understanding the data model:\n1. ✅ Review Firestore indexes for query optimization\n2. ✅ Understand timezone handling for America/Martinique\n3. 📖 Proceed to [03_FIREBASE_RULES.md](./03_FIREBASE_RULES.md)\n",
  "file_path": "/Users/mathieu/StudioProjects/web_tennis/documentation/02_DATA_MODEL.md"
}
````

````diff
# 02. Data Model

## Firestore Database Schema

This document defines the complete data model for the Tennis Club du François application.

---

## 1. Collections Overview

| Collection | Description | Read Access | Write Access |
|------------|-------------|-------------|--------------|
| `users` | User profiles and roles | Authenticated users | Admin only |
| `courts` | Court inventory and status | Public | Admin only |
| `reservations` | Court bookings and events | Authenticated users | Authenticated users (create), Admin/Owner (update/delete) |
| `slots_moniteurs` | Instructor availability slots | Authenticated users | Moniteur (own), Admin (all) |

---

## 2. Collection Details

### 2.1 `users` Collection

User profiles with role-based access control.

#### Document Structure
```typescript
interface User {
  uid: string;                    // Firebase Auth UID (also document ID)
  name: string;                   // Full name
  email: string;                  // Email address (unique)
  role: UserRole;                 // User role
  phone?: string;                 // Phone number
  status: UserStatus;             // Online/Away/Inactive
  avatar?: string;                // Profile picture URL
  createdAt: Timestamp;           // Account creation date
  updatedAt: Timestamp;           // Last profile update
  lastLoginAt?: Timestamp;        // Last login timestamp
}

type UserRole = 'admin' | 'moniteur' | 'client';
type UserStatus = 'online' | 'away' | 'inactive';
```

#### Example Document
```javascript
// Path: users/admin_001
{
  uid: "admin_001",
  name: "Admin Martinique",
  email: "admin@tennis.mq",
  role: "admin",
  phone: "+596 696 12 34 56",
  status: "online",
  avatar: "https://storage.googleapis.com/...",
  createdAt: Timestamp(2024-01-01T00:00:00Z),
  updatedAt: Timestamp(2024-01-15T10:30:00Z),
  lastLoginAt: Timestamp(2024-01-15T08:00:00Z)
}
```

#### Indexes
```json
{
  "collectionGroup": "users",
  "fields": [
    { "fieldPath": "role", "order": "ASCENDING" },
    { "fieldPath": "status", "order": "ASCENDING" }
  ]
}
```

#### Queries
```typescript
// Get all users with role
query(collection(db, "users"), where("role", "==", "moniteur"));

// Get active users
query(collection(db, "users"), where("status", "==", "online"));

// Search by email (requires composite index)
query(collection(db, "users"), where("email", "==", email));
```

---

### 2.2 `courts` Collection

Court inventory with surface type and availability status.

#### Document Structure
```typescript
interface Court {
  id: string;                     // Document ID (court_01, court_02, etc.)
  number: number;                 // Court number (1-6)
  name: string;                   // Display name
  type: CourtType;                // Surface category
  surface: SurfaceType;           // Detailed surface description
  status: CourtStatus;            // Current status
  is_active: boolean;             // Availability toggle
  image?: string;                 // Court photo URL
  description?: string;           // Optional description
  createdAt: Timestamp;           // Creation date
  updatedAt: Timestamp;           // Last update
}

type CourtType = 'Quick' | 'Terre';
type SurfaceType = 'Hard' | 'Clay' | 'Grass' | 'Synthetic';
type CourtStatus = 'active' | 'maintenance' | 'closed';
```

#### Example Documents
```javascript
// Path: courts/court_01
{
  id: "court_01",
  number: 1,
  name: "Grand Court East",
  type: "Quick",
  surface: "Hard",
  status: "active",
  is_active: true,
  image: "https://storage.googleapis.com/tennis-francois/courts/court_01.jpg",
  description: "Premium hard court with professional lighting",
  createdAt: Timestamp(2024-01-01T00:00:00Z),
  updatedAt: Timestamp(2024-01-15T10:00:00Z)
}

// Path: courts/court_05
{
  id: "court_05",
  number: 5,
  name: "Clay Court North",
  type: "Terre",
  surface: "Clay",
  status: "active",
  is_active: true,
  image: "https://storage.googleapis.com/tennis-francois/courts/court_05.jpg",
  description: "Traditional red clay court",
  createdAt: Timestamp(2024-01-01T00:00:00Z),
  updatedAt: Timestamp(2024-01-15T10:00:00Z)
}
```

#### Default Courts (6 Courts)
| ID | Number | Name | Type | Surface |
|----|--------|------|------|---------|
| court_01 | 1 | Grand Court East | Quick | Hard |
| court_02 | 2 | Center Stage | Quick | Hard |
| court_03 | 3 | Shadow View | Quick | Hard |
| court_04 | 4 | Training Zone | Quick | Hard |
| court_05 | 5 | Clay Court North | Terre | Clay |
| court_06 | 6 | West End | Terre | Clay |

#### Indexes
```json
{
  "collectionGroup": "courts",
  "fields": [
    { "fieldPath": "status", "order": "ASCENDING" },
    { "fieldPath": "is_active", "order": "ASCENDING" }
  ]
}
```

#### Queries
```typescript
// Get all active courts
query(collection(db, "courts"), where("is_active", "==", true));

// Get courts by type
query(collection(db, "courts"), where("type", "==", "Terre"));

// Get courts available for booking
query(
  collection(db, "courts"),
  where("status", "==", "active"),
  where("is_active", "==", true)
);
```

---

### 2.3 `reservations` Collection

Court bookings, lessons, and events.

#### Document Structure
```typescript
interface Reservation {
  id?: string;                    // Auto-generated document ID
  court_id: string;               // Reference to courts/{courtId}
  user_id: string;                // Reference to users/{userId}
  moniteur_id?: string;           // Reference to users/{moniteurId} (for lessons)
  start_time: Timestamp;          // Booking start time
  end_time: Timestamp;            // Booking end time
  type: ReservationType;          // Type of reservation
  status: ReservationStatus;      // Booking status
  title?: string;                 // Display title (customer name or lesson title)
  description?: string;           // Optional notes
  participants?: number;          // Number of players
  is_paid?: boolean;              // Payment status
  created_at: Timestamp;          // Creation timestamp
  updated_at?: Timestamp;         // Last update timestamp
}

type ReservationType = 
  | 'location_libre'              // Free play
  | 'cours_collectif'             // Group lesson
  | 'cours_private'               // Private lesson
  | 'individual'                  // Individual practice
  | 'doubles'                     // Doubles match
  | 'training'                    // Training session
  | 'tournament'                  // Tournament match
  | 'maintenance';                // Court maintenance

type ReservationStatus = 
  | 'confirmed'                   // Confirmed booking
  | 'pending'                     // Awaiting confirmation
  | 'pending_payment'             // Awaiting payment
  | 'cancelled'                   // Cancelled booking
  | 'completed';                  // Completed session
```

#### Example Documents
```javascript
// Path: reservations/res_001 (Client booking)
{
  court_id: "court_01",
  user_id: "client_001",
  start_time: Timestamp(2024-01-20T10:00:00-04:00),
  end_time: Timestamp(2024-01-20T11:00:00-04:00),
  type: "location_libre",
  status: "confirmed",
  title: "Jean Dupont",
  participants: 2,
  is_paid: true,
  created_at: Timestamp(2024-01-18T14:30:00Z)
}

// Path: reservations/res_002 (Group lesson)
{
  court_id: "court_05",
  user_id: "client_002",
  moniteur_id: "moniteur_001",
  start_time: Timestamp(2024-01-20T14:00:00-04:00),
  end_time: Timestamp(2024-01-20T15:30:00-04:00),
  type: "cours_collectif",
  status: "confirmed",
  title: "Group Lesson - Intermediate",
  description: "Forehand and backhand drills",
  participants: 6,
  is_paid: false,
  created_at: Timestamp(2024-01-17T09:00:00Z)
}

// Path: reservations/res_003 (Maintenance)
{
  court_id: "court_03",
  user_id: "admin_001",
  start_time: Timestamp(2024-01-21T06:00:00-04:00),
  end_time: Timestamp(2024-01-21T12:00:00-04:00),
  type: "maintenance",
  status: "confirmed",
  title: "Court Resurfacing",
  description: "Scheduled maintenance - Court closed",
  created_at: Timestamp(2024-01-15T16:00:00Z)
}
```

#### Indexes (Critical for Performance)
```json
[
  {
    "collectionGroup": "reservations",
    "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
    "fields": [
      { "fieldPath": "court_id", "order": "ASCENDING" },
      { "fieldPath": "start_time", "order": "ASCENDING" },
      { "fieldPath": "status", "order": "ASCENDING" }
    ]
  },
  {
    "collectionGroup": "reservations",
    "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
    "fields": [
      { "fieldPath": "user_id", "order": "ASCENDING" },
      { "fieldPath": "start_time", "order": "ASCENDING" }
    ]
  },
  {
    "collectionGroup": "reservations",
    "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
    "fields": [
      { "fieldPath": "moniteur_id", "order": "ASCENDING" },
      { "fieldPath": "start_time", "order": "ASCENDING" }
    ]
  },
  {
    "collectionGroup": "reservations",
    "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
    "fields": [
      { "fieldPath": "start_time", "order": "ASCENDING" },
      { "fieldPath": "status", "order": "ASCENDING" }
    ]
  }
]
```

#### Queries
```typescript
// Get reservations for a specific court on a date
const startOfDay = dayjs(date).startOf('day').toISOString();
const endOfDay = dayjs(date).endOf('day').toISOString();

query(
  collection(db, "reservations"),
  where("court_id", "==", courtId),
  where("start_time", ">=", startOfDay),
  where("start_time", "<=", endOfDay),
  where("status", "==", "confirmed")
);

// Get user's reservations
query(
  collection(db, "reservations"),
  where("user_id", "==", userId),
  where("start_time", ">=", dayjs().toISOString()),
  orderBy("start_time", "asc")
);

// Get instructor's lessons
query(
  collection(db, "reservations"),
  where("moniteur_id", "==", moniteurId),
  where("type", "in", ["cours_collectif", "cours_private"]),
  orderBy("start_time", "asc")
);

// Real-time listener for today's reservations
onSnapshot(
  query(
    collection(db, "reservations"),
    where("start_time", ">=", dayjs().startOf('day').toISOString()),
    where("start_time", "<=", dayjs().endOf('day').toISOString())
  ),
  (snapshot) => { /* handle updates */ }
);
```

---

### 2.4 `slots_moniteurs` Collection

Instructor availability slots for lessons.

#### Document Structure
```typescript
interface MoniteurSlot {
  id?: string;                    // Auto-generated document ID
  moniteur_id: string;            // Reference to users/{moniteurId}
  date: string;                   // Date in YYYY-MM-DD format
  start_time: string;             // Start time (HH:MM format)
  end_time: string;               // End time (HH:MM format)
  type: SlotType;                 // Private or Group
  court_id?: string;              // Preferred court (optional)
  status: SlotStatus;             // Availability status
  max_participants?: number;      // Max students for group slots
  current_participants?: number;  // Current student count
  description?: string;           // Slot description
  created_at: Timestamp;          // Creation timestamp
  updated_at?: Timestamp;         // Last update timestamp
}

type SlotType = 'PRIVATE' | 'GROUP';
type SlotStatus = 'available' | 'booked' | 'cancelled';
```

#### Example Document
```javascript
// Path: slots_moniteurs/slot_001
{
  moniteur_id: "moniteur_001",
  date: "2024-01-20",
  start_time: "14:00",
  end_time: "15:30",
  type: "GROUP",
  court_id: "court_05",
  status: "available",
  max_participants: 6,
  current_participants: 2,
  description: "Intermediate forehand techniques",
  created_at: Timestamp(2024-01-15T10:00:00Z),
  updated_at: Timestamp(2024-01-18T14:30:00Z)
}
```

#### Indexes
```json
[
  {
    "collectionGroup": "slots_moniteurs",
    "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
    "fields": [
      { "fieldPath": "moniteur_id", "order": "ASCENDING" },
      { "fieldPath": "date", "order": "ASCENDING" }
    ]
  },
  {
    "collectionGroup": "slots_moniteurs",
    "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
    "fields": [
      { "fieldPath": "date", "order": "ASCENDING" },
      { "fieldPath": "status", "order": "ASCENDING" },
      { "fieldPath": "type", "order": "ASCENDING" }
    ]
  }
]
```

#### Queries
```typescript
// Get instructor's slots for a week
query(
  collection(db, "slots_moniteurs"),
  where("moniteur_id", "==", moniteurId),
  where("date", ">=", startDate),
  where("date", "<=", endDate),
  orderBy("date", "asc")
);

// Get available group slots for a date
query(
  collection(db, "slots_moniteurs"),
  where("date", "==", date),
  where("status", "==", "available"),
  where("type", "==", "GROUP")
);

// Real-time listener for instructor's weekly schedule
onSnapshot(
  query(
    collection(db, "slots_moniteurs"),
    where("moniteur_id", "==", moniteurId),
    where("date", ">=", weekStart),
    where("date", "<=", weekEnd)
  ),
  (snapshot) => { /* handle updates */ }
);
```

---

## 3. Entity Relationship Diagram

```
┌─────────────┐
│   users     │
│ (profiles)  │
└──────┬──────┘
       │
       │ uid (FK)
       ├────────────────────────────┐
       │                            │
       ▼                            ▼
┌──────────────┐          ┌─────────────────┐
│ reservations │          │ slots_moniteurs │
│  (bookings)  │          │  (availability) │
└──────┬───────┘          └────────┬────────┘
       │                           │
       │ court_id (FK)             │ court_id (FK)
       ▼                           ▼
┌─────────────┐            ┌─────────────┐
│   courts    │◄───────────┤   courts    │
│ (inventory) │            │ (inventory) │
└─────────────┘            └─────────────┘
```

---

## 4. Data Relationships

### One-to-Many Relationships

1. **User → Reservations**
   - A user can have multiple reservations
   - Each reservation belongs to one user (via `user_id`)

2. **User → Moniteur Slots**
   - A moniteur can have multiple availability slots
   - Each slot belongs to one moniteur (via `moniteur_id`)

3. **Court → Reservations**
   - A court can have multiple reservations
   - Each reservation is for one court (via `court_id`)

### Reference Patterns

```typescript
// Direct reference (recommended for simple queries)
const userRef = doc(db, "users", userId);

// Collection group queries (for cross-collection searches)
const allReservations = collectionGroup(db, "reservations");

// Subcollections (if needed for complex hierarchies)
const userReservations = collection(db, "users", userId, "reservations");
```

---

  user_id: string;
  start_time: string;
  end_time: string;
  type: ReservationType;
  participants?: number;
}

function validateReservation(data: ReservationInput): ValidationResult {
  // Check court exists
  // Check times are valid
  // Check end_time > start_time
  // Check duration <= 2 hours
  // Check participants <= court capacity
  // Check no conflicts with existing reservations
}
```

### Server-Side Validation (Firestore Rules)

See [03_FIREBASE_RULES.md](./03_FIREBASE_RULES.md) for complete security rules.

---

## 6. Timezone Handling

All datetime operations use **America/Martinique** timezone (AST, UTC-4).

### Day.js Configuration

```typescript
// src/utils/timezone.ts
import dayjs from 'dayjs';
import utc from 'dayjs/plugin/utc';
import timezone from 'dayjs/plugin/timezone';

dayjs.extend(utc);
dayjs.extend(timezone);

const TIMEZONE = 'America/Martinique';

export const toLocalTime = (date: Date | string) => {
  return dayjs(date).tz(TIMEZONE);
};

export const toISO = (date: dayjs.Dayjs) => {
  return date.toISOString();
};

export const startOfDay = (date: Date) => {
  return dayjs(date).tz(TIMEZONE).startOf('day').toISOString();
};

export const endOfDay = (date: Date) => {
  return dayjs(date).tz(TIMEZONE).endOf('day').toISOString();
};
```

---
````
