Firebase Security Rules\n\n## Firestore Security Rules for Tennis Club du François\n\nThis document defines the complete security rules for protecting Firestore data based on user roles.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Security Model Overview\n\n### User Roles\n| Role | Description | Access Level |\n|------|-------------|--------------|\n| `admin` | Club administrator | Full access to all collections |\n| `moniteur` | Tennis instructor | Manage own slots, view all reservations |\n| `client` | Club member | Create/view own reservations, view courts |\n\n### Security Principles\n1. **Authentication Required**: All write operations require authentication\n2. **Role-Based Access**: Read/write permissions based on user role\n3. **Data Ownership**: Users can only modify their own data (except admins)\n4. **Validation**: All writes must include valid data formats\n\n---\n\n## 2. Complete Security Rules\n\n### `firestore.rules`\n\n```javascript\nrules_version = '2';\nservice cloud.firestore {\n  match /databases/{database}/documents {\n    \n    // ==========================================\n    // HELPER FUNCTIONS\n    // ==========================================\n    \n    // Check if user is authenticated\n    function isAuthenticated() {\n      return request.auth != null;\n    }\n    \n    // Get user's role from users collection\n    function getUserRole() {\n      let userDoc = get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data;\n      return userDoc.role;\n    }\n    \n    // Check if user has specific role\n    function hasRole(role) {\n      return isAuthenticated() && \n             get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == role;\n    }\n    \n    // Check if user is admin\n    function isAdmin() {\n      return hasRole('admin');\n    }\n    \n    // Check if user is moniteur\n    function isMoniteur() {\n      return hasRole('moniteur');\n    }\n    \n    // Check if user is client\n    function isClient() {\n      return hasRole('client');\n    }\n    \n    // Check if user owns the resource\n    function isOwner(userId) {\n      return isAuthenticated() && request.auth.uid == userId;\n    }\n    \n    // Validate reservation data\n    function isValidReservation() {\n      return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['court_id', 'user_id', 'start_time', 'end_time', 'type', 'status'])\n             && request.resource.data.court_id is string\n             && request.resource.data.user_id is string\n             && request.resource.data.start_time is timestamp\n             && request.resource.data.end_time is timestamp\n             && request.resource.data.end_time > request.resource.data.start_time\n             && request.resource.data.type in ['location_libre', 'cours_collectif', 'cours_private', \n                                                'individual', 'doubles', 'training', 'tournament', 'maintenance']\n             && request.resource.data.status in ['confirmed', 'pending', 'pending_payment', 'cancelled', 'completed'];\n    }\n    \n    // Validate user data\n    function isValidUserData() {\n      return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['name', 'email', 'role'])\n             && request.resource.data.name is string\n             && request.resource.data.email is string\n             && request.resource.data.role in ['admin', 'moniteur', 'client'];\n    }\n    \n    // Validate court data\n    function isValidCourtData() {\n      return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['number', 'name', 'type', 'status', 'is_active'])\n             && request.resource.data.number is number\n             && request.resource.data.name is string\n             && request.resource.data.type in ['Quick', 'Terre']\n             && request.resource.data.status in ['active', 'maintenance', 'closed']\n             && request.resource.data.is_active is bool;\n    }\n    \n    // Validate moniteur slot data\n    function isValidSlotData() {\n      return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['moniteur_id', 'date', 'start_time', 'end_time', 'type', 'status'])\n             && request.resource.data.moniteur_id is string\n             && request.resource.data.date is string\n             && request.resource.data.start_time is string\n             && request.resource.data.end_time is string\n             && request.resource.data.type in ['PRIVATE', 'GROUP']\n             && request.resource.data.status in ['available', 'booked', 'cancelled'];\n    }\n    \n    // ==========================================\n    // USERS COLLECTION\n    // ==========================================\n    \n    match /users/{userId} {\n      // Allow reading own profile or if admin\n      allow read: if isAuthenticated() && (isOwner(userId) || isAdmin());\n      \n      // Allow creation only by admin\n      allow create: if isAdmin() && isValidUserData();\n      \n      // Allow update only by admin (users can't change their own role)\n      allow update: if isAdmin() && isValidUserData();\n      \n      // Allow delete only by admin\n      allow delete: if isAdmin();\n    }\n    \n    // ==========================================\n    // COURTS COLLECTION\n    // ==========================================\n    \n    match /courts/{courtId} {\n      // Anyone can read courts (public availability)\n      allow read: if true;\n      \n      // Only admin can write courts\n      allow create, update, delete: if isAdmin() && isValidCourtData();\n    }\n    \n    // ==========================================\n    // RESERVATIONS COLLECTION\n    // ==========================================\n    \n    match /reservations/{reservationId} {\n      // Allow authenticated users to read all reservations (view schedule)\n      allow read: if isAuthenticated();\n      \n      // Allow any authenticated user to create reservations\n      allow create: if isAuthenticated() \n                    && isValidReservation()\n                    && request.resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid;\n      \n      // Allow update if:\n      // - User is admin, OR\n      // - User owns the reservation\n      allow update: if isAuthenticated() \n                    && (isAdmin() || resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid)\n                    && isValidReservation();\n      \n      // Allow delete if:\n      // - User is admin, OR\n      // - User owns the reservation\n      allow delete: if isAuthenticated() \n                    && (isAdmin() || resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid);\n    }\n    \n    // ==========================================\n    // SLOTS_MONITEURS COLLECTION\n    // ==========================================\n    \n    match /slots_moniteurs/{slotId} {\n      // Allow authenticated users to read all slots\n      allow read: if isAuthenticated();\n      \n      // Allow moniteurs to create their own slots\n      allow create: if isAuthenticated() \n                    && (isMoniteur() || isAdmin())\n                    && isValidSlotData()\n                    && request.resource.data.moniteur_id == request.auth.uid;\n      \n      // Allow update if:\n      // - User is admin, OR\n      // - User owns the slot (is the moniteur)\n      allow update: if isAuthenticated() \n                    && (isAdmin() || resource.data.moniteur_id == request.auth.uid)\n                    && isValidSlotData();\n      \n      // Allow delete if:\n      // - User is admin, OR\n      // - User owns the slot\n      allow delete: if isAuthenticated() \n                    && (isAdmin() || resource.data.moniteur_id == request.auth.uid);\n    }\n    \n    // ==========================================\n    // ADDITIONAL COLLECTIONS (Future)\n    // ==========================================\n    \n    // Example: Payments collection\n    match /payments/{paymentId} {\n      allow read: if isAuthenticated() \n                  && (isAdmin() || resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid);\n      allow create: if isAuthenticated() && isValidPaymentData();\n      allow update: if isAdmin();\n      allow delete: if isAdmin();\n    }\n    \n    // Example: Reviews collection\n    match /reviews/{reviewId} {\n      allow read: if true;\n      allow create: if isAuthenticated() && isValidReviewData();\n      allow update, delete: if isAdmin() || (isAuthenticated() && resource.data.author_id == request.auth.uid);\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. Access Control Matrix\n\n### Users Collection\n\n| Operation | Admin | Moniteur | Client | Public |\n|-----------|-------|----------|--------|--------|\n| Read own profile | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |\n| Read other profiles | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Create user | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Update any user | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Delete user | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n\n### Courts Collection\n\n| Operation | Admin | Moniteur | Client | Public |\n|-----------|-------|----------|--------|--------|\n| Read courts | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |\n| Create court | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Update court | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Delete court | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n\n### Reservations Collection\n\n| Operation | Admin | Moniteur | Client | Public |\n|-----------|-------|----------|--------|--------|\n| Read all reservations | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |\n| Create reservation | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |\n| Update own reservation | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |\n| Update other reservation | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Delete own reservation | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |\n| Delete other reservation | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n\n### Slots Moniteurs Collection\n\n| Operation | Admin | Moniteur | Client | Public |\n|-----------|-------|----------|--------|--------|\n| Read all slots | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |\n| Create own slot | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Update own slot | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Update other slot | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Delete own slot | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| Delete other slot | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Usage Examples\n\n### Testing Rules in Firebase Console\n\n1. Go to Firebase Console → Firestore Database → Rules\n2. Click \"Simulate\" to test rules\n3. Use the following test scenarios:\n\n#### Test 1: Client Creating Reservation\n```javascript\n// Should SUCCEED\nmatch /reservations/test_res {\n  allow create: if request.auth.uid == \"client_001\"\n                && request.resource.data.user_id == \"client_001\";\n}\n```\n\n#### Test 2: Client Trying to Update Another's Reservation\n```javascript\n// Should FAIL\nmatch /reservations/test_res {\n  allow update: if request.auth.uid == \"client_002\"\n                && resource.data.user_id == \"client_001\";\n}\n```\n\n#### Test 3: Admin Blocking Court\n```javascript\n// Should SUCCEED\nmatch /courts/court_01 {\n  allow update: if get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == 'admin';\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. Development vs Production\n\n### Development Mode (Emulator)\n\nFor local development with the emulator, you can use relaxed rules:\n\n```javascript\nrules_version = '2';\nservice cloud.firestore {\n  match /databases/{database}/documents {\n    match /{document=**} {\n      allow read, write: if request.time < timestamp.date(2025, 12, 31);\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n⚠️ **WARNING**: Never deploy relaxed rules to production!\n\n### Production Mode\n\nAlways deploy with full security rules:\n\n```bash\n# Deploy rules to production\nfirebase deploy --only firestore:rules\n\n# Verify deployed rules\nfirebase firestore:rules:list\n```\n\n---\n\n## 6. Rule Validation Best Practices\n\n### Input Validation\n\n```javascript\n// Validate required fields\nfunction isValidReservation() {\n  return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['court_id', 'user_id', 'start_time', 'end_time'])\n         && request.resource.data.end_time > request.resource.data.start_time;\n}\n\n// Validate enum values\nfunction isValidRole() {\n  return request.resource.data.role in ['admin', 'moniteur', 'client'];\n}\n\n// Validate string format (email)\nfunction isValidEmail() {\n  return request.resource.data.email.matches('^[^@]+@[^@]+\\\\.[^@]+$');\n}\n\n// Validate number ranges\nfunction isValidParticipants() {\n  return request.resource.data.participants >= 1 \n         && request.resource.data.participants <= 10;\n}\n```\n\n### Preventing Privilege Escalation\n\n```javascript\n// Users cannot change their own role\nallow update: if isAdmin()  // Only admin can update user roles\n              && request.resource.data.role == resource.data.role;  // Prevent role change\n\n// Users cannot assign themselves as moniteur\nallow create: if isAdmin()\n              && !(request.resource.data.role == 'moniteur' && request.auth.uid == request.resource.uid);\n```\n\n---\n\n## 7. Common Security Pitfalls\n\n### ❌ Pitfall 1: Missing Authentication Check\n```javascript\n// BAD: Anyone can read\nallow read: if true;\n\n// GOOD: Only authenticated users\nallow read: if request.auth != null;\n```\n\n### ❌ Pitfall 2: Incomplete Validation\n```javascript\n// BAD: Missing field validation\nallow create: if request.auth != null;\n\n// GOOD: Validate all required fields\nallow create: if request.auth != null \n              && isValidReservation();\n```\n\n### ❌ Pitfall 3: Overly Permissive Update Rules\n```javascript\n// BAD: User can update any field\nallow update: if isOwner(resource.data.user_id);\n\n// GOOD: Prevent role changes\nallow update: if isAdmin()\n              || (isOwner(resource.data.user_id) \n                  && request.resource.data.role == resource.data.role);\n```\n\n---\n\n## 8. Testing Security Rules\n\n### Unit Testing with Firebase Emulator\n\n```typescript\n// src/tests/security.rules.test.ts\nimport { describe, it, before, after } from 'node:test';\nimport { assert } from 'chai';\nimport { initializeTestEnvironment, RulesTestContext } from '@firebase/rules-unit-testing';\n\nlet testEnv: RulesTestContext;\n\nbefore(async () => {\n  testEnv = await initializeTestEnvironment({\n    projectId: 'tennis-francois-test',\n    firestore: {\n      rules: fs.readFileSync('firestore.rules', 'utf8'),\n    },\n  });\n});\n\nafter(async () => {\n  await testEnv.cleanup();\n});\n\ndescribe('Security Rules', () => {\n  it('should allow admin to read all users', async () => {\n    const adminDb = testEnv.authenticatedContext('admin_001', { role: 'admin' }).firestore();\n    await assert.succeeds(adminDb.collection('users').get());\n  });\n\n  it('should prevent client from reading other users', async () => {\n    const clientDb = testEnv.authenticatedContext('client_001', { role: 'client' }).firestore();\n    await assert.fails(clientDb.collection('users').get());\n  });\n\n  it('should allow client to create own reservation', async () => {\n    const clientDb = testEnv.authenticatedContext('client_001').firestore();\n    await assert.succeeds(\n      clientDb.collection('reservations').add({\n        user_id: 'client_001',\n        court_id: 'court_01',\n        start_time: new Date(),\n        end_time: new Date(Date.now() + 3600000),\n        type: 'location_libre',\n        status: 'confirmed'\n      })\n    );\n  });\n});\n```\n\n---\n\n## 9. Deployment Checklist\n\nBefore deploying security rules:\n\n- [ ] Test all rules in Firebase Emulator\n- [ ] Verify admin can perform all operations\n- [ ] Verify moniteur can manage own slots\n- [ ] Verify client can only access own data\n- [ ] Test edge cases (missing fields, invalid data)\n- [ ] Run unit tests for security rules\n- [ ] Backup current production rules\n- [ ] Deploy during low-traffic period\n- [ ] Monitor logs after deployment\n\n---\n\n## 10. Next Steps\n\nAfter configuring security rules:\n1. ✅ Test rules in Firebase Emulator Suite\n2. ✅ Verify access control for all user roles\n3. 📖 Proceed to [04_SERVICES.md](./04_SERVICES.md)\n",

*Diff for `03_FIREBASE_RULES.md`:*
````diff
# 03. Firebase Security Rules

## Firestore Security Rules for Tennis Club du François

This document defines the complete security rules for protecting Firestore data based on user roles.

---

## 1. Security Model Overview

### User Roles
| Role | Description | Access Level |
|------|-------------|--------------|
| `admin` | Club administrator | Full access to all collections |
| `moniteur` | Tennis instructor | Manage own slots, view all reservations |
| `client` | Club member | Create/view own reservations, view courts |

### Security Principles
1. **Authentication Required**: All write operations require authentication
2. **Role-Based Access**: Read/write permissions based on user role
3. **Data Ownership**: Users can only modify their own data (except admins)
4. **Validation**: All writes must include valid data formats

---

## 2. Complete Security Rules

### `firestore.rules`

```javascript
rules_version = '2';
service cloud.firestore {
  match /databases/{database}/documents {
    
    // ==========================================
    // HELPER FUNCTIONS
    // ==========================================
    
    // Check if user is authenticated
    function isAuthenticated() {
      return request.auth != null;
    }
    
    // Get user's role from users collection
    function getUserRole() {
      let userDoc = get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data;
      return userDoc.role;
    }
    
    // Check if user has specific role
    function hasRole(role) {
      return isAuthenticated() && 
             get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == role;
    }
    
    // Check if user is admin
    function isAdmin() {
      return hasRole('admin');
    }
    
    // Check if user is moniteur
    function isMoniteur() {
      return hasRole('moniteur');
    }
    
    // Check if user is client
    function isClient() {
      return hasRole('client');
    }
    
    // Check if user owns the resource
    function isOwner(userId) {
      return isAuthenticated() && request.auth.uid == userId;
    }
    
    // Validate reservation data
    function isValidReservation() {
      return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['court_id', 'user_id', 'start_time', 'end_time', 'type', 'status'])
             && request.resource.data.court_id is string
             && request.resource.data.user_id is string
             && request.resource.data.start_time is timestamp
             && request.resource.data.end_time is timestamp
             && request.resource.data.end_time > request.resource.data.start_time
             && request.resource.data.type in ['location_libre', 'cours_collectif', 'cours_private', 
                                                'individual', 'doubles', 'training', 'tournament', 'maintenance']
             && request.resource.data.status in ['confirmed', 'pending', 'pending_payment', 'cancelled', 'completed'];
    }
    
    // Validate user data
    function isValidUserData() {
      return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['name', 'email', 'role'])
             && request.resource.data.name is string
             && request.resource.data.email is string
             && request.resource.data.role in ['admin', 'moniteur', 'client'];
    }
    
    // Validate court data
    function isValidCourtData() {
      return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['number', 'name', 'type', 'status', 'is_active'])
             && request.resource.data.number is number
             && request.resource.data.name is string
             && request.resource.data.type in ['Quick', 'Terre']
             && request.resource.data.status in ['active', 'maintenance', 'closed']
             && request.resource.data.is_active is bool;
    }
    
    // Validate moniteur slot data
    function isValidSlotData() {
      return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['moniteur_id', 'date', 'start_time', 'end_time', 'type', 'status'])
             && request.resource.data.moniteur_id is string
             && request.resource.data.date is string
             && request.resource.data.start_time is string
             && request.resource.data.end_time is string
             && request.resource.data.type in ['PRIVATE', 'GROUP']
             && request.resource.data.status in ['available', 'booked', 'cancelled'];
    }
    
    // ==========================================
    // USERS COLLECTION
    // ==========================================
    
    match /users/{userId} {
      // Allow reading own profile or if admin
      allow read: if isAuthenticated() && (isOwner(userId) || isAdmin());
      
      // Allow creation only by admin
      allow create: if isAdmin() && isValidUserData();
      
      // Allow update only by admin (users can't change their own role)
      allow update: if isAdmin() && isValidUserData();
      
      // Allow delete only by admin
      allow delete: if isAdmin();
    }
    
    // ==========================================
    // COURTS COLLECTION
    // ==========================================
    
    match /courts/{courtId} {
      // Anyone can read courts (public availability)
      allow read: if true;
      
      // Only admin can write courts
      allow create, update, delete: if isAdmin() && isValidCourtData();
    }
    
    // ==========================================
    // RESERVATIONS COLLECTION
    // ==========================================
    
    match /reservations/{reservationId} {
      // Allow authenticated users to read all reservations (view schedule)
      allow read: if isAuthenticated();
      
      // Allow any authenticated user to create reservations
      allow create: if isAuthenticated() 
                    && isValidReservation()
                    && request.resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid;
      
      // Allow update if:
      // - User is admin, OR
      // - User owns the reservation
      allow update: if isAuthenticated() 
                    && (isAdmin() || resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid)
                    && isValidReservation();
      
      // Allow delete if:
      // - User is admin, OR
      // - User owns the reservation
      allow delete: if isAuthenticated() 
                    && (isAdmin() || resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid);
    }
    
    // ==========================================
    // SLOTS_MONITEURS COLLECTION
    // ==========================================
    
    match /slots_moniteurs/{slotId} {
      // Allow authenticated users to read all slots
      allow read: if isAuthenticated();
      
      // Allow moniteurs to create their own slots
      allow create: if isAuthenticated() 
                    && (isMoniteur() || isAdmin())
                    && isValidSlotData()
                    && request.resource.data.moniteur_id == request.auth.uid;
      
      // Allow update if:
      // - User is admin, OR
      // - User owns the slot (is the moniteur)
      allow update: if isAuthenticated() 
                    && (isAdmin() || resource.data.moniteur_id == request.auth.uid)
                    && isValidSlotData();
      
      // Allow delete if:
      // - User is admin, OR
      // - User owns the slot
      allow delete: if isAuthenticated() 
                    && (isAdmin() || resource.data.moniteur_id == request.auth.uid);
    }
    
    // ==========================================
    // ADDITIONAL COLLECTIONS (Future)
    // ==========================================
    
    // Example: Payments collection
    match /payments/{paymentId} {
      allow read: if isAuthenticated() 
                  && (isAdmin() || resource.data.user_id == request.auth.uid);
      allow create: if isAuthenticated() && isValidPaymentData();
      allow update: if isAdmin();
      allow delete: if isAdmin();
    }
    
    // Example: Reviews collection
    match /reviews/{reviewId} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow create: if isAuthenticated() && isValidReviewData();
      allow update, delete: if isAdmin() || (isAuthenticated() && resource.data.author_id == request.auth.uid);
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Access Control Matrix

### Users Collection

| Operation | Admin | Moniteur | Client | Public |
|-----------|-------|----------|--------|--------|
| Read own profile | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Read other profiles | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Create user | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Update any user | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Delete user | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |

### Courts Collection

| Operation | Admin | Moniteur | Client | Public |
|-----------|-------|----------|--------|--------|
| Read courts | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Create court | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Update court | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Delete court | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |

### Reservations Collection

| Operation | Admin | Moniteur | Client | Public |
|-----------|-------|----------|--------|--------|
| Read all reservations | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Create reservation | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Update own reservation | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Update other reservation | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Delete own reservation | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Delete other reservation | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |

### Slots Moniteurs Collection

| Operation | Admin | Moniteur | Client | Public |
|-----------|-------|----------|--------|--------|
| Read all slots | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Create own slot | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Update own slot | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Update other slot | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Delete own slot | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Delete other slot | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |

---

## 4. Usage Examples

### Testing Rules in Firebase Console

1. Go to Firebase Console → Firestore Database → Rules
2. Click "Simulate" to test rules
3. Use the following test scenarios:

#### Test 1: Client Creating Reservation
```javascript
// Should SUCCEED
match /reservations/test_res {
  allow create: if request.auth.uid == "client_001"
                && request.resource.data.user_id == "client_001";
}
```

#### Test 2: Client Trying to Update Another's Reservation
```javascript
// Should FAIL
match /reservations/test_res {
  allow update: if request.auth.uid == "client_002"
                && resource.data.user_id == "client_001";
}
```

#### Test 3: Admin Blocking Court
```javascript
// Should SUCCEED
match /courts/court_01 {
  allow update: if get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == 'admin';
}
```

---

## 5. Development vs Production

### Development Mode (Emulator)

For local development with the emulator, you can use relaxed rules:

```javascript
rules_version = '2';
service cloud.firestore {
  match /databases/{database}/documents {
    match /{document=**} {
      allow read, write: if request.time < timestamp.date(2025, 12, 31);
    }
  }
}
```

⚠️ **WARNING**: Never deploy relaxed rules to production!

### Production Mode

Always deploy with full security rules:

```bash
# Deploy rules to production
firebase deploy --only firestore:rules

# Verify deployed rules
firebase firestore:rules:list
```

---

## 6. Rule Validation Best Practices

### Input Validation

```javascript
// Validate required fields
function isValidReservation() {
  return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(['court_id', 'user_id', 'start_time', 'end_time'])
         && request.resource.data.end_time > request.resource.data.start_time;
}

// Validate enum values
function isValidRole() {
  return request.resource.data.role in ['admin', 'moniteur', 'client'];
}

// Validate string format (email)
function isValidEmail() {
  return request.resource.data.email.matches('^[^@]+@[^@]+\\.[^@]+$');
}

// Validate number ranges
function isValidParticipants() {
  return request.resource.data.participants >= 1 
         && request.resource.data.participants <= 10;
}
```

### Preventing Privilege Escalation

```javascript
// Users cannot change their own role
allow update: if isAdmin()  // Only admin can update user roles
              && request.resource.data.role == resource.data.role;  // Prevent role change

// Users cannot assign themselves as moniteur
allow create: if isAdmin()
              && !(request.resource.data.role == 'moniteur' && request.auth.uid == request.resource.uid);
```

---

## 7. Common Security Pitfalls

### ❌ Pitfall 1: Missing Authentication Check
```javascript
// BAD: Anyone can read
allow read: if true;

// GOOD: Only authenticated users
allow read: if request.auth != null;
```

### ❌ Pitfall 2: Incomplete Validation
```javascript
// BAD: Missing field validation
allow create: if request.auth != null;

// GOOD: Validate all required fields
allow create: if request.auth != null 
              && isValidReservation();
```

### ❌ Pitfall 3: Overly Permissive Update Rules
```javascript
// BAD: User can update any field
allow update: if isOwner(resource.data.user_id);

// GOOD: Prevent role changes
allow update: if isAdmin()
              || (isOwner(resource.data.user_id) 
                  && request.resource.data.role == resource.data.role);
```

---

## 8. Testing Security Rules

### Unit Testing with Firebase Emulator

```typescript
// src/tests/security.rules.test.ts
import { describe, it, before, after } from 'node:test';
import { assert } from 'chai';
import { initializeTestEnvironment, RulesTestContext } from '@firebase/rules-unit-testing';

let testEnv: RulesTestContext;

before(async () => {
  testEnv = await initializeTestEnvironment({
    projectId: 'tennis-francois-test',
    firestore: {
      rules: fs.readFileSync('firestore.rules', 'utf8'),
    },
  });
});

after(async () => {
  await testEnv.cleanup();
});

describe('Security Rules', () => {
  it('should allow admin to read all users', async () => {
    const adminDb = testEnv.authenticatedContext('admin_001', { role: 'admin' }).firestore();
    await assert.succeeds(adminDb.collection('users').get());
  });

  it('should prevent client from reading other users', async () => {
    const clientDb = testEnv.authenticatedContext('client_001', { role: 'client' }).firestore();
    await assert.fails(clientDb.collection('users').get());
  });

  it('should allow client to create own reservation', async () => {
    const clientDb = testEnv.authenticatedContext('client_001').firestore();
    await assert.succeeds(
      clientDb.collection('reservations').add({
        user_id: 'client_001',
        court_id: 'court_01',
        start_time: new Date(),
        end_time: new Date(Date.now() + 3600000),
        type: 'location_libre',
        status: 'confirmed'
      })
    );
  });
});
```

---

## 9. Deployment Checklist

Before deploying security rules:

- [ ] Test all rules in Firebase Emulator
- [ ] Verify admin can perform all operations
- [ ] Verify moniteur can manage own slots
- [ ] Verify client can only access own data
- [ ] Test edge cases (missing fields, invalid data)
- [ ] Run unit tests for security rules
- [ ] Backup current production rules
- [ ] Deploy during low-traffic period
- [ ] Monitor logs after deployment

---

After configuring security rules:
1. ✅ Test rules in Firebase Emulator Suite
2. ✅ Verify access control for all user roles
3. 📖 Proceed to [04_SERVICES.md](./04_SERVICES.md)
````

````json
{
  "content": "# 04. Backend Services\n\n## Firebase Service Layer for Tennis Club du François\n\nThis document defines the complete service layer for interacting with Firebase Firestore.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Service Architecture\n\n```\nsrc/services/\n├── reservationService.ts    # Court bookings management\n├── userService.ts           # User profiles and authentication\n├── courtService.ts          # Court inventory management\n├── slotService.ts           # Instructor availability slots\n└── index.ts                 # Service exports\n```\n\n### Design Principles\n1. **Single Responsibility**: Each service handles one collection\n2. **Type Safety**: Full TypeScript typing for all operations\n3. **Error Handling**: Consistent error handling with typed results\n4. **Real-time**: Use `onSnapshot` for live data updates\n5. **Transactions**: Use transactions for conflict-sensitive operations\n\n---\n\n## 2. Reservation Service\n\n### `src/services/reservationService.ts`\n\n```typescript\nimport { db } from '../config/firebase.config';\nimport {\n  collection,\n  doc,\n  query,\n  where,\n  orderBy,\n  onSnapshot,\n  getDocs,\n  getDoc,\n  runTransaction,\n  addDoc,\n  updateDoc,\n  deleteDoc,\n  Timestamp,\n  QueryConstraint\n} from 'firebase/firestore';\nimport dayjs from 'dayjs';\nimport { Reservation, ReservationType, ReservationStatus } from '../types/reservation.types';\nimport { toLocalTime, startOfDay, endOfDay } from '../utils/timezone';\n\nconst COLLECTION_NAME = 'reservations';\n\n// ==========================================\n// REAL-TIME SUBSCRIPTIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to reservations for a specific court on a given date\n */\nexport const subscribeToCourtReservations = (\n  courtId: string,\n  date: Date,\n  callback: (reservations: Reservation[]) => void\n) => {\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('court_id', '==', courtId),\n    where('start_time', '>=', Timestamp.fromDate(startOfDay(date))),\n    where('start_time', '<=', Timestamp.fromDate(endOfDay(date))),\n    where('status', '==', 'confirmed')\n  );\n\n  return onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {\n    const reservations = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({\n      id: doc.id,\n      ...doc.data()\n    } as Reservation));\n    \n    // Sort by start time\n    reservations.sort((a, b) => \n      a.start_time.toMillis() - b.start_time.toMillis()\n    );\n    \n    callback(reservations);\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to user's reservations\n */\nexport const subscribeToUserReservations = (\n  userId: string,\n  callback: (reservations: Reservation[]) => void\n) => {\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('user_id', '==', userId),\n    where('start_time', '>=', Timestamp.fromDate(new Date())),\n    orderBy('start_time', 'asc')\n  );\n\n  return onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {\n    const reservations = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({\n      id: doc.id,\n      ...doc.data()\n    } as Reservation));\n    callback(reservations);\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to today's reservations (for admin dashboard)\n */\nexport const subscribeToTodaysReservations = (\n  callback: (reservations: Reservation[]) => void\n) => {\n  const today = new Date();\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('start_time', '>=', Timestamp.fromDate(startOfDay(today))),\n    where('start_time', '<=', Timestamp.fromDate(endOfDay(today))),\n    orderBy('start_time', 'asc')\n  );\n\n  return onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {\n    const reservations = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({\n      id: doc.id,\n      ...doc.data()\n    } as Reservation));\n    callback(reservations);\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to instructor's lessons\n */\nexport const subscribeToMoniteurLessons = (\n  moniteurId: string,\n  callback: (reservations: Reservation[]) => void\n) => {\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('moniteur_id', '==', moniteurId),\n    where('type', 'in', ['cours_collectif', 'cours_private']),\n    orderBy('start_time', 'asc')\n  );\n\n  return onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {\n    const reservations = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({\n      id: doc.id,\n      ...doc.data()\n    } as Reservation));\n    callback(reservations);\n  });\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// QUERY FUNCTIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Get reservations for a court on a date range\n */\nexport const getCourtReservations = async (\n  courtId: string,\n  startDate: Date,\n  endDate: Date\n): Promise<Reservation[]> => {\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('court_id', '==', courtId),\n    where('start_time', '>=', Timestamp.fromDate(startOfDay(startDate))),\n    where('start_time', '<=', Timestamp.fromDate(endOfDay(endDate)))\n  );\n\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  return snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({\n    id: doc.id,\n    ...doc.data()\n  } as Reservation));\n};\n\n/**\n * Get user's reservation history\n */\nexport const getUserReservations = async (\n  userId: string,\n  includePast = false\n): Promise<Reservation[]> => {\n  const constraints: QueryConstraint[] = [\n    where('user_id', '==', userId)\n  ];\n\n  if (!includePast) {\n    constraints.push(where('start_time', '>=', Timestamp.fromDate(new Date())));\n  }\n\n  constraints.push(orderBy('start_time', includePast ? 'desc' : 'asc'));\n\n  const q = query(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), ...constraints);\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  \n  return snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({\n    id: doc.id,\n    ...doc.data()\n  } as Reservation));\n};\n\n/**\n * Get all reservations for analytics (admin only)\n */\nexport const getAllReservations = async (\n  startDate?: Date,\n  endDate?: Date\n): Promise<Reservation[]> => {\n  const constraints: QueryConstraint[] = [];\n\n  if (startDate) {\n    constraints.push(where('start_time', '>=', Timestamp.fromDate(startDate)));\n  }\n  if (endDate) {\n    constraints.push(where('start_time', '<=', Timestamp.fromDate(endDate)));\n  }\n\n  const q = query(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), ...constraints);\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  \n  return snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({\n    id: doc.id,\n    ...doc.data()\n  } as Reservation));\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// AVAILABILITY CHECKS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Check if a court is available at a specific time\n */\nexport const checkCourtAvailability = async (\n  courtId: string,\n  startTime: Date,\n  endTime: Date\n): Promise<{ available: boolean; conflict?: Reservation }> => {\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('court_id', '==', courtId),\n    where('status', '==', 'confirmed'),\n    where('start_time', '<', Timestamp.fromDate(endTime)),\n    where('end_time', '>', Timestamp.fromDate(startTime))\n  );\n\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  \n  if (!snapshot.empty) {\n    return {\n      available: false,\n      conflict: {\n        id: snapshot.docs[0].id,\n        ...snapshot.docs[0].data()\n      } as Reservation\n    };\n  }\n\n  return { available: true };\n};\n\n/**\n * Get available time slots for a court on a given date\n */\nexport const getAvailableSlots = async (\n  courtId: string,\n  date: Date,\n  slotDuration: number = 60 // minutes\n): Promise<{ start: Date; end: Date; available: boolean }[]> => {\n  const reservations = await getCourtReservations(courtId, date, date);\n  const openingHour = 6; // 06:00\n  const closingHour = 22; // 22:00\n  \n  const slots = [];\n  const currentDate = dayjs(date).tz('America/Martinique').startOf('day');\n  \n  for (let hour = openingHour; hour < closingHour; hour++) {\n    const slotStart = currentDate.add(hour, 'hour').toDate();\n    const slotEnd = currentDate.add(hour + 1, 'hour').toDate();\n    \n    const isAvailable = !reservations.some(res => {\n      const resStart = res.start_time.toDate();\n      const resEnd = res.end_time.toDate();\n      return slotStart < resEnd && slotEnd > resStart;\n    });\n    \n    slots.push({\n      start: slotStart,\n      end: slotEnd,\n      available: isAvailable\n    });\n  }\n  \n  return slots;\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// CRUD OPERATIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Create a new reservation (with transaction for conflict prevention)\n */\nexport const createReservation = async (\n  reservationData: Omit<Reservation, 'id' | 'created_at'>\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string; reservationId?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    const result = await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {\n      // Check availability\n      const availability = await checkCourtAvailability(\n        reservationData.court_id,\n        reservationData.start_time.toDate(),\n        reservationData.end_time.toDate()\n      );\n\n      if (!availability.available) {\n        throw new Error('This court is already reserved for the selected time slot.');\n      }\n\n      // Create new reservation\n      const newResRef = doc(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME));\n      const newReservation: Omit<Reservation, 'id'> = {\n        ...reservationData,\n        created_at: Timestamp.now()\n      };\n\n      transaction.set(newResRef, newReservation);\n      return newResRef.id;\n    });\n\n    return { success: true, reservationId: result };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error creating reservation:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Update an existing reservation\n */\nexport const updateReservation = async (\n  reservationId: string,\n  updates: Partial<Reservation>\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    const resRef = doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, reservationId);\n    \n    // Validate update data\n    if (updates.start_time || updates.end_time) {\n      const resDoc = await getDoc(resRef);\n      if (!resDoc.exists()) {\n        return { success: false, error: 'Reservation not found' };\n      }\n      \n      const currentData = resDoc.data() as Reservation;\n      const newStart = updates.start_time || currentData.start_time;\n      const newEnd = updates.end_time || currentData.end_time;\n      \n      // Check for conflicts if time changed\n      if (\n        updates.start_time?.toDate() !== currentData.start_time.toDate() ||\n        updates.end_time?.toDate() !== currentData.end_time.toDate()\n      ) {\n        const availability = await checkCourtAvailability(\n          currentData.court_id,\n          newStart.toDate(),\n          newEnd.toDate()\n        );\n        \n        if (!availability.available) {\n          return { success: false, error: 'Time slot conflict detected' };\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    \n    await updateDoc(resRef, {\n      ...updates,\n      updated_at: Timestamp.now()\n    });\n    \n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error updating reservation:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Cancel a reservation\n */\nexport const cancelReservation = async (\n  reservationId: string\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  return updateReservation(reservationId, { status: 'cancelled' });\n};\n\n/**\n * Delete a reservation\n */\nexport const deleteReservation = async (\n  reservationId: string\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    await deleteDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, reservationId));\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error deleting reservation:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Create maintenance booking (admin only)\n */\nexport const createMaintenanceBooking = async (\n  courtId: string,\n  startTime: Date,\n  endTime: Date,\n  description: string,\n  adminId: string\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  return createReservation({\n    court_id: courtId,\n    user_id: adminId,\n    start_time: Timestamp.fromDate(startTime),\n    end_time: Timestamp.fromDate(endTime),\n    type: 'maintenance',\n    status: 'confirmed',\n    title: 'Court Maintenance',\n    description\n  });\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// ANALYTICS FUNCTIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Get court utilization statistics\n */\nexport const getCourtUtilizationStats = async (\n  courtId: string,\n  startDate: Date,\n  endDate: Date\n): Promise<{ totalHours: number; bookedHours: number; utilizationRate: number }> => {\n  const reservations = await getCourtReservations(courtId, startDate, endDate);\n  \n  const totalHours = dayjs(endDate).diff(dayjs(startDate), 'hour');\n  const bookedHours = reservations.reduce((acc, res) => {\n    const duration = res.end_time.toMillis() - res.start_time.toMillis();\n    return acc + (duration / (1000 * 60 * 60)); // Convert to hours\n  }, 0);\n  \n  return {\n    totalHours,\n    bookedHours,\n    utilizationRate: totalHours > 0 ? (bookedHours / totalHours) * 100 : 0\n  };\n};\n\n/**\n * Get peak hours analysis\n */\nexport const getPeakHoursAnalysis = async (\n  date: Date\n): Promise<{ hour: number; count: number }[]> => {\n  const reservations = await getAllReservations(\n    startOfDay(date),\n    endOfDay(date)\n  );\n  \n  const hourCounts = new Map<number, number>();\n  \n  reservations.forEach(res => {\n    const hour = toLocalTime(res.start_time.toDate()).hour();\n    hourCounts.set(hour, (hourCounts.get(hour) || 0) + 1);\n  });\n  \n  return Array.from(hourCounts.entries())\n    .map(([hour, count]) => ({ hour, count }))\n    .sort((a, b) => a.hour - b.hour);\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. User Service\n\n### `src/services/userService.ts`\n\n```typescript\nimport { db, auth } from '../config/firebase.config';\nimport {\n  collection,\n  doc,\n  query,\n  where,\n  getDocs,\n  getDoc,\n  setDoc,\n  updateDoc,\n  deleteDoc,\n  onSnapshot,\n  Timestamp\n} from 'firebase/firestore';\nimport {\n  createUserWithEmailAndPassword,\n  signInWithEmailAndPassword,\n  signOut,\n  onAuthStateChanged,\n  updateProfile\n} from 'firebase/auth';\nimport { User, UserRole, UserStatus } from '../types/user.types';\n\nconst COLLECTION_NAME = 'users';\n\n// ==========================================\n// AUTHENTICATION\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Register a new user\n */\nexport const registerUser = async (\n  email: string,\n  password: string,\n  name: string,\n  role: UserRole = 'client'\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; user?: User; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(auth, email, password);\n    const user = userCredential.user;\n\n    // Update auth profile\n    await updateProfile(user, { displayName: name });\n\n    // Create user document\n    const userData: Omit<User, 'uid'> = {\n      name,\n      email,\n      role,\n      status: 'online',\n      createdAt: Timestamp.now(),\n      updatedAt: Timestamp.now(),\n      lastLoginAt: Timestamp.now()\n    };\n\n    await setDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, user.uid), userData);\n\n    return { \n      success: true, \n      user: { uid: user.uid, ...userData } as User \n    };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error registering user:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Registration failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Sign in user\n */\nexport const signInUser = async (\n  email: string,\n  password: string\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; user?: User; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    const userCredential = await signInWithEmailAndPassword(auth, email, password);\n    const user = userCredential.user;\n\n    // Update last login\n    await updateDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, user.uid), {\n      lastLoginAt: Timestamp.now(),\n      status: 'online'\n    });\n\n    // Get user data\n    const userDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, user.uid));\n    \n    if (!userDoc.exists()) {\n      return { success: false, error: 'User profile not found' };\n    }\n\n    return { \n      success: true, \n      user: { uid: user.uid, ...userDoc.data() } as User \n    };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error signing in:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Sign in failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Sign out user\n */\nexport const signOutUser = async (): Promise<void> => {\n  await signOut(auth);\n};\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to auth state changes\n */\nexport const onAuthStateChange = (\n  callback: (user: User | null) => void\n) => {\n  return onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (firebaseUser) => {\n    if (!firebaseUser) {\n      callback(null);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const userDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, firebaseUser.uid));\n    \n    if (userDoc.exists()) {\n      callback({ uid: firebaseUser.uid, ...userDoc.data() } as User);\n    } else {\n      callback(null);\n    }\n  });\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// USER PROFILE\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Get user profile by UID\n */\nexport const getUserProfile = async (uid: string): Promise<User | null> => {\n  const userDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, uid));\n  return userDoc.exists() ? { uid: userDoc.id, ...userDoc.data() } as User : null;\n};\n\n/**\n * Get user profile by email\n */\nexport const getUserByEmail = async (email: string): Promise<User | null> => {\n  const q = query(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), where('email', '==', email));\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  \n  if (snapshot.empty) return null;\n  \n  const doc = snapshot.docs[0];\n  return { uid: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as User;\n};\n\n/**\n * Update user profile\n */\nexport const updateUserProfile = async (\n  uid: string,\n  updates: Partial<Omit<User, 'uid' | 'createdAt'>>\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    await updateDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, uid), {\n      ...updates,\n      updatedAt: Timestamp.now()\n    });\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error updating profile:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Update failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Update user status\n */\nexport const updateUserStatus = async (\n  uid: string,\n  status: UserStatus\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  return updateUserProfile(uid, { status });\n};\n\n/**\n * Delete user account (admin only)\n */\nexport const deleteUserAccount = async (uid: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    await deleteDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, uid));\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error deleting user:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Delete failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// USER QUERIES\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Get all users\n */\nexport const getAllUsers = async (): Promise<User[]> => {\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME));\n  return snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ uid: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as User));\n};\n\n/**\n * Get users by role\n */\nexport const getUsersByRole = async (role: UserRole): Promise<User[]> => {\n  const q = query(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), where('role', '==', role));\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  return snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ uid: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as User));\n};\n\n/**\n * Get all moniteurs\n */\nexport const getAllMoniteurs = async (): Promise<User[]> => {\n  return getUsersByRole('moniteur');\n};\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to all users (for admin directory)\n */\nexport const subscribeToAllUsers = (\n  callback: (users: User[]) => void\n) => {\n  return onSnapshot(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), (snapshot) => {\n    const users = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ uid: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as User));\n    callback(users);\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Search users by name\n */\nexport const searchUsers = async (searchTerm: string): Promise<User[]> => {\n  const allUsers = await getAllUsers();\n  const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();\n  \n  return allUsers.filter(user => \n    user.name.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||\n    user.email.toLowerCase().includes(term)\n  );\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. Court Service\n\n### `src/services/courtService.ts`\n\n```typescript\nimport { db } from '../config/firebase.config';\nimport {\n  collection,\n  doc,\n  query,\n  where,\n  getDocs,\n  getDoc,\n  setDoc,\n  updateDoc,\n  deleteDoc,\n  onSnapshot,\n  Timestamp\n} from 'firebase/firestore';\nimport { Court, CourtType, CourtStatus } from '../types/court.types';\n\nconst COLLECTION_NAME = 'courts';\n\n// ==========================================\n// REAL-TIME SUBSCRIPTIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to all courts\n */\nexport const subscribeToAllCourts = (\n  callback: (courts: Court[]) => void\n) => {\n  return onSnapshot(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), (snapshot) => {\n    const courts = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Court));\n    // Sort by court number\n    courts.sort((a, b) => a.number - b.number);\n    callback(courts);\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to active courts only\n */\nexport const subscribeToActiveCourts = (\n  callback: (courts: Court[]) => void\n) => {\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('is_active', '==', true)\n  );\n\n  return onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {\n    const courts = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Court));\n    courts.sort((a, b) => a.number - b.number);\n    callback(courts);\n  });\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// QUERY FUNCTIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Get all courts\n */\nexport const getAllCourts = async (): Promise<Court[]> => {\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME));\n  const courts = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Court));\n  courts.sort((a, b) => a.number - b.number);\n  return courts;\n};\n\n/**\n * Get active courts only\n */\nexport const getActiveCourts = async (): Promise<Court[]> => {\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('is_active', '==', true)\n  );\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  const courts = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Court));\n  courts.sort((a, b) => a.number - b.number);\n  return courts;\n};\n\n/**\n * Get court by ID\n */\nexport const getCourtById = async (courtId: string): Promise<Court | null> => {\n  const courtDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, courtId));\n  return courtDoc.exists() ? { id: courtDoc.id, ...courtDoc.data() } as Court : null;\n};\n\n/**\n * Get courts by type\n */\nexport const getCourtsByType = async (type: CourtType): Promise<Court[]> => {\n  const q = query(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), where('type', '==', type));\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  return snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Court));\n};\n\n/**\n * Get courts by status\n */\nexport const getCourtsByStatus = async (status: CourtStatus): Promise<Court[]> => {\n  const q = query(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), where('status', '==', status));\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  return snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Court));\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// CRUD OPERATIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Create a new court (admin only)\n */\nexport const createCourt = async (\n  courtData: Omit<Court, 'id' | 'createdAt' | 'updatedAt'>\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; courtId?: string; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    const courtRef = doc(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME));\n    const newCourt: Omit<Court, 'id'> = {\n      ...courtData,\n      createdAt: Timestamp.now(),\n      updatedAt: Timestamp.now()\n    };\n\n    await setDoc(courtRef, newCourt);\n    return { success: true, courtId: courtRef.id };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error creating court:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Create failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Update court (admin only)\n */\nexport const updateCourt = async (\n  courtId: string,\n  updates: Partial<Court>\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    await updateDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, courtId), {\n      ...updates,\n      updatedAt: Timestamp.now()\n    });\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error updating court:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Update failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Update court status\n */\nexport const updateCourtStatus = async (\n  courtId: string,\n  status: CourtStatus\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  return updateCourt(courtId, { status, is_active: status === 'active' });\n};\n\n/**\n * Toggle court active status\n */\nexport const toggleCourtActive = async (\n  courtId: string\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string; newStatus?: boolean }> => {\n  try {\n    const courtDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, courtId));\n    \n    if (!courtDoc.exists()) {\n      return { success: false, error: 'Court not found' };\n    }\n\n    const currentData = courtDoc.data() as Court;\n    const newActiveStatus = !currentData.is_active;\n\n    await updateDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, courtId), {\n      is_active: newActiveStatus,\n      status: newActiveStatus ? 'active' : 'maintenance',\n      updatedAt: Timestamp.now()\n    });\n\n    return { success: true, newStatus: newActiveStatus };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error toggling court status:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Toggle failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Delete court (admin only)\n */\nexport const deleteCourt = async (courtId: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    await deleteDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, courtId));\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error deleting court:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Delete failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// INITIALIZATION\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Initialize default courts (seed data)\n */\nexport const initializeDefaultCourts = async (): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  const defaultCourts = [\n    { number: 1, name: 'Grand Court East', type: 'Quick', surface: 'Hard', status: 'active', is_active: true },\n    { number: 2, name: 'Center Stage', type: 'Quick', surface: 'Hard', status: 'active', is_active: true },\n    { number: 3, name: 'Shadow View', type: 'Quick', surface: 'Hard', status: 'active', is_active: true },\n    { number: 4, name: 'Training Zone', type: 'Quick', surface: 'Hard', status: 'active', is_active: true },\n    { number: 5, name: 'Clay Court North', type: 'Terre', surface: 'Clay', status: 'active', is_active: true },\n    { number: 6, name: 'West End', type: 'Terre', surface: 'Clay', status: 'active', is_active: true }\n  ];\n\n  try {\n    for (const court of defaultCourts) {\n      const courtId = `court_${court.number.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;\n      const courtRef = doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, courtId);\n      const courtDoc = await getDoc(courtRef);\n\n      if (!courtDoc.exists()) {\n        await setDoc(courtRef, {\n          ...court,\n          createdAt: Timestamp.now(),\n          updatedAt: Timestamp.now()\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error initializing courts:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Initialization failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. Slot Service (Moniteur Availability)\n\n### `src/services/slotService.ts`\n\n```typescript\nimport { db } from '../config/firebase.config';\nimport {\n  collection,\n  doc,\n  query,\n  where,\n  orderBy,\n  getDocs,\n  getDoc,\n  setDoc,\n  updateDoc,\n  deleteDoc,\n  onSnapshot,\n  Timestamp,\n  increment\n} from 'firebase/firestore';\nimport dayjs from 'dayjs';\nimport { MoniteurSlot, SlotType, SlotStatus } from '../types/slot.types';\n\nconst COLLECTION_NAME = 'slots_moniteurs';\n\n// ==========================================\n// REAL-TIME SUBSCRIPTIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to moniteur's slots for a date range\n */\nexport const subscribeToMoniteurSlots = (\n  moniteurId: string,\n  startDate: string, // YYYY-MM-DD\n  endDate: string,   // YYYY-MM-DD\n  callback: (slots: MoniteurSlot[]) => void\n) => {\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('moniteur_id', '==', moniteurId),\n    where('date', '>=', startDate),\n    where('date', '<=', endDate),\n    orderBy('date', 'asc')\n  );\n\n  return onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {\n    const slots = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as MoniteurSlot));\n    callback(slots);\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Subscribe to available slots for a date\n */\nexport const subscribeToAvailableSlots = (\n  date: string,\n  type?: SlotType,\n  callback: (slots: MoniteurSlot[]) => void\n) => {\n  const constraints: any[] = [\n    where('date', '==', date),\n    where('status', '==', 'available')\n  ];\n\n  if (type) {\n    constraints.push(where('type', '==', type));\n  }\n\n  const q = query(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), ...constraints);\n\n  return onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {\n    const slots = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as MoniteurSlot));\n    callback(slots);\n  });\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// QUERY FUNCTIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Get moniteur's slots for a date range\n */\nexport const getMoniteurSlots = async (\n  moniteurId: string,\n  startDate: string,\n  endDate: string\n): Promise<MoniteurSlot[]> => {\n  const q = query(\n    collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME),\n    where('moniteur_id', '==', moniteurId),\n    where('date', '>=', startDate),\n    where('date', '<=', endDate),\n    orderBy('date', 'asc')\n  );\n\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  return snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as MoniteurSlot));\n};\n\n/**\n * Get available slots for a date\n */\nexport const getAvailableSlots = async (\n  date: string,\n  type?: SlotType\n): Promise<MoniteurSlot[]> => {\n  const constraints: any[] = [\n    where('date', '==', date),\n    where('status', '==', 'available')\n  ];\n\n  if (type) {\n    constraints.push(where('type', '==', type));\n  }\n\n  const q = query(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME), ...constraints);\n  const snapshot = await getDocs(q);\n  return snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as MoniteurSlot));\n};\n\n/**\n * Get slot by ID\n */\nexport const getSlotById = async (slotId: string): Promise<MoniteurSlot | null> => {\n  const slotDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, slotId));\n  return slotDoc.exists() ? { id: slotDoc.id, ...slotDoc.data() } as MoniteurSlot : null;\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// CRUD OPERATIONS\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Create a new availability slot\n */\nexport const createSlot = async (\n  slotData: Omit<MoniteurSlot, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; slotId?: string; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    const slotRef = doc(collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME));\n    const newSlot: Omit<MoniteurSlot, 'id'> = {\n      ...slotData,\n      created_at: Timestamp.now(),\n      updated_at: Timestamp.now()\n    };\n\n    await setDoc(slotRef, newSlot);\n    return { success: true, slotId: slotRef.id };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error creating slot:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Create failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Update a slot\n */\nexport const updateSlot = async (\n  slotId: string,\n  updates: Partial<MoniteurSlot>\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    await updateDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, slotId), {\n      ...updates,\n      updated_at: Timestamp.now()\n    });\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error updating slot:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Update failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Book a slot (increment participant count)\n */\nexport const bookSlot = async (\n  slotId: string\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    const slotDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, slotId));\n    \n    if (!slotDoc.exists()) {\n      return { success: false, error: 'Slot not found' };\n    }\n\n    const slotData = slotDoc.data() as MoniteurSlot;\n    \n    if (slotData.status !== 'available') {\n      return { success: false, error: 'Slot not available' };\n    }\n\n    if (slotData.max_participants && slotData.current_participants && \n        slotData.current_participants >= slotData.max_participants) {\n      return { success: false, error: 'Slot is full' };\n    }\n\n    await updateDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, slotId), {\n      current_participants: increment(1),\n      status: (slotData.current_participants || 0) + 1 >= (slotData.max_participants || Infinity)\n        ? 'booked'\n        : 'available',\n      updated_at: Timestamp.now()\n    });\n\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error booking slot:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Booking failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Cancel a slot booking\n */\nexport const cancelSlotBooking = async (\n  slotId: string\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    const slotDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, slotId));\n    \n    if (!slotDoc.exists()) {\n      return { success: false, error: 'Slot not found' };\n    }\n\n    const slotData = slotDoc.data() as MoniteurSlot;\n    \n    if (slotData.current_participants && slotData.current_participants > 0) {\n      await updateDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, slotId), {\n        current_participants: increment(-1),\n        status: 'available',\n        updated_at: Timestamp.now()\n      });\n    }\n\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error cancelling slot booking:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Cancel failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Delete a slot\n */\nexport const deleteSlot = async (slotId: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    await deleteDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, slotId));\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error deleting slot:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Delete failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Cancel all slots for a date\n */\nexport const cancelSlotsForDate = async (\n  moniteurId: string,\n  date: string\n): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> => {\n  try {\n    const slots = await getMoniteurSlots(moniteurId, date, date);\n    \n    const updatePromises = slots.map(slot =>\n      updateDoc(doc(db, COLLECTION_NAME, slot.id), {\n        status: 'cancelled',\n        updated_at: Timestamp.now()\n      })\n    );\n\n    await Promise.all(updatePromises);\n    return { success: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error cancelling slots:', error);\n    return { \n      success: false, \n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Cancel failed' \n    };\n  }\n};\n\n// ==========================================\n// UTILITIES\n// ==========================================\n\n/**\n * Get weekly slots (Monday to Sunday)\n */\nexport const getWeeklySlots = async (\n  moniteurId: string,\n  weekStart: Date\n): Promise<MoniteurSlot[]> => {\n  const start = dayjs(weekStart).startOf('week').format('YYYY-MM-DD');\n  const end = dayjs(weekStart).endOf('week').format('YYYY-MM-DD');\n  \n  return getMoniteurSlots(moniteurId, start, end);\n};\n\n/**\n * Check if moniteur is available at a specific time\n */\nexport const isMoniteurAvailable = async (\n  moniteurId: string,\n  date: string,\n  startTime: string,\n  endTime: string\n): Promise<boolean> => {\n  const slots = await getMoniteurSlots(moniteurId, date, date);\n  \n  return slots.some(slot => \n    slot.status === 'available' &&\n    slot.start_time <= startTime &&\n    slot.end_time >= endTime\n  );\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## 6. Service Index\n\n### `src/services/index.ts`\n\n```typescript\n// Export all services\nexport * from './reservationService';\nexport * from './userService';\nexport * from './courtService';\nexport * from './slotService';\n\n// Export types\nexport type { User, UserRole, UserStatus } from '../types/user.types';\nexport type { Court, CourtType, CourtStatus } from '../types/court.types';\nexport type { Reservation, ReservationType, ReservationStatus } from '../types/reservation.types';\nexport type { MoniteurSlot, SlotType, SlotStatus } from '../types/slot.types';\n```\n\n---\n\n## 7. Usage Examples\n\n### Creating a Reservation\n\n```typescript\nimport { createReservation, checkCourtAvailability } from '@/services/reservationService';\nimport { Timestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';\nimport dayjs from 'dayjs';\n\nconst handleBooking = async () => {\n  const startTime = dayjs('2024-01-20T10:00:00').tz('America/Martinique');\n  const endTime = startTime.add(1, 'hour');\n  \n  // Check availability first\n  const availability = await checkCourtAvailability('court_01', startTime.toDate(), endTime.toDate());\n  \n  if (!availability.available) {\n    alert('Court is not available');\n    return;\n  }\n  \n  // Create reservation\n  const result = await createReservation({\n    court_id: 'court_01',\n    user_id: 'user_123',\n    start_time: Timestamp.fromDate(startTime.toDate()),\n    end_time: Timestamp.fromDate(endTime.toDate()),\n    type: 'location_libre',\n    status: 'confirmed',\n    title: 'John Doe',\n    participants: 2\n  });\n  \n  if (result.success) {\n    console.log('Reservation created:', result.reservationId);\n  } else {\n    console.error('Error:', result.error);\n  }\n};\n```\n\n### Real-time Court Updates\n\n```typescript\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\nimport { subscribeToAllCourts } from '@/services/courtService';\n\nconst CourtGrid = () => {\n  const [courts, setCourts] = useState([]);\n  \n  useEffect(() => {\n    const unsubscribe = subscribeToAllCourts((updatedCourts) => {\n      setCourts(updatedCourts);\n    });\n    \n    return () => unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n  \n  return (\n    <div>\n      {courts.map(court => (\n        <CourtCard key={court.id} court={court} />\n      ))}\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## 8. Next Steps\n\nAfter implementing services:\n1. ✅ Test all service functions with Firebase Emulator\n2. ✅ Verify real-time subscriptions work correctly\n3. 📖 Proceed to [05_COMPONENTS.md](./05_COMPONENTS.md)\n",
````
