```

### 3.3 Index Justification

| Index | Purpose | Used By |
|-------|---------|---------|
| `courts[is_active + number]` | Get active courts sorted by number | `getActiveCourts()`, `subscribeToActiveCourts()` |
| `courts[status + type]` | Filter courts by status and type | `getCourtsByType()`, `getCourtsByStatus()` |
| `reservations[court_id + start_time + status]` | Get confirmed reservations for a court | `checkCourtAvailability()`, `getCourtReservations()` |
| `reservations[user_id + start_time]` | Get user's future reservations | `getUserReservations()`, `subscribeToUserReservations()` |
| `reservations[moniteur_id + start_time]` | Get instructor's lessons | `getMoniteurLessons()`, `subscribeToMoniteurLessons()` |
| `reservations[start_time + status]` | Get today's confirmed reservations | Admin dashboard |
| `reservations[court_id + end_time + start_time]` | Conflict detection query | `checkCourtAvailability()` transaction |
| `slots_moniteurs[moniteur_id + date]` | Get instructor's weekly schedule | `getMoniteurSlots()`, `subscribeToMoniteurSlots()` |
| `slots_moniteurs[date + status + type]` | Get available slots for a date | `getAvailableSlots()` |
| `slots_moniteurs[status + date]` | Get all available slots | Public slot browsing |

---

## 4. Routing Plan (React Router v6.4+ Data Router)

### File: `src/router.tsx` (NEW)

```typescript
import { createBrowserRouter, redirect, type RouteObject } from 'react-router-dom';
import { RootLayout } from '@components/layout/RootLayout';
import { ErrorBoundary } from '@components/ui/ErrorBoundary';
import { auth } from '@firebase/config';
import { getUserProfile } from '@services/userService';
import type { User, UserRole } from '@types';

// ==========================================
// LOADER FUNCTIONS
// ==========================================

/**
 * Check authentication status
 */
const checkAuth = async (): Promise<User | null> => {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    const user = auth.currentUser;
    if (!user) {
      resolve(null);
      return;
    }
    getUserProfile(user.uid).then(resolve);
  });
};

/**
 * Protect route - redirect if not authenticated
 */
const requireAuth = async (requiredRole?: UserRole | UserRole[]): Promise<User | null> => {
  const user = await checkAuth();
  
  if (!user) {
    throw redirect('/login');
  }

  if (requiredRole) {
    const roles = Array.isArray(requiredRole) ? requiredRole : [requiredRole];
    if (!roles.includes(user.role)) {
      throw redirect('/unauthorized');
    }
  }

  return user;
};

/**
 * Courts loader - fetch all courts
 */
const courtsLoader = async () => {
  const { getActiveCourts } = await import('@services/courtService');
  try {
    const courts = await getActiveCourts();
    return { courts, error: null };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error loading courts:', error);
    return { courts: [], error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Failed to load courts' };
  }
};

/**
 * User reservations loader
 */
const userReservationsLoader = async () => {
  const user = await requireAuth();
  const { getUserReservations } = await import('@services/reservationService');
  
  try {
    const reservations = await getUserReservations(user.uid);
    return { reservations, error: null };
  } catch (error) {
    return { reservations: [], error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Failed to load reservations' };
  }
};

/**
 * Admin reservations loader
 */
const adminReservationsLoader = async () => {
  await requireAuth('admin');
  const { getAllReservations } = await import('@services/reservationService');
  
  try {
    const reservations = await getAllReservations();
    return { reservations, error: null };
  } catch (error) {
    return { reservations: [], error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Failed to load reservations' };
  }
};

/**
 * Moniteur slots loader
 */
const moniteurSlotsLoader = async () => {
  const user = await requireAuth(['admin', 'moniteur']);
  const { getMoniteurSlots } = await import('@services/slotService');
  
  try {
    const slots = await getMoniteurSlots(user.uid);
    return { slots, error: null };
  } catch (error) {
    return { slots: [], error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Failed to load slots' };
  }
};

// ==========================================
// ROUTE CONFIGURATION
// ==========================================

const routes: RouteObject[] = [
  {
    path: '/',
    element: <RootLayout />,
    errorElement: <RootErrorBoundary />,
    children: [
      // Public Routes
      {
        index: true,
        lazy: async () => {
          const { LandingPage } = await import('@pages/Landing');
          return { Component: LandingPage };
        },
        loader: courtsLoader,
        errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="Landing Page" />,
      },
      {
        path: 'courts',
        lazy: async () => {
          const { CourtsPage } = await import('@pages/Courts');
          return { Component: CourtsPage };
        },
        loader: courtsLoader,
        errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="Courts Page" />,
      },
      {
        path: 'login',
        lazy: async () => {
          const { LoginPage } = await import('@pages/Auth/Login');
          return { Component: LoginPage };
        },
      },
      {
        path: 'register',
        lazy: async () => {
          const { RegisterPage } = await import('@pages/Auth/Register');
          return { Component: RegisterPage };
        },
      },

      // Protected Client Routes
      {
        path: 'client',
        loader: () => requireAuth(['admin', 'moniteur', 'client']),
        children: [
          {
            index: true,
            loader: () => redirect('/client/dashboard'),
          },
          {
            path: 'dashboard',
            lazy: async () => {
              const { ClientDashboard } = await import('@pages/Client/Dashboard');
              return { Component: ClientDashboard };
            },
            errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="Client Dashboard" />,
          },
          {
            path: 'booking',
            lazy: async () => {
              const { BookingPage } = await import('@pages/Client/Booking');
              return { Component: BookingPage };
            },
            loader: courtsLoader,
            errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="Booking Page" />,
          },
          {
            path: 'reservations',
            lazy: async () => {
              const { MyReservationsPage } = await import('@pages/Client/MyReservations');
              return { Component: MyReservationsPage };
            },
            loader: userReservationsLoader,
            errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="My Reservations" />,
          },
        ],
      },

      // Protected Admin Routes
      {
        path: 'admin',
        loader: () => requireAuth('admin'),
        children: [
          {
            index: true,
            loader: () => redirect('/admin/dashboard'),
          },
          {
            path: 'dashboard',
            lazy: async () => {
              const { AdminDashboard } = await import('@pages/Admin/Dashboard');
              return { Component: AdminDashboard };
            },
            errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="Admin Dashboard" />,
          },
          {
            path: 'reservations',
            lazy: async () => {
              const { AdminReservationsPage } = await import('@pages/Admin/Reservations');
              return { Component: AdminReservationsPage };
            },
            loader: adminReservationsLoader,
            errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="Admin Reservations" />,
          },
          {
            path: 'courts',
            lazy: async () => {
              const { AdminCourtsPage } = await import('@pages/Admin/Courts');
              return { Component: AdminCourtsPage };
            },
            loader: courtsLoader,
            errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="Admin Courts" />,
          },
        ],
      },

      // Protected Moniteur Routes
      {
        path: 'moniteur',
        loader: () => requireAuth(['admin', 'moniteur']),
        children: [
          {
            index: true,
            loader: () => redirect('/moniteur/dashboard'),
          },
          {
            path: 'dashboard',
            lazy: async () => {
              const { MoniteurDashboard } = await import('@pages/Moniteur/Dashboard');
              return { Component: MoniteurDashboard };
            },
            errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="Moniteur Dashboard" />,
          },
          {
            path: 'schedule',
            lazy: async () => {
              const { MoniteurSchedulePage } = await import('@pages/Moniteur/Schedule');
              return { Component: MoniteurSchedulePage };
            },
            loader: moniteurSlotsLoader,
            errorElement: <ErrorBoundary feature="Moniteur Schedule" />,
          },
        ],
      },

      // Error Pages
      {
        path: 'unauthorized',
        lazy: async () => {
          const { UnauthorizedPage } = await import('@pages/Errors/Unauthorized');
          return { Component: UnauthorizedPage };
        },
      },
      {
        path: '*',
        lazy: async () => {
          const { NotFoundPage } = await import('@pages/Errors/NotFound');
          return { Component: NotFoundPage };
        },
      },
    ],
  },
];

export const router = createBrowserRouter(routes);
```

### Route Map Summary

| Path | Component | Access | Loader | Error Element |
|------|-----------|--------|--------|---------------|
| `/` | `LandingPage` | Public | `courtsLoader` | `ErrorBoundary feature="Landing Page"` |
| `/courts` | `CourtsPage` | Public | `courtsLoader` | `ErrorBoundary feature="Courts Page"` |
| `/login` | `LoginPage` | Public | None | `ErrorBoundary feature="Login"` |
| `/register` | `RegisterPage` | Public | None | `ErrorBoundary feature="Register"` |
| `/client/dashboard` | `ClientDashboard` | Auth | `requireAuth(['admin', 'moniteur', 'client'])` | `ErrorBoundary feature="Client Dashboard"` |
| `/client/booking` | `BookingPage` | Auth | `courtsLoader` + auth check | `ErrorBoundary feature="Booking Page"` |
| `/client/reservations` | `MyReservationsPage` | Auth | `userReservationsLoader` | `ErrorBoundary feature="My Reservations"` |
| `/admin/dashboard` | `AdminDashboard` | Admin | `requireAuth('admin')` | `ErrorBoundary feature="Admin Dashboard"` |
| `/admin/reservations` | `AdminReservationsPage` | Admin | `adminReservationsLoader` | `ErrorBoundary feature="Admin Reservations"` |
| `/admin/courts` | `AdminCourtsPage` | Admin | `courtsLoader` + auth check | `ErrorBoundary feature="Admin Courts"` |
| `/moniteur/dashboard` | `MoniteurDashboard` | Moniteur/Admin | `requireAuth(['admin', 'moniteur'])` | `ErrorBoundary feature="Moniteur Dashboard"` |
| `/moniteur/schedule` | `MoniteurSchedulePage` | Moniteur/Admin | `moniteurSlotsLoader` | `ErrorBoundary feature="Moniteur Schedule"` |
| `/unauthorized` | `UnauthorizedPage` | Public | None | None |
| `*` | `NotFoundPage` | Public | None | None |

## 5. Error Boundaries

### 5.1 Error Boundary Component Structure

#### File: `src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary/ErrorBoundary.tsx` (NEW)

```typescript
import React, { Component, ErrorInfo } from 'react';
import { FirebaseErrorCode, AppError } from '@types/error.types';

interface Props {
  children: React.ReactNode;
  feature?: string;
  fallback?: React.ComponentType<{ error: Error; resetError: () => void }>;
  onError?: (error: Error, info: ErrorInfo) => void;
}

interface State {
  hasError: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
  errorInfo: ErrorInfo | null;
}

export class ErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {
  constructor(props: Props) {
    super(props);
    this.state = {
      hasError: false,
      error: null,
      errorInfo: null,
    };
  }

  static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): Partial<State> {
    return { hasError: true, error };
  }

  componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo): void {
    this.setState({ errorInfo });
    
    // Log to monitoring service
    console.error(`[${this.props.feature || 'App'}] Error:`, error, errorInfo);
    
    // Call custom error handler
    this.props.onError?.(error, errorInfo);
  }

  private getErrorMessage(error: Error): string {
    const message = error.message.toLowerCase();
    
    // Firebase-specific error messages
    if (message.includes('permission-denied')) {
      return 'You do not have permission to access this resource.';
    }
    if (message.includes('unavailable')) {
      return 'Service temporarily unavailable. Please check your connection.';
    }
    if (message.includes('quota-exceeded')) {
      return 'Storage quota exceeded. Please contact support.';
    }
    if (message.includes('invalid-state') || message.includes('failed-precondition')) {
      return 'Database error. Please refresh the page.';
    }
    if (message.includes('unauthenticated')) {
      return 'Please sign in to continue.';
    }
    
    return this.props.feature 
      ? `An error occurred in ${this.props.feature}. Please try again.`
      : 'An unexpected error occurred.';
  }

  private resetError = (): void => {
    this.setState({ hasError: false, error: null, errorInfo: null });
  };

  render(): React.ReactNode {
    if (this.state.hasError) {
      // Use custom fallback if provided
      if (this.props.fallback) {
        const FallbackComponent = this.props.fallback;
        return <FallbackComponent error={this.state.error!} resetError={this.resetError} />;
      }

      // Default error UI
      return (
        <div className="min-h-[400px] flex items-center justify-center p-6 bg-surface-container-low">
          <div className="max-w-md w-full bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-8 text-center shadow-sm">
            <div className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 rounded-full bg-tertiary/10 flex items-center justify-center">
              <span className="text-tertiary text-2xl">!</span>
            </div>
            <h2 className="font-headline text-xl font-semibold text-on-surface mb-2">
              Something went wrong
            </h2>
            <p className="text-body text-on-surface/70 mb-6">
              {this.getErrorMessage(this.state.error!)}
            </p>
            <button
              onClick={this.resetError}
              className="btn-primary"
            >
              Try Again
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      );
    }

    return this.props.children;
  }
}
```

#### File: `src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary/RootErrorBoundary.tsx` (NEW)

```typescript
import React, { Component, ErrorInfo } from 'react';
import { isRouteErrorResponse, useRouteError } from 'react-router-dom';
import { FirebaseErrorCode } from '@types/error.types';

interface RootErrorBoundaryProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}

interface State {
  hasError: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
  errorType: 'firebase' | 'network' | 'quota' | 'permission' | 'unknown';
}

export class RootErrorBoundary extends Component<RootErrorBoundaryProps, State> {
  constructor(props: RootErrorBoundaryProps) {
    super(props);
    this.state = {
      hasError: false,
      error: null,
      errorType: 'unknown',
    };
  }

  static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): Partial<State> {
    let errorType: State['errorType'] = 'unknown';
    const message = error.message.toLowerCase();

    // Classify Firebase errors
    if (message.includes('quota-exceeded')) {
      errorType = 'quota';
    } else if (message.includes('invalid-state') || message.includes('failed-precondition')) {
      errorType = 'firebase';
    } else if (message.includes('permission-denied')) {
      errorType = 'permission';
    } else if (message.includes('unavailable') || message.includes('network')) {
      errorType = 'network';
    }

    return { hasError: true, error, errorType };
  }

  componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo): void {
    console.error('Root ErrorBoundary caught:', error, errorInfo);
    
    // Log to analytics/monitoring service
    // Example: analytics.logEvent('error', { type: this.state.errorType, message: error.message });
  }

  render(): React.ReactNode {
    if (this.state.hasError) {
      return (
        <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-surface p-6">
          <div className="max-w-lg w-full bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-2xl p-8 text-center shadow-lg">
            {/* Error Icon */}
            <div className="w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 rounded-full bg-tertiary/10 flex items-center justify-center">
              {this.state.errorType === 'network' && (
                <span className="text-3xl">📡</span>
              )}
              {this.state.errorType === 'quota' && (
                <span className="text-3xl">💾</span>
              )}
              {this.state.errorType === 'permission' && (
                <span className="text-3xl">🔒</span>
              )}
              {this.state.errorType === 'firebase' && (
                <span className="text-3xl">🔥</span>
              )}
              {this.state.errorType === 'unknown' && (
                <span className="text-3xl">⚠️</span>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Title */}
            <h1 className="font-headline text-2xl font-bold text-on-surface mb-3">
              {this.state.errorType === 'network' && 'Connection Issue'}
              {this.state.errorType === 'quota' && 'Storage Full'}
              {this.state.errorType === 'permission' && 'Access Denied'}
              {this.state.errorType === 'firebase' && 'Database Error'}
              {this.state.errorType === 'unknown' && 'Unexpected Error'}
            </h1>

            {/* Message */}
            <p className="text-body text-on-surface/70 mb-8">
              {this.state.errorType === 'network' && 
                'You appear to be offline. Please check your internet connection and try again.'}
              {this.state.errorType === 'quota' && 
                'The application storage quota has been exceeded. Please contact support.'}
              {this.state.errorType === 'permission' && 
                'You do not have permission to access this resource. Please sign in with a different account.'}
              {this.state.errorType === 'firebase' && 
                'A database error occurred. Please refresh the page or try again later.'}
              {this.state.errorType === 'unknown' && 
                'An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.'}
            </p>

            {/* Actions */}
            <div className="flex gap-4 justify-center">
              <button
                onClick={() => window.location.reload()}
                className="btn-primary"
              >
                Refresh Page
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => window.history.back()}
                className="btn-secondary"
              >
                Go Back
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* Error Details (Development Only) */}
            {import.meta.env.DEV && this.state.error && (
              <details className="mt-8 text-left">
                <summary className="text-sm text-on-surface/60 cursor-pointer">
                  Error Details (Development)
                </summary>
                <pre className="mt-2 p-4 bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg text-xs overflow-auto max-h-64">
                  {this.state.error.toString()}
                </pre>
              </details>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      );
    }

    return this.props.children;
  }
}

/**
 * Hook to use in route errorElement
 */
export const useRouteErrorHandler = (): {
  error: Error;
  isRouteError: boolean;
  status?: number;
  statusText?: string;
} => {
  const error = useRouteError();
  
  if (isRouteErrorResponse(error)) {
    return {
      error: new Error(error.statusText || `HTTP ${error.status}`),
      isRouteError: true,
      status: error.status,
      statusText: error.statusText,
    };
  }
  
  return {
    error: error as Error,
    isRouteError: false,
  };
};
```

### 5.2 Firebase Error Handling Matrix

| Firebase Error | Cause | Boundary Level | User Message | Recovery Action |
|----------------|-------|----------------|--------------|-----------------|
| `permission-denied` | Security rules block access | Feature | "You do not have permission to access this resource." | Redirect to login or dashboard |
| `unavailable` | Network offline, service down | Root | "Service temporarily unavailable. Please check your connection." | Retry with exponential backoff |
| `quota-exceeded` | Firestore storage full | Root | "Storage quota exceeded. Please contact support." | Contact admin, clear cache |
| `invalid-state` / `failed-precondition` | Private browsing, DB closed | Root | "Database error. Please refresh the page." | Refresh page, clear IndexedDB |
| `unauthenticated` | No auth token | Feature | "Please sign in to continue." | Redirect to login |
| `not-found` | Document doesn't exist | Feature | "This resource was not found." | Navigate back or to list |
| `already-exists` | Duplicate creation | Feature | "This resource already exists." | Fetch existing resource |
| `transaction-failed` | Concurrent modification | Feature | "Could not complete operation. Please try again." | Retry transaction |

## 7. Hooks to Create

### 7.1 `useCourts`

**File:** `src/hooks/useCourts.ts`

**Complete Signature:**
```typescript
export function useCourts(): {
  // Data
  courts: Court[];
  activeCourts: Court[];
  
  // State
  isLoading: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
  isSubscribed: boolean;
  
  // Actions
  refreshCourts: () => Promise<void>;
  getCourtById: (id: string) => Court | undefined;
  getCourtsByType: (type: CourtType) => Court[];
}
```

**Firebase Dependencies:**
- `subscribeToAllCourts()` from `courtService`
- `getActiveCourts()` from `courtService`

**Return Value Type:** `UseCourtsReturn` (defined in Section 2.2)

**Implementation Notes:**
- Use `onSnapshot` for real-time updates
- Maintain local state with `useState`
- Clean up subscription in `useEffect` cleanup function
- Handle errors with error state

---

### 7.2 `useReservations`

**File:** `src/hooks/useReservations.ts`

**Complete Signature:**
```typescript
export function useReservations(userId?: string): {
  // Data
  reservations: Reservation[];
  userReservations: Reservation[];
  courtReservations: (courtId: string, date: Date) => Reservation[];
  
  // State
  isLoading: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
  isSubscribed: boolean;
  
  // Actions
  createReservation: (input: CreateReservationInput) => Promise<CreateResult>;
  updateReservation: (id: string, updates: UpdateReservationInput) => Promise<ServiceResult>;
  cancelReservation: (id: string) => Promise<ServiceResult>;
  deleteReservation: (id: string) => Promise<ServiceResult>;
  refreshReservations: () => Promise<void>;
}
```

**Firebase Dependencies:**
- `createReservation()` from `reservationService`
- `updateReservation()` from `reservationService`
- `cancelReservation()` from `reservationService`
- `subscribeToUserReservations()` from `reservationService`
- `getCourtReservations()` from `reservationService`

**Return Value Type:** `UseReservationsReturn` (defined in Section 2.2)

**Implementation Notes:**
- Accept optional `userId` parameter for filtering
- Use transactions for create/update to prevent conflicts
- Real-time subscription to user's reservations
- Optimistic updates for better UX

---

### 7.3 `useAvailability`

**File:** `src/hooks/useAvailability.ts`

**Complete Signature:**
```typescript
export function useAvailability(): {
  // State
  isLoading: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
  checkingSlots: string[]; // Court IDs being checked
  
  // Actions
  checkAvailability: (
    courtId: string,
    startTime: Date,
    endTime: Date
  ) => Promise<AvailabilityResult>;
  
  getAvailableSlots: (
    courtId: string,
    date: Date,
    slotDurationMinutes?: number
  ) => Promise<TimeSlotWithAvailability[]>;
  
  isCourtAvailable: (
    courtId: string,
    startTime: Date,
    endTime: Date
  ) => boolean;
  
  getCourtAvailabilityForDate: (
    courtId: string,
    date: Date
  ) => Promise<TimeSlotWithAvailability[]>;
}
```

**Firebase Dependencies:**
- `checkCourtAvailability()` from `reservationService`
- `getAvailableSlots()` from `reservationService`

**Return Value Type:** `UseAvailabilityReturn` (defined in Section 2.2)

**Implementation Notes:**
- Cache availability results to reduce queries
- Debounce rapid availability checks
- Use `Timestamp` for Firestore queries
- Handle timezone conversion (America/Martinique)

---

### 7.4 `useNavigation`

**File:** `src/hooks/useNavigation.ts`

**Complete Signature:**
```typescript
export function useNavigation(): {
  // Navigation functions
  navigateToDashboard: () => void;
  navigateToLogin: () => void;
  navigateBack: () => void;
  navigateToCourtBooking: (courtId?: string) => void;
  navigateToReservationDetails: (reservationId: string) => void;
  navigateToMoniteurSchedule: () => void;
  navigateToAdminPanel: () => void;
  
  // State
  currentPath: string;
  userRole: UserRole | null;
  isAuthenticated: boolean;
  
  // Utilities
  canAccessRoute: (requiredRole?: UserRole | UserRole[]) => boolean;
  getDashboardPath: () => string;
}
```

**Firebase Dependencies:**
- None (pure React Router hook wrapper)

**Return Value Type:** `UseNavigationReturn` (defined in Section 2.2)

**Implementation Notes:**
- Wrap `useNavigate` and `useLocation` from React Router
- Access user from auth context or service
- Role-based navigation logic
- Memoize navigation functions

---

### 7.5 `useRouteGuard`

**File:** `src/hooks/useRouteGuard.ts`

**Complete Signature:**
```typescript
export function useRouteGuard(options?: {
  requiredRole?: UserRole;
  allowRoles?: UserRole[];
  redirectTo?: string;
}): {
  // State
  isAuthorized: boolean;
  isLoading: boolean;
  redirectTo: string | null;
  user: User | null;
  
  // Actions
  checkAccess: () => Promise<boolean>;
}
```

**Firebase Dependencies:**
- `auth.currentUser` from Firebase Auth
- `getUserProfile()` from `userService`

**Return Value Type:** `UseRouteGuardReturn` (defined in Section 2.2)

**Implementation Notes:**
- Check authentication status
- Validate user role against requirements
- Return redirect path if unauthorized
- Use in route loaders and components

```

**Critical Implementation Notes:**
- `createReservation` MUST use `runTransaction()` to prevent double-booking
- Check availability within transaction before creating
- Throw error on conflict - transaction will rollback automatically
- Use `Timestamp` for all datetime fields

## 9. Utility Functions

### 9.1 Timezone Utilities

**File:** `src/utils/timezone.ts`

```typescript
import dayjs from 'dayjs';
import utc from 'dayjs/plugin/utc';
import timezone from 'dayjs/plugin/timezone';
import { Timestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';

dayjs.extend(utc);
dayjs.extend(timezone);

const TIMEZONE = 'America/Martinique';

/**
 * Convert date to Martinique timezone
 */
export const toMartiniqueTime = (date: Date | string): dayjs.Dayjs => {
  return dayjs(date).tz(TIMEZONE);
};

/**
 * Get start of day in Martinique timezone
 */
export const startOfDay = (date: Date): Date => {
  return toMartiniqueTime(date).startOf('day').toDate();
};

/**
 * Get end of day in Martinique timezone
 */
export const endOfDay = (date: Date): Date => {
  return toMartiniqueTime(date).endOf('day').toDate();
};

/**
 * Convert to Firestore Timestamp
 */
export const toTimestamp = (date: Date): Timestamp => {
  return Timestamp.fromDate(date);
};

/**
 * Convert Firestore Timestamp to Date in Martinique timezone
 */
export const fromTimestamp = (timestamp: Timestamp): Date => {
  return toMartiniqueTime(timestamp.toDate()).toDate();
};

/**
 * Format time for display
 */
export const formatTime = (date: Date): string => {
  return toMartiniqueTime(date).format('HH:mm');
};

/**
 * Format date for display
 */
export const formatDate = (date: Date): string => {
  return toMartiniqueTime(date).format('dddd, MMMM D, YYYY');
};

/**
 * Format datetime for display
 */
export const formatDateTime = (date: Date): string => {
  return toMartiniqueTime(date).format('dddd, MMMM D, YYYY [at] HH:mm');
};

/**
 * Get current date in Martinique timezone
 */
export const now = (): Date => {
  return toMartiniqueTime(new Date()).toDate();
};
```

### 9.2 Validation Utilities

**File:** `src/utils/validators.ts`

```typescript
import { Timestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { CreateReservationInput, CreateSlotInput } from '@types';

/**
 * Validate reservation input
 */
export const validateReservation = (
  data: CreateReservationInput
): { valid: boolean; errors: string[] } => {
  const errors: string[] = [];

  if (!data.court_id) {
    errors.push('Court is required');
  }

  if (!data.user_id) {
    errors.push('User is required');
  }

  if (!data.start_time || !data.end_time) {
    errors.push('Start and end times are required');
  } else {
    const start = data.start_time.toDate();
    const end = data.end_time.toDate();

    if (end <= start) {
      errors.push('End time must be after start time');
    }

    const durationHours = (end.getTime() - start.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
    if (durationHours > 2) {
      errors.push('Maximum booking duration is 2 hours');
    }

    if (durationHours < 0.5) {
      errors.push('Minimum booking duration is 30 minutes');
    }
  }

  if (data.participants !== undefined && data.participants < 1) {
    errors.push('At least 1 participant is required');
  }

  return {
    valid: errors.length === 0,
    errors,
  };
};

/**
 * Validate slot input
 */
export const validateSlot = (
  data: CreateSlotInput
): { valid: boolean; errors: string[] } => {
  const errors: string[] = [];

  if (!data.moniteur_id) {
    errors.push('Instructor is required');
  }

  if (!data.date) {
    errors.push('Date is required');
  }

  if (!data.start_time || !data.end_time) {
    errors.push('Start and end times are required');
  } else {
    const [startHour, startMin] = data.start_time.split(':').map(Number);
    const [endHour, endMin] = data.end_time.split(':').map(Number);

    const startMinutes = startHour * 60 + startMin;
    const endMinutes = endHour * 60 + endMin;

    if (endMinutes <= startMinutes) {
      errors.push('End time must be after start time');
    }

    if (startHour < 6 || endHour > 22) {
      errors.push('Slots must be between 06:00 and 22:00');
    }
  }

  if (data.type === 'GROUP') {
    if (data.max_participants !== undefined && data.max_participants < 1) {
      errors.push('Maximum participants must be at least 1 for group slots');
    }
  }

  return {
    valid: errors.length === 0,
    errors,
  };
};

/**
 * Validate email format
 */
export const isValidEmail = (email: string): boolean => {
  const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
  return emailRegex.test(email);
};

/**
 * Validate phone number (Martinique format)
 */
export const isValidPhone = (phone: string): boolean => {
  const phoneRegex = /^(\+596|0)[67]\d{2}\s?\d{2}\s?\d{2}\s?\d{2}$/;
  return phoneRegex.test(phone);
};
```

## 11. Quality Assurance Checklist

Before considering Phase 2 complete, verify:

- [ ] **TypeScript Strict Mode:** Zero `any` types in all files
- [ ] **Type Safety:** All entities have required `id` field
- [ ] **No Inline Styles:** Zero `style={}` in components
- [ ] **No CSS Files:** Zero custom `.css` files (Tailwind only)
- [ ] **Data Router:** All routes use loaders, no `useEffect` for initial data
- [ ] **Error Boundaries:** All routes have `errorElement` defined
- [ ] **Firebase Errors:** All Firebase error types handled
- [ ] **Transactions:** Reservation creation uses `runTransaction()`
- [ ] **Real-time:** All subscriptions use `onSnapshot`
- [ ] **Timezone:** All datetime operations use `America/Martinique`
- [ ] **Indexes:** All required indexes defined in `firestore.indexes.json`
- [ ] **Component Size:** No component exceeds 200 lines
- [ ] **Hook Signatures:** All hooks have complete return types
- [ ] **Service Results:** All service functions return typed results

### 📦 Deliverables

#### 1. **`firestore.indexes.json`** - 11 Composite Indexes

| # | Collection | Fields | Query Optimized |
|---|------------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | `users` | `role + status` | Get users by role and status |

| 7 | `reservations` | `start_time + status` | Daily reservations by status |
| 8 | `reservations` | `court_id + end_time + start_time` | Conflict detection for bookings |

📄 **File**: `/Users/mathieu/StudioProjects/web_tennis/tennis-club-app/firestore.indexes.json`

---

#### 2. **`firestore.rules`** - Role-Based Security Rules

**Helper Functions:**
- `isAuthenticated()` - Base auth check
- `getUserRole()` - Get role from users collection
- `hasRole(role)` - Check specific role
- `isAdmin()`, `isMoniteur()`, `isClient()` - Role helpers
- `isOwner(userId)` - Ownership validation
- `isValidReservation()`, `isValidUserData()`, `isValidCourtData()`, `isValidSlotData()` - Data validation

**Access Control:**
- **users**: Admin read/write, users read own profile
- **courts**: Public read, admin write only
- **reservations**: Authenticated read, owner create/update/delete
- **slots_moniteurs**: Authenticated read, moniteur owns slots

📄 **File**: `/Users/mathieu/StudioProjects/web_tennis/tennis-club-app/firestore.rules`

---

#### 3. **`src/config/firebase.config.ts`** - Singleton Configuration

**Key Features:**
- ✅ Singleton pattern preventing multiple initializations
- ✅ Guard flag (`emulatorsConnected`) preventing double emulator connection
- ✅ Automatic emulator connection in dev mode when `VITE_USE_EMULATOR=true`
- ✅ TypeScript strict mode (no `any`)
- ✅ Re-exports common Firestore and Auth utilities
- ✅ Timezone-aware logging (America/Martinique)

**Exports:**
```typescript

export const db: Firestore;
export const auth: Auth;
export function getAppInstance(): FirebaseApp;
export function getDbInstance(): Firestore;
export function getAuthInstance(): Auth;
```

#### 4. **`src/scripts/seedData.ts`** - Database Seeding Script

**Data Seeded:**
- **6 users**: 1 admin, 2 moniteurs, 3 clients
- **6 courts**: 4 Quick/Hard, 2 Terre/Clay
- **10 reservations**: Client bookings, lessons, maintenance
- **8 moniteur slots**: Private and group sessions

**Features:**
- ✅ Uses `writeBatch` for atomic, performant operations
- ✅ Checks if data exists before seeding (prevents duplicates)
- ✅ Force re-seed option: `seedDatabase({ force: true })`
- ✅ ServiceResult pattern for type-safe error handling
- ✅ Comprehensive try/catch error handling
- ✅ Dynamic date generation relative to current date
- ✅ Timezone: America/Martinique

**Usage:**
```typescript

## Phase 2 Core Infrastructure Implementation Complete ✅

I have successfully implemented all Phase 2 core infrastructure files according to the architecture plan. Here's a summary:

### Files Created (16 deliverables + placeholder pages)

**Types (`src/types/`):**
1. `service.types.ts` - Service layer types (ServiceResult, AvailabilityResult, hook return types)
2. `error.types.ts` - Error types (FirebaseErrorCode enum, AppError, ErrorBoundary types)
3. `index.ts` - Updated exports

**Utils (`src/utils/`):**
4. `validators.ts` - Validation functions (email, phone, reservation, slot, password)

**Services (`src/services/`):**
5. `courtService.ts` - Court CRUD with real-time subscriptions
6. `reservationService.ts` - **CRITICAL**: Reservation CRUD with `runTransaction()` for conflict prevention
7. `slotService.ts` - Moniteur slot operations with booking management
8. `index.ts` - Updated exports

**Hooks (`src/hooks/`):**
9. `useCourts.ts` - Court real-time hook with cleanup
10. `useReservations.ts` - Reservation hook with CRUD operations
11. `useAvailability.ts` - Availability checking with caching
12. `useNavigation.ts` - Navigation hook with role-based helpers
13. `useRouteGuard.ts` - Route protection with auth/role validation

**Error Boundaries (`src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary/`):**
14. `ErrorBoundary.tsx` - Component class with componentDidCatch
15. `RootErrorBoundary.tsx` - Global error boundary
16. `index.tsx` - Module exports

**Router:**
17. `router.tsx` - React Router v6.4+ with createBrowserRouter, loaders, lazy loading

**Pages (20 placeholder files for all routes)**

### Key Features Implemented

| Pattern | Implementation |
|---------|---------------|
| TypeScript Strict | ✅ Zero `any`, explicit return types |
| Firebase Singleton | ✅ Import from `config/firebase.config.ts` |
| Try/Catch | ✅ On ALL Firestore mutations |
| Transactions | ✅ `createReservation()`, `bookSlot()` |
| Timestamp | ✅ `Timestamp.now()` everywhere |
| onSnapshot | ✅ With `unsubscribe()` cleanup |
| Tailwind Design System | ✅ Surface tokens, no hard-coded colors |
| Accessibility | ✅ ARIA labels, roles, focus management |
| Error Handling | ✅ console.error + rethrow |

### Build Status
```
✅ Type check: No errors
✅ Production build: Success (304ms)
```

**MAJOR - Type assertions in service files:**

## Audit Summary

### 🚨 Status: **FAIL** - Phase 2 Requires Corrections

### Critical Issues (4)
All related to **dangerous type assertions** (`as Court`, `as Reservation`, `as User`, `as MoniteurSlot`) when mapping Firestore document data. While common, these violate TypeScript Strict principles and can hide runtime errors.

**Fix Pattern:**
```typescript
// ❌ BAD
const court = { id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Court;

// ✅ GOOD
const court: Omit<Court, 'id'> & { id: string } = {
  id: doc.id,
  ...doc.data()
};
```

### Major Issues (13)
1. **ErrorBoundary components too large** (350+ and 280+ lines) - Extract utilities
2. **React import placement** in router.tsx - Move to top
3. **Repetitive lazy loading** pattern - Create helper function
4. **emulatorsConnected flag timing** - Potential race condition
5. **Timestamp type imports** - Use proper imports instead of `import()` syntax
6. **Missing focus traps** in ErrorBoundary components
7. **Memory leak** in useAvailability cache without cleanup

### Firebase Audit Results
- ✅ Singleton pattern: Correctly implemented
- ✅ Emulators configured once: `emulatorsConnected` flag used
- ✅ Try/catch on mutations: All mutations wrapped
- ✅ onSnapshot unsubscribe: All subscriptions cleaned up
- ❌ Firestore rules dev: Not audited (firestore.rules not in scope)
- ✅ Timestamp correct: `Timestamp.now()` used consistently

### Design Conformity: 85/100
- **Major gap**: Typography not verified (Lexend/Work Sans vs font-headline/font-body)
- **Major gap**: Missing focus-visible states on buttons
- **Major gap**: Error pages missing focus trap and Escape handler

### Recommendation: **Return to Étape 3**
Fix all CRITICAL type assertion issues and MAJOR accessibility/Firebase configuration issues before proceeding to Phase 3.
````

  "prompt": "# Mission: Fix CRITICAL Type Assertions - Final Fix\n\n## Problème\nLes 4 fonctions de mapping utilisent des type assertions dangereuses :\n- mapToCourt() : `as number`, `as string`, `as CourtType`\n- mapToReservation() : `as string`, `as Timestamp`, `as ReservationType`\n- mapToMoniteurSlot() : `as string`, `as SlotType`, `as SlotStatus`\n- mapToUser() : `as string`, `as UserRole` + UserStatus manquant\n\n## Solution Requise\n\n### Option 1: Validation Runtime (RECOMMANDÉ)\n```typescript\nfunction mapToCourt(docId: string, data: Record<string, unknown>): Court {\n  // Validate required fields exist\n  if (typeof data.number !== 'number') {\n    throw new Error(`Invalid court number: ${data.number}`);\n  }\n  if (typeof data.name !== 'string') {\n    throw new Error(`Invalid court name: ${data.name}`);\n  }\n  if (!['Quick', 'Terre'].includes(data.type as string)) {\n    throw new Error(`Invalid court type: ${data.type}`);\n  }\n  \n  // Now safe to cast after validation\n  return {\n    id: docId,\n    number: data.number,  // ✅ TypeScript knows this is number\n    name: data.name,      // ✅ TypeScript knows this is string\n    type: data.type as CourtType, // ✅ Safe after validation\n    // ...\n  };\n}\n```\n\n### Option 2: Omit Pattern\n```typescript\nfunction mapToCourt(docId: string, data: Record<string, unknown>): Omit<Court, 'id'> & { id: string } {\n  return {\n    id: docId,\n    number: data.number as number,  // Still dangerous but explicit\n    // ...\n  };\n}\n```\n\n## Tâche\n\nCorrige les 4 fonctions avec **validation runtime** (Option 1) :\n\n1. **courtService.ts** - mapToCourt()\n   - Validate: number (number), name (string), type ('Quick'|'Terre')\n   \n2. **reservationService.ts** - mapToReservation()\n   - Validate: court_id (string), user_id (string), start_time (Timestamp)\n   - Validate: type (ReservationType enum), status (ReservationStatus enum)\n   \n3. **slotService.ts** - mapToMoniteurSlot()\n   - Validate: moniteur_id (string), date (string), start_time (string)\n   - ---

## ✅ Fix Complete - Runtime Validation Added to All 4 Mapping Functions

All 4 files have been updated with **runtime validation** before type casting:

### 1. `courtService.ts` - `mapToCourt()`
- Added `VALID_COURT_TYPES`, `VALID_SURFACE_TYPES`, `VALID_COURT_STATUSES` constants
- Validates: `number` (number), `name` (string), `type`, `surface`, `status` (enums)
- Validates: `is_active` (boolean), `createdAt`/`updatedAt` (Timestamp)
- Validates optional: `image`, `description` (string | undefined)

### 2. `reservationService.ts` - `mapToReservation()`
- Added `VALID_RESERVATION_TYPES`, `VALID_RESERVATION_STATUSES` constants
- Validates: `court_id`, `user_id` (string), `start_time`, `end_time`, `created_at` (Timestamp)
- Validates: `type`, `status` (enums)
- Validates optional: `moniteur_id`, `title`, `description` (string), `participants` (number), `is_paid` (boolean), `updated_at` (Timestamp)

### 3. `slotService.ts` - `mapToMoniteurSlot()`
- Added `VALID_SLOT_TYPES`, `VALID_SLOT_STATUSES` constants
- Validates: `moniteur_id`, `date`, `start_time`, `end_time` (string)
- Validates: `type`, `status` (enums), `created_at` (Timestamp)
- Validates optional: `court_id` (string), `max_participants`/`current_participants` (number), `description` (string), `updated_at` (Timestamp)

### 4. `useRouteGuard.ts` - `mapToUser()`
- Added `VALID_USER_ROLES`, `VALID_USER_STATUSES` constants
- **Imported `UserStatus`** from `'../types/user.types'`
- Validates: `name`, `email` (string), `role`, `status` (enums)
- Validates: `createdAt`, `updatedAt` (Timestamp)
- Validates optional: `phone`, `avatar` (string), `lastLoginAt` (Timestamp)

### Validation Pattern Used
```typescript
// ✅ Runtime validation BEFORE cast
if (typeof data.field !== 'string' || !VALID_ENUMS.includes(data.field as EnumType)) {
  throw new Error(`Invalid field: expected ..., got ${data.field}`);
}

// ✅ Safe cast after validation
return { field: data.field as EnumType };
```

**TypeScript compilation:** ✅ Passes with zero errors

All 4 critical issues have been resolved with proper runtime validation:

### 1. ✅ courtService.ts - mapToCourt()
- ✅ Runtime validation for `number`, `name`, `type`, `surface`, `status`

- ✅ Cast safe après validation (`as CourtType`, `as SurfaceType`, etc.)

### 2. ✅ reservationService.ts - mapToReservation()
- ✅ Runtime validation for `court_id`, `user_id`, `start_time`, `type`, `status`
- ✅ Throw Error si validation échoue
- ✅ Cast safe après validation (`as ReservationType`, `as ReservationStatus`)

### 3. ✅ slotService.ts - mapToMoniteurSlot()
- ✅ Runtime validation for `moniteur_id`, `date`, `start_time`, `type`, `status`
- ✅ Throw Error si validation échoue
- ✅ Cast safe après validation (`as SlotType`, `as SlotStatus`)

### 4. ✅ useRouteGuard.ts - mapToUser()
- ✅ Runtime validation for `name`, `email`, `role`, `status`
- ✅ `UserStatus` correctly imported from `../types/user.types`
- ✅ Throw Error si validation échoue
- ✅ Cast safe après validation (`as UserRole`, `as UserStatus`)

## 📦 Livrables Phase 2

### 1. **Firebase Infrastructure** ✅
- `firestore.indexes.json` - 11 indexes composites
- `firestore.rules` - Security rules by role
- `src/config/firebase.config.ts` - Singleton Firebase
- `src/scripts/seedData.ts` - Seed script (6 users, 6 courts, 10 reservations, 8 slots)

### 2. **Services** ✅
- `src/services/courtService.ts` - CRUD + real-time (mapToCourt avec validation)
- `src/services/reservationService.ts` - CRUD + transactions (mapToReservation avec validation)
- `src/services/slotService.ts` - CRUD + booking (mapToMoniteurSlot avec validation)

### 3. **Hooks** ✅
- `src/hooks/useCourts.ts` - Real-time courts
- `src/hooks/useReservations.ts` - Real-time reservations + CRUD
- `src/hooks/useAvailability.ts` - Availability checks + cache
- `src/hooks/useNavigation.ts` - Role-based navigation
- `src/hooks/useRouteGuard.ts` - Route protection (mapToUser avec validation)

### 4. **Error Handling** ✅
- `src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary/ErrorBoundary.tsx` - Feature error boundary
- `src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary/RootErrorBoundary.tsx` - Global error boundary
- `src/utils/errorUtils.ts` - Error classification utilities

### 5. **Router** ✅
- `src/router.tsx` - React Router v6.4+ with data router
- Loaders for all routes
- Lazy loading with Suspense
- Error elements

### 6. **Types** ✅
- `src/types/service.types.ts` - Service layer types
- `src/types/error.types.ts` - Error types + FirebaseErrorCode enum
- `src/utils/validators.ts` - Validation utilities

## Summary

| Phase | Duration | Deliverables |
|-------|----------|--------------|
| 1. Project Setup | 3 days | Dev environment, Firebase, Tailwind |
| 2. Core Infrastructure | 4 days | Types, hooks, services |
| 3. Common Components | 5 days | Component library |
| 4. Authentication | 3 days | Login, Register, Reset |
| 5. Court Components | 3 days | Court display |
| 6. Reservation System | 6 days | Booking system |
| 7. Client Dashboard | 3 days | Client features |
| 8. Moniteur Features | 5 days | Instructor features |
| 9. Admin Features | 6 days | Admin features |
| 10. Polish | 4 days | Design, a11y, performance |
| 11. Testing | 5 days | Test coverage |
| 12. Deployment | 3 days | Production launch |
| **Total** | **50 days** | **Complete application** |

## Quick Reference

### Key Files to Create
```
src/
├── config/
│   └── firebase.config.ts
├── types/
│   ├── user.types.ts
│   ├── court.types.ts
│   ├── reservation.types.ts
│   └── slot.types.ts
├── services/
│   ├── userService.ts
│   ├── courtService.ts
│   ├── reservationService.ts
│   └── slotService.ts
├── components/
│   ├── common/
│   ├── layout/
│   ├── courts/
│   ├── reservations/
│   ├── users/
│   └── slots/
├── pages/
│   ├── auth/
│   ├── admin/
│   ├── client/
│   └── moniteur/
└── contexts/
    └── AuthContext.tsx
```

### Essential Commands
```bash
# Development
npm run dev
firebase emulators:start

# Testing
npm run test
npm run test:e2e

# Build & Deploy
npm run build
firebase deploy
```

[élément] — [valeur exacte]\n2. ...\n\n#### Composants à Développer\n- [Composant] — [spécifications]\n\n#### Détails Non-Couverts\n1. [détail]\n\n#### Écarts à Surveiller\n1. [risque]\n\n[Repeat for each PNG]\n\n## Summary\n- Total composants identifiés: X\n- Priorité Must Have: X\n- Priorité Should Have: X\n```\n\nSois TRÈS DÉTAILLÉ - cet audit guidera TOUT le développement Phase 3.",

## Audit PNG — Phase 3 UI Components

### PNG 1: Landing Page (Bienvenue au Tennis Club du François)
**Chemin:** `/Users/mathieu/StudioProjects/web_tennis/stitch_prd_tennis_club_du_fran_ois/bienvenue_au_tennis_club_du_fran_ois/screen.png`

#### Éléments Critiques Identifiés
1. **Couleurs exactes** :
   - Primary: `#006b3f` (Court Green)
   - Primary Container: `#008751`
   - Secondary: `#9d431b` (Clay Ocre)
   - Secondary Container: `#fe8c5e`
   - Surface: `#f5fbf3`
   - Surface Container Low: `#f0f5ee`
   - Surface Container Lowest: `#ffffff`
   - Surface Container Highest: `#dee4dd`
   - On-Surface: `#171d19`
   - On-Surface Variant: `#3e4a41`
   - Tertiary: `#9d3d43` (Accent Red)

2. **Typographie** :
   - Display: `text-6xl md:text-8xl` (3.5rem-6rem), Lexend, font-weight: 800, letter-spacing: tighter
   - Headline: `text-4xl` (2.5rem), Lexend, font-weight: 700
   - Body: `text-xl` (1.25rem), Work Sans, line-height: 1.6
   - Label: `text-xs` (0.75rem), font-weight: 700, uppercase, tracking-wider

3. **Layout** :
   - Hero section: `h-[870px]` avec overlay gradient
   - Grid courts: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8`
   - Bento grid facilities: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 grid-rows-2 gap-6 h-[800px] md:h-[600px]`
   - Pricing: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-0` (borderless cards)

4. **Spacing** :
   - Section padding: `py-24` (6rem)
   - Card padding: `p-8` (2rem)
   - Gap entre cards: `gap-8` (2rem)
   - Navbar height: `h-16` (4rem)

#### Composants à Développer
- **Boutons** :
  - Primary: `bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-primary-container`, `px-8 py-4`, `rounded-md`, hover: `scale-[1.02]`
  - Secondary: `border-2 border-secondary`, `px-8 py-4`, `rounded-md`, hover: `bg-secondary/5`
  - Tertiary: `border-2 border-primary`, `px-8 py-4`, `rounded-lg`, hover: `bg-primary text-white`

- **Court Cards** :
  - `bg-surface-container-lowest`, `p-8`, `rounded-xl`, `shadow-sm`
  - Border-left: `border-l-4 border-primary` (Open) ou `border-l-4 border-secondary` (Occupied)
  - Status badge: `bg-primary/10 text-primary` ou `bg-secondary/10 text-secondary`, `px-3 py-1`, `rounded-full`, `text-xs`, uppercase

- **Facilities Cards (Bento Grid)** :
  - Large card: `md:col-span-2 md:row-span-2`, `rounded-2xl`, image overlay avec `bg-gradient-to-t from-primary/90`
  - Medium card: `md:col-span-2`, `bg-surface-container`, `p-8`, `rounded-2xl`
  - Small card: `bg-secondary/10` ou `bg-surface-container-highest`, `p-8`, `rounded-2xl`
  - Icon container: `w-12 h-12`, `bg-primary/10`, `rounded-xl`

- **Pricing Cards** :
  - Container: `rounded-3xl`, `shadow-xl`, `overflow-hidden`
  - Featured card: `bg-primary text-white`, badge "Popular": `bg-secondary`, `px-4 py-1`, `rounded-full`
  - Price: `text-4xl font-black`, `/hour`: `text-slate-500`
  - List items: `flex items-center gap-3`, Material Icons `check_circle`

- **Navbar** :
  - `fixed top-0`, `bg-[#f5fbf3]/80`, `backdrop-blur-lg`, `z-50`
  - Active link: `border-b-2 border-[#006b3f]`, `font-bold`
  - Hover link: `hover:text-[#9d431b]`, `transition-colors duration-200`

- **BottomNavBar (Mobile)** :
  - `fixed bottom-0`, `bg-white/90`, `backdrop-blur-xl`, `rounded-t-3xl`
  - Active icon: `bg-[#006b3f]`, `rounded-2xl`, `w-16 h-12`
  - Inactive icon: `text-slate-500`

#### Détails Non-Couverts
1. **Border radius spécifiques** :
   - Court cards: `rounded-xl` (0.75rem)
   - Facilities cards: `rounded-2xl` (1rem)
   - Pricing container: `rounded-3xl` (1.5rem)
   - Status badges: `rounded-full`
   - Bottom nav: `rounded-t-3xl`

2. **Hover states observés** :
   - Hero image: `group-hover:scale-110`, `transition-transform duration-700`
   - Primary button: `hover:scale-[1.02]`, `active:scale-95`
   - Facilities card image: `transition-transform duration-700`

3. **Icon positions** :
   - Pricing list: `text-lg` (1.125rem), `text-primary`, à gauche du texte
   - Facilities: `text-3xl` (3rem) dans container `w-12 h-12`
   - Navbar icons: `notifications`, `account_circle` à droite

4. **Overlay gradients** :
   - Hero: `bg-gradient-to-r from-background via-background/40 to-transparent`
   - Facilities large card: `bg-gradient-to-t from-primary/90 to-transparent`

#### Écarts à Surveiller
1. **Risque de mauvaise implémentation** : La grid bento facilities a des proportions complexes (`md:col-span-2 md:row-span-2` pour la grande card)
2. **Éléments ambigus** : Le badge "Popular" sur la pricing card est positionné avec `transform translate-y-4 -translate-x-4`
3. **Incohérences** : Le DESIGN_SYSTEM.md spécifie `rounded-lg` pour les boutons mais les PNG montrent `rounded-md`

1. **Différences vs PNG 2** :
   - Date filter: Input date natif au lieu de bouton "Date Selection"
   - Stats dynamiques: `stat-active` et `stat-available` avec IDs pour mise à jour JS
   - Grid loader: Skeleton avec animation `pulse-soft`
   - Grid étendu: Plus de lignes horaires (08:00 à 15:00+)

2. **Animations spécifiques** :
   - `@keyframes pulse-soft`: opacity 1 → 0.5 → 1, duration 2s
   - Skeleton cells: `bg-surface-container-low`, `animate-pulse-soft`
   - Map pin: `animate-bounce`

3. **Composants dynamiques** :
   - Date input: `bg-emerald-700`, `text-white`, `rounded-md`, `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-container`
   - Calendar icon: `absolute right-8`, `text-white/50`
   - Grid container: `id="court-grid-container"` pour injection JS
   - Real-time grid: `id="realtime-grid"`, hidden par défaut

#### Composants à Développer
- **Date Filter Input** :
  - Container: `relative`, `px-6 py-3`
  - Input: `w-full`, `bg-emerald-700`, `text-white`, `rounded-md`, `border-none`, `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-container`, `text-sm`, `font-semibold`, `p-2`
  - Calendar icon: `absolute right-8 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2`, `text-white/50`, `material-symbols-outlined`

- **Skeleton Loader** :
  - 8 rows de `grid-cols-7 gap-2 h-16`
  - Time label: `bg-surface-container`, `h-4`, `w-8`, `rounded`
  - Cells: `bg-surface-container-low`, `rounded-md`, `animate-pulse-soft`

- **Real-time Grid Injection** :
  - Structure identique au PNG 2
  - States supplémentaires:
    - Pending: `bg-primary`, `text-white`, status text "Pending" (opacity-70)
    - Court type indicator: Quick (primary) vs Terre (secondary)

- **Upcoming List Dynamic** :
  - Container: `id="upcoming-list"`
  - Skeleton: `h-32`, `bg-surface-container-lowest`, `rounded-lg`, `animate-pulse-soft`
  - Items injectés via JS avec structure PNG 2

#### Détails Non-Couverts
1. **Animation pulse-soft** :
```css
@keyframes pulse-soft {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
  50% { opacity: 0.5; }
}
.animate-pulse-soft {
  animation: pulse-soft 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
}
```

2. **Grid expansion** :
   - PNG 2 montre 3 lignes (08:00, 09:00, 10:00)
   - PNG 3 montre 8+ lignes (08:00 à 15:00+)
   - Scroll vertical implicite pour le grid

3. **Stat IDs pour mise à jour** :
   - `id="stat-active"`
   - `id="stat-maintenance"`
   - `id="stat-available"`
   - `id="display-date-label"`

4. **Date label format** :
   - `Today: Oct 24, 2023 • America/Martinique`
   - Secondary color, font-label, font-medium, text-sm

#### Écarts à Surveiller
1. **Risque de mauvaise implémentation** : Le skeleton loader utilise `document.write()` dans le code.html - à refactoriser en Angular
2. **Éléments ambigus** : La transition entre skeleton et real-time grid n'est pas spécifiée (fade-in? instant?)
3. **Incohérences** : Le PNG 3 montre plus de données que le PNG 2 - besoin de pagination ou scroll infini pour le grid

---

## Summary

### Total composants identifiés: 47

#### Par catégorie :
| Catégorie | Count |
|-----------|-------|
| Boutons (variants) | 6 |
| Cards (Court, Stats, Upcoming, Facilities, Pricing) | 12 |
| Badges (Status, Court, Role) | 5 |
| Inputs (Date, Search) | 2 |
| Navigation (TopBar, SideBar, BottomBar, Mobile) | 4 |
| Grid Components (Court cells, Time slots) | 8 |
| Overlays (Hero, Glassmorphism) | 3 |
| FAB | 1 |
| Skeleton Loaders | 2 |
| Icons (Material Symbols) | 4 |

### Priorité Must Have: 32
- TopNavBar avec glassmorphism
- SideNavBar avec navigation states
- Court Grid interactif (core feature)
- Court Cards avec status indicators
- Stats Cards
- Upcoming Reservation Cards
- Boutons Primary/Secondary/Tertiary
- Badges de status (Available, Confirmed, Pending, Maintenance)
- Date Filter Input
- Skeleton Loaders
- FAB

### Priorité Should Have: 15
- Hero Section avec overlay gradient
- Facilities Bento Grid
- Pricing Cards
- Club Maintenance Note Card
- Location Card avec map
- BottomNavBar (mobile only)
- Scrollbar personnalisée
- Animations (pulse-soft, bounce, scale)
- View Toggle (Today/Weekly)
- Icon containers avec background colors

Structure de Dossiers Mise à Jour\n```\nsrc/components/\n├── ui/                    # Atomic components\n│   ├── Button/\n│   ├── Card/\n│   ├── Badge/\n│   ├── Avatar/\n│   ├── Skeleton/\n│   ├── Input/\n│   ├── Icon/\n│   └── Chip/\n├── layout/                # Layout components\n│   ├── TopNavBar/\n│   ├── SideNavBar/\n│   ├── BottomNavBar/\n│   ├── PageContainer/\n│   ├── HeroSection/\n│   └── StatsCard/\n├── courts/                # Court feature\n│   ├── CourtCard/\n│   ├── CourtGrid/\n│   └── TimeSlotCell/\n├── reservations/          # Reservation feature\n│   ├── ReservationCard/\n│   └── DateFilter/\n└── common/                # Other features\n    ├── FAB/\n    ├── FacilitiesCard/\n    ├── PricingCard/\n    └── EmptyState/\n```\n\n### 2. Interfaces TypeScript pour Chaque Composant\n\nExemple pour Button :\n```typescript\ninterface ButtonProps extends ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement> {\n  variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'ghost' | 'danger';\n  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';\n  loading?: boolean;\n  leftIcon?: React.ReactNode;\n  rightIcon?: React.ReactNode;\n  children: React.ReactNode;\n}\n```\n\n### 3. Plan de Routing pour Pages\n- Landing Page (`/`)\n- Client Dashboard (`/client/dashboard`)\n- Booking Page (`/client/booking`)\n- Admin Dashboard (`/admin/dashboard`)\n- Moniteur Dashboard (`/moniteur/dashboard`)\n\n### 4. Error Boundaries par Page\n- Landing Error Boundary\n- Dashboard Error Boundary\n- Booking Error Boundary\n\n### 5. Props Typées pour Tous les Composants\n- CourtCardProps\n- CourtGridProps\n- ReservationCardProps\n- StatsCardProps\n- etc.\n\n### 6. # 🏗️ Architecture Plan: Phase 3 - UI Components & Pages

## Tennis Club du François

Based on the PNG audit (47 components identified, 32 Must Have) and existing project structure, here is the complete architecture for implementing all UI components and pages.

## 2. TypeScript Interfaces

### 2.1 Atomic Component Interfaces

#### Button Component
```typescript
// src/components/ui/Button/Button.types.ts
import { ButtonHTMLAttributes, ReactNode } from 'react';

export type ButtonVariant = 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'ghost' | 'danger';
export type ButtonSize = 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';

export interface ButtonProps extends ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement> {
  variant?: ButtonVariant;
  size?: ButtonSize;
  loading?: boolean;
  leftIcon?: ReactNode;
  rightIcon?: ReactNode;
  children: ReactNode;
  fullWidth?: boolean;
}
```

#### Card Component
```typescript
// src/components/ui/Card/Card.types.ts
import { HTMLAttributes, ReactNode } from 'react';

export type CardElevation = 'default' | 'raised' | 'overlay';

export interface CardProps extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  children: ReactNode;
  elevation?: CardElevation;
  hoverable?: boolean;
  glass?: boolean;
}

export interface CardHeaderProps {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
}

export interface CardTitleProps {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
}

export interface CardContentProps {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
}

export interface CardFooterProps {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  actions?: ReactNode;
}
```

#### Badge Component
```typescript
// src/components/ui/Badge/Badge.types.ts
import { HTMLAttributes, ReactNode } from 'react';

export type BadgeVariant = 'default' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info';
export type BadgeSize = 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';

export interface BadgeProps extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement> {
  variant?: BadgeVariant;
  size?: BadgeSize;
  icon?: ReactNode;
  children: ReactNode;
  dot?: boolean;
}
```

#### Avatar Component
```typescript
// src/components/ui/Avatar/Avatar.types.ts
import { HTMLAttributes } from 'react';

export type AvatarSize = 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl';

export interface AvatarProps extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  name: string;
  src?: string;
  size?: AvatarSize;
  showStatus?: boolean;
  status?: 'online' | 'away' | 'inactive';
  fallback?: boolean;
}
```

#### Input Component
```typescript
// src/components/ui/Input/Input.types.ts
import { InputHTMLAttributes, ReactNode } from 'react';

export type InputType = 'text' | 'email' | 'password' | 'date' | 'search' | 'tel' | 'number';
export type InputSize = 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';

export interface InputProps extends InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement> {
  type?: InputType;
  size?: InputSize;
  label?: string;
  error?: string;
  hint?: string;
  leftIcon?: ReactNode;
  rightIcon?: ReactNode;
  fullWidth?: boolean;
}
```

#### Icon Component
```typescript
// src/components/ui/Icon/Icon.types.ts
import { HTMLAttributes } from 'react';

export type IconSize = 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl';
export type IconWeight = 'light' | 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold';

export interface IconProps extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement> {
  name: string;
  size?: IconSize;
  weight?: IconWeight;
  filled?: boolean;
}
```

#### Chip Component
```typescript
// src/components/ui/Chip/Chip.types.ts
import { HTMLAttributes, ReactNode } from 'react';

export interface ChipProps extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  label: string;
  icon?: ReactNode;
  selected?: boolean;
  disabled?: boolean;
  onClick?: () => void;
  onDelete?: () => void;
}
```

### 2.2 Layout Component Interfaces

#### TopNavBar Component
```typescript
// src/components/layout/TopNavBar/TopNavBar.types.ts
import { ReactNode } from 'react';
import { User } from '@/types/user.types';

export interface TopNavBarProps {
  user: User | null;
  loading: boolean;
  onMenuClick?: () => void;
  onNotificationClick?: () => void;
  notificationCount?: number;
  logoElement?: ReactNode;
}

export interface NavItem {
  label: string;
  path: string;
  icon: string;
  badge?: number;
}
```

#### SideNavBar Component
```typescript
// src/components/layout/SideNavBar/SideNavBar.types.ts
import { UserRole } from '@/types/user.types';

export interface SideNavBarProps {
  role: UserRole;
  activePath: string;
  collapsed?: boolean;
  onNavigate?: (path: string) => void;
}

export interface NavSection {
  title: string;
  items: NavItem[];
}
```

#### PageContainer Component
```typescript
// src/components/layout/PageContainer/PageContainer.types.ts
import { ReactNode } from 'react';

export interface PageContainerProps {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  withSidebar?: boolean;
  withNavBar?: boolean;
  padding?: 'none' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';
  maxWidth?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl' | 'full';
}
```

#### StatsCard Component
```typescript
// src/components/layout/StatsCard/StatsCard.types.ts
import { ReactNode } from 'react';

export type TrendDirection = 'up' | 'down' | 'neutral';

export interface StatsCardProps {
  title: string;
  value: string | number;
  icon: string;
  trend?: {
    value: number;
    direction: TrendDirection;
    label: string;
  };
  subtitle?: string;
  footer?: ReactNode;
  loading?: boolean;
}

## 3. Firebase Firestore Schema

### 3.1 Collections Structure

All collections are already defined in the data model. No new collections needed for UI components.

### 3.2 Required Indexes

```json
// firestore.indexes.json
{
  "indexes": [
    {
      "collectionGroup": "reservations",
      "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
      "fields": [
        { "fieldPath": "court_id", "order": "ASCENDING" },
        { "fieldPath": "start_time", "order": "ASCENDING" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "collectionGroup": "reservations",
      "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
      "fields": [
        { "fieldPath": "user_id", "order": "ASCENDING" },
        { "fieldPath": "start_time", "order": "ASCENDING" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "collectionGroup": "reservations",
      "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
      "fields": [
        { "fieldPath": "start_time", "order": "ASCENDING" },
        { "fieldPath": "status", "order": "ASCENDING" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "collectionGroup": "courts",
      "queryScope": "COLLECTION",
      "fields": [
        { "fieldPath": "status", "order": "ASCENDING" },
        { "fieldPath": "is_active", "order": "ASCENDING" }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## 4. Routing Plan (Data Router)

### 4.1 Router Configuration

```typescript
// src/router.tsx
import { createBrowserRouter, type RouteObject } from 'react-router-dom';
import { ErrorBoundary } from './components/ui/ErrorBoundary';

// Layout imports
import { MainLayout } from './components/layout/MainLayout';
import { DashboardLayout } from './components/layout/DashboardLayout';
import { AuthLayout } from './components/layout/AuthLayout';

// Loader imports
import { landingLoader } from './pages/LandingPage';
import { clientDashboardLoader } from './pages/client/Dashboard';
import { bookingsLoader } from './pages/client/Bookings';
import { reservationsLoader } from './pages/client/Reservations';
import { adminDashboardLoader } from './pages/admin/Dashboard';
import { moniteurDashboardLoader } from './pages/moniteur/Dashboard';

// Role guard loader
function createRoleLoader(requiredRoles?: UserRole | UserRole[]) {
  return async function loader({ request }: LoaderFunctionArgs): Promise<RouteLoaderData> {
    const session = await getSession();
    const user = session?.user ?? null;
    
    if (requiredRoles) {
      const roles = Array.isArray(requiredRoles) ? requiredRoles : [requiredRoles];
      if (!user || !roles.includes(user.role)) {
        throw new Response('Unauthorized', { status: 403 });
      }
    }
    
    return { user };
  };
}

const router = createBrowserRouter([
  // =====================
  // PUBLIC ROUTES
  // =====================
  {
    path: '/',
    element: <MainLayout />,
    errorElement: <RootErrorBoundary />,
    children: [
      {
        index: true,
        loader: landingLoader,
        element: <LandingPage />,
        errorElement: <LandingErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'courts',
        element: <CourtsPage />,
        errorElement: <CourtsErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'pricing',
        element: <PricingPage />,
        errorElement: <PricingErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'about',
        element: <AboutPage />,
        errorElement: <AboutErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'contact',
        element: <ContactPage />,
        errorElement: <ContactErrorBoundary />,
      },
    ],
  },
  
  // Auth routes (no layout)
  {
    path: '/login',
    element: <AuthLayout><LoginPage /></AuthLayout>,
    errorElement: <AuthErrorBoundary />,
  },
  {
    path: '/register',
    element: <AuthLayout><RegisterPage /></AuthLayout>,
    errorElement: <AuthErrorBoundary />,
  },
  
  // =====================
  // CLIENT ROUTES
  // =====================
  {
    path: '/client',
    element: <DashboardLayout role="client" />,
    errorElement: <DashboardErrorBoundary />,
    loader: createRoleLoader('client'),
    children: [
      {
        index: true,
        loader: clientDashboardLoader,
        element: <ClientDashboard />,
        errorElement: <ClientDashboardErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'dashboard',
        loader: clientDashboardLoader,
        element: <ClientDashboard />,
        errorElement: <ClientDashboardErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'bookings',
        loader: bookingsLoader,
        element: <ClientBookings />,
        errorElement: <BookingsErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'reservations',
        loader: reservationsLoader,
        element: <ClientReservations />,
        errorElement: <ReservationsErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'slots',
        element: <ClientSlots />,
        errorElement: <SlotsErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'profile',
        element: <ClientProfile />,
        errorElement: <ProfileErrorBoundary />,
      },
    ],
  },
  
  // =====================
  // MONITEUR ROUTES
  // =====================
  {
    path: '/moniteur',
    element: <DashboardLayout role="moniteur" />,
    errorElement: <DashboardErrorBoundary />,
    loader: createRoleLoader(['moniteur', 'admin']),
    children: [
      {
        index: true,
        loader: moniteurDashboardLoader,
        element: <MoniteurDashboard />,
        errorElement: <MoniteurDashboardErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'dashboard',
        loader: moniteurDashboardLoader,
        element: <MoniteurDashboard />,
      },
      {
        path: 'schedule',
        element: <MoniteurSchedule />,
        errorElement: <ScheduleErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'slots',
        element: <MoniteurSlots />,
        errorElement: <SlotsErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'students',
        element: <MoniteurStudents />,
        errorElement: <StudentsErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'profile',
        element: <MoniteurProfile />,
        errorElement: <ProfileErrorBoundary />,
      },
    ],
  },
  
  // =====================
  // ADMIN ROUTES
  // =====================
  {
    path: '/admin',
    element: <DashboardLayout role="admin" />,
    errorElement: <DashboardErrorBoundary />,
    loader: createRoleLoader('admin'),
    children: [
      {
        index: true,
        loader: adminDashboardLoader,
        element: <AdminDashboard />,
        errorElement: <AdminDashboardErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'dashboard',
        loader: adminDashboardLoader,
        element: <AdminDashboard />,
      },
      {
        path: 'users',
        element: <AdminUsers />,
        errorElement: <UsersErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'courts',
        element: <AdminCourts />,
        errorElement: <CourtsErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'reservations',
        element: <AdminReservations />,
        errorElement: <ReservationsErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'slots',
        element: <AdminSlots />,
        errorElement: <SlotsErrorBoundary />,
      },
      {
        path: 'settings',
        element: <AdminSettings />,
        errorElement: <SettingsErrorBoundary />,
      },
    ],
  },
  
  // =====================
  // ERROR ROUTES
  // =====================
  {
    path: '/unauthorized',
    element: <UnauthorizedPage />,
    errorElement: <UnauthorizedErrorBoundary />,
  },
  {
    path: '*',
    element: <NotFoundPage />,
    errorElement: <NotFoundErrorBoundary />,
  },
]);

export { router };
```

### 4.2 Route Map

| Path | Component | Access | Loader | Error Boundary |
|------|-----------|--------|--------|----------------|
| `/` | `LandingPage` | Public | `landingLoader` | `LandingErrorBoundary` |
| `/courts` | `CourtsPage` | Public | - | `CourtsErrorBoundary` |
| `/pricing` | `PricingPage` | Public | - | `PricingErrorBoundary` |
| `/login` | `LoginPage` | Public | - | `AuthErrorBoundary` |
| `/register` | `RegisterPage` | Public | - | `AuthErrorBoundary` |
| `/client/dashboard` | `ClientDashboard` | Client | `clientDashboardLoader` | `ClientDashboardErrorBoundary` |
| `/client/bookings` | `ClientBookings` | Client | `bookingsLoader` | `BookingsErrorBoundary` |
| `/client/reservations` | `ClientReservations` | Client | `reservationsLoader` | `ReservationsErrorBoundary` |
| `/moniteur/dashboard` | `MoniteurDashboard` | Moniteur/Admin | `moniteurDashboardLoader` | `MoniteurDashboardErrorBoundary` |
| `/admin/dashboard` | `AdminDashboard` | Admin | `adminDashboardLoader` | `AdminDashboardErrorBoundary` |
| `/unauthorized` | `UnauthorizedPage` | Public | - | `UnauthorizedErrorBoundary` |
| `*` | `NotFoundPage` | Public | - | `NotFoundErrorBoundary` |

## 5. Error Boundaries

### 5.1 Error Boundary Hierarchy

```
RootErrorBoundary (Catches all)
├── LandingErrorBoundary
├── DashboardErrorBoundary
│   ├── ClientDashboardErrorBoundary
│   ├── MoniteurDashboardErrorBoundary
│   └── AdminDashboardErrorBoundary
├── AuthErrorBoundary
├── BookingsErrorBoundary
├── ReservationsErrorBoundary
└── NotFoundErrorBoundary
```

### 5.2 Error Boundary Component

```typescript
// src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary/ErrorBoundary.tsx
import React, { Component, ErrorInfo, ReactNode } from 'react';
import { Button } from '../Button';
import { Card } from '../Card';

interface Props {
  children?: ReactNode;
  onError?: (error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) => void;
  fallback?: ReactNode;
}

interface State {
  hasError: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
}

export class ErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {
  public state: State = {
    hasError: false,
    error: null,
  };

  public static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): State {
    return { hasError: true, error };
  }

  public componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) {
    console.error('[ErrorBoundary] Uncaught error:', error, errorInfo);
    this.props.onError?.(error, errorInfo);
  }

  private handleReload = () => {
    window.location.reload();
  };

  private handleGoHome = () => {
    window.location.href = '/';
  };

  public render() {
    if (this.state.hasError) {
      if (this.props.fallback) {
        return this.props.fallback;
      }

      return (
        <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-surface p-4">
          <Card className="max-w-md w-full text-center">
            <div className="mb-6 flex justify-center">
              <span className="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-tertiary">
                error
              </span>
            </div>
            
            <h1 className="font-headline text-2xl font-bold text-on-surface mb-2">
              Something went wrong
            </h1>
            
            <p className="font-body text-on-surface/70 mb-6">
              {this.state.error?.message || 'An unexpected error occurred'}
            </p>
            
            <div className="flex gap-3 justify-center">
              <Button variant="primary" onClick={this.handleReload}>
                Reload Page
              </Button>
              <Button variant="secondary" onClick={this.handleGoHome}>
                Go Home
              </Button>
            </div>
          </Card>
        </div>
      );
    }

    return this.props.children;
  }
}
```

### 5.3 Firebase Error Handling

| Firebase Error | Cause | Boundary Level | Recovery Action |
|----------------|-------|----------------|-----------------|
| `QuotaExceededError` | Firestore storage full | Root | Show upgrade prompt |
| `InvalidStateError` | Private browsing, DB closed | Root | Suggest browser change |
| `PermissionDeniedError` | Security rules block | Feature | Redirect to authorized page |
| `UnavailableError` | Network offline | Feature | Show offline state |
| `UnauthenticatedError` | Session expired | Root | Redirect to login |
| `NotFoundError` | Document not found | Feature | Show empty state |

### 5.4 Specialized Error Boundaries

```typescript
// src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary/BookingErrorBoundary.tsx
export function BookingsErrorBoundary() {
  return (
    <ErrorBoundary
      fallback={
        <div className="p-6">
          <EmptyState
            icon="booking_error"
            title="Unable to load bookings"
            description="Please check your connection and try again"
            actionLabel="Retry"
            onAction={() => window.location.reload()}
          />
        </div>
      }
    />
  );
}

// src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary/DashboardErrorBoundary.tsx
export function DashboardErrorBoundary() {
  return (
    <ErrorBoundary
      fallback={
        <div className="p-6">
          <EmptyState
            icon="dashboard_customize"
            title="Dashboard unavailable"
            description="We're having trouble loading your dashboard"
            actionLabel="Return Home"
            onAction={() => (window.location.href = '/')}
          />
        </div>
      }
    />
  );
}
```
